```text
     1→import React, { createContext, useState, useEffect, useContext } from "react";
     2→import { DEMO_USER } from "../config/demoData";
     3→
     4→export const UserContext = createContext();
     5→
     6→export const useUser = () => {
     7→  const context = useContext(UserContext);
     8→  if (!context) {
     9→    throw new Error('useUser must be used within a UserContextProvider');
    10→  }
    11→  return context;
    12→};
    13→
    14→export function UserContextProvider({ children }) {
    15→  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
    16→  const [role, setRole] = useState(null);
    17→  const [userId, setUserId] = useState(localStorage.getItem("userId") || "");
    18→  const [username, setUsername] = useState(
    19→    localStorage.getItem("username") || ""
    20→  );
    21→  const [token, setToken] = useState(localStorage.getItem("authToken") || "");
    22→  const [isDemoMode, setIsDemoMode] = useState(false);
    23→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true); // Thêm loading state
    24→
    25→  useEffect(() => {
    26→    const demoMode = localStorage.getItem("demoMode");
    27→    const storedUserId = localStorage.getItem("userId");
    28→    const storedRole = localStorage.getItem("role");
    29→    const storedUsername = localStorage.getItem("username");
    30→    const storedUserData = localStorage.getItem("userData");
    31→    const storedToken = localStorage.getItem("authToken");
    32→
    33→    if (demoMode === "true") {
    34→      setIsDemoMode(true);
    35→      setUser(DEMO_USER);
    36→      setRole("admin");
    37→      setUserId(DEMO_USER.id);
    38→      setUsername(DEMO_USER.username);
    39→      setToken("");
    40→    } else if (storedUserId && storedRole) {
    41→      // Xử lý userData từ localStorage
    42→      let processedUserData = storedUserData ? JSON.parse(storedUserData) : {
    43→        id: storedUserId,
    44→        username: storedUsername
    45→      };
    46→
    47→      // Đảm bảo avatar được lưu đúng format (relative path)
    48→      if (processedUserData.avatar && processedUserData.avatar.startsWith('http://localhost:3001')) {
    49→        processedUserData.avatar = processedUserData.avatar.replace('http://localhost:3001', '');
    50→      }
    51→
    52→      setUserId(storedUserId);
    53→      setRole(storedRole);
    54→      setUsername(storedUsername || "");
    55→      setUser(processedUserData);
    56→      setToken(storedToken || "");
    57→      setIsDemoMode(false);
    58→    } else {
    59→      setUser(null);
    60→      setRole(null);
    61→      setUsername("");
    62→      setUserId("");
    63→      setToken("");
    64→      setIsDemoMode(false);
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    // Đặt loading thành false sau khi đã kiểm tra xong
    68→    setIsLoading(false);
    69→  }, []); // Remove userId dependency to prevent infinite loops
    70→
    71→  const login = (id, role, username, userData, authToken = "") => {
    72→    // Xử lý trường hợp username undefined/null
    73→    const validUsername = username || userData?.username || userData?.name || userData?.email || "Người dùng";
    74→
    75→    // Đảm bảo avatar được lưu đúng format (relative path)
    76→    let avatarPath = userData?.avatar || "";
    77→    if (avatarPath && avatarPath.startsWith('http://localhost:3001')) {
    78→      avatarPath = avatarPath.replace('http://localhost:3001', '');
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    setIsDemoMode(false);
    82→    setUserId(id);
    83→    setRole(role);
    84→    setUsername(validUsername);
    85→    setToken(authToken);
    86→    setUser({
    87→      ...userData,
    88→      username: validUsername,
    89→      avatar: avatarPath // Lưu relative path
    90→    });
    91→    setIsLoading(false); // Đảm bảo loading state được reset
    92→
    93→    // Lưu vào localStorage
    94→    localStorage.setItem("userId", id);
    95→    localStorage.setItem("role", role);
    96→    localStorage.setItem("username", validUsername);
    97→    if (authToken) {
    98→      localStorage.setItem("authToken", authToken);
    99→    }
   100→    if (userData) {
   101→      // Lưu userData với avatar path (relative)
   102→      const userDataToStore = {
   103→        ...userData,
   104→        username: validUsername,
   105→        avatar: avatarPath // Lưu relative path
   106→      };
   107→      localStorage.setItem("userData", JSON.stringify(userDataToStore));
   108→    }
   109→    localStorage.removeItem("demoMode");
   110→  };
   111→
   112→  const updateUser = (updatedUserData) => {
   113→    console.log("UpdateUser called with:", updatedUserData);
   114→    
   115→    // Đảm bảo avatar được lưu đúng format (relative path)
   116→    let avatarPath = updatedUserData?.avatar || "";
   117→    if (avatarPath && avatarPath.startsWith('http://localhost:3001')) {
   118→      avatarPath = avatarPath.replace('http://localhost:3001', '');
   119→    }
   120→
   121→    const newUserData = {
   122→      ...user,
   123→      ...updatedUserData,
   124→      avatar: avatarPath // Lưu relative path
   125→    };
   126→
   127→    setUser(newUserData);
   128→
   129→    // Cập nhật localStorage
   130→    const currentUserData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userData') || '{}');
   131→    const updatedStorageData = {
   132→      ...currentUserData,
   133→      ...updatedUserData,
   134→      avatar: avatarPath // Lưu relative path
   135→    };
   136→    localStorage.setItem('userData', JSON.stringify(updatedStorageData));
   137→
   138→    console.log("UpdateUser completed. New user data:", newUserData);
   139→  };
   140→
   141→  const loginDemo = () => {
   142→    setIsDemoMode(true);
   143→    setUserId(DEMO_USER.id);
   144→    setRole("admin");
   145→    setUsername(DEMO_USER.username);
   146→    setToken("");
   147→    setUser(DEMO_USER);
   148→    setIsLoading(false);
   149→
   150→    localStorage.setItem("demoMode", "true");
   151→    localStorage.removeItem("userId");
   152→    localStorage.removeItem("role");
   153→    localStorage.removeItem("username");
   154→    localStorage.removeItem("authToken");
   155→    localStorage.removeItem("userData");
   156→  };
   157→
   158→  const logout = () => {
   159→    setUserId("");
   160→    setRole(null);
   161→    setUsername("");
   162→    setToken("");
   163→    setIsDemoMode(false);
   164→    setUser(null);
   165→    setIsLoading(false);
   166→
   167→    localStorage.removeItem("userId");
   168→    localStorage.removeItem("role");
   169→    localStorage.removeItem("username");
   170→    localStorage.removeItem("authToken");
   171→    localStorage.removeItem("userData");
   172→    localStorage.removeItem("demoMode");
   173→  };
   174→
   175→  return (
   176→    <UserContext.Provider value={{
   177→      user,
   178→      role,
   179→      username,
   180→      token,
   181→      login,
   182→      updateUser,
   183→      loginDemo,
   184→      logout,
   185→      isDemoMode,
   186→      isLoading
   187→    }}>
   188→      {children}
   189→    </UserContext.Provider>
   190→  );
   191→}
   192→
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\DoAnTuyenSinh\src\components\ThanhHeader.jsx`

```text
     1→import React, { useContext, useState, useEffect } from "react";
     2→import { Link, useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
     3→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
     4→import {
     5→  FaHome,
     6→  FaUserPlus,
     7→  FaSearch,
     8→  FaHandshake,
     9→  FaQuestionCircle,
    10→  FaEnvelope,
    11→  FaSignInAlt,
    12→  FaUserEdit,
    13→  FaSignOutAlt,
    14→  FaCog,
    15→  FaChevronDown,
    16→  FaBars,
    17→  FaTimes,
    18→  FaGraduationCap,
    19→  FaTrophy,
    20→  FaUserCircle,
    21→  FaShieldAlt,
    22→  FaCrown,
    23→  FaUser,
    24→  FaMoon,
    25→  FaSun,
    26→} from "react-icons/fa";
    27→import { UserContext } from "../accounts/UserContext";
    28→import { useDarkMode } from "../contexts/DarkModeContext";
    29→import { getAvatarUrl } from "../utils/avatarUtils";
    30→import InstallPrompt from "./InstallPrompt";
    31→
    32→const menu = [
    33→  { label: "Trang chủ", path: "/", icon: <FaHome /> },
    34→  { label: "Đăng ký xét tuyển", path: "/dang-ky-xet-tuyen", icon: <FaUserPlus /> },
    35→  { label: "Thông tin tuyển sinh", path: "/thong-tin-tuyen-sinh", icon: <FaGraduationCap /> },
    36→  { label: "Câu hỏi thường gặp", path: "/cau-hoi-thuong-gap", icon: <FaQuestionCircle /> },
    37→  { label: "Liên hệ", path: "/lien-he", icon: <FaEnvelope /> },
    38→];
    39→
    40→const headerVariants = {
    41→  hidden: { y: -100, opacity: 0 },
    42→  visible: {
    43→    y: 0,
    44→    opacity: 1,
    45→    transition: { type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30, mass: 0.8 },
    46→  },
    47→};
    48→
    49→const menuItemVariants = {
    50→  hidden: { opacity: 0, y: -20 },
    51→  visible: (i) => ({
    52→    opacity: 1,
    53→    y: 0,
    54→    transition: { delay: i * 0.05, duration: 0.3, ease: "easeOut" },
    55→  }),
    56→  hover: {
    57→    y: -2,
    58→    transition: { duration: 0.2, ease: "easeOut" },
    59→  },
    60→};
    61→
    62→const dropdownVariants = {
    63→  hidden: { opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10, transition: { duration: 0.2 } },
    64→  visible: {
    65→    opacity: 1,
    66→    scale: 1,
    67→    y: 0,
    68→    transition: { type: "spring", stiffness: 400, damping: 25, mass: 0.5 },
    69→  },
    70→};
    71→
    72→function ThanhHeader() {
    73→  const location = useLocation();
    74→  const { user, username, role, logout } = useContext(UserContext);
    75→  const [showDropdown, setShowDropdown] = useState(false);
    76→  const [showUserDropdown, setShowUserDropdown] = useState(false);
    77→  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
    78→  const [isScrolled, setIsScrolled] = useState(false);
    79→  const { darkMode, toggleDarkMode } = useDarkMode();
    80→
    81→  useEffect(() => {
    82→    let ticking = false;
    83→    const handleScroll = () => {
    84→      if (!ticking) {
    85→        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    86→          setIsScrolled(window.scrollY > 50);
    87→          ticking = false;
    88→        });
    89→        ticking = true;
    90→      }
    91→    };
    92→    window.addEventListener("scroll", handleScroll, { passive: true });
    93→    return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", handleScroll);
    94→  }, []);
    95→
    96→  const displayName =
    97→    username || user?.username || user?.name || user?.email || "Người dùng";
    98→  const avatarUrl = getAvatarUrl(user);
    99→
   100→  const navLinkClass = (itemPath) =>
   101→    `flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 text-sm relative overflow-hidden group ${
   102→      location.pathname === itemPath
   103→        ? "bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/30 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300"
   104→        : "text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-gray-100"
   105→    }`;
   106→
   107→  return (
   108→    <motion.header
   109→      className={`fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-all duration-500 ${
   110→        isScrolled
   111→          ? "bg-white/95 dark:bg-gray-900/90 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-2xl border-b border-gray-200/60 dark:border-gray-700/60 py-2"
   112→          : "bg-white/85 dark:bg-gray-900/70 backdrop-blur-lg shadow-lg border-b border-gray-200/30 dark:border-gray-700/30 py-3"
   113→      }`}
   114→      variants={headerVariants}
   115→      initial="hidden"
   116→      animate="visible"
   117→    >
   118→      <div className="container mx-auto flex items-center justify-between px-4 md:px-6">
   119→        {/* Logo */}
   120→        <Link to="/" className="flex items-center">
   121→          <motion.div
   122→            className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-shrink-0"
   123→            whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   124→            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   125→            transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
   126→          >
   127→            <motion.div
   128→              className="relative"
   129→              whileHover={{ rotate: 360 }}
   130→              transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: "easeInOut" }}
   131→            >
   132→              <img
   133→                src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/vi/8/81/Logo_Tr%C6%B0%E1%BB%9Dng_%C4%90%E1%BA%A1i_h%E1%BB%8Dc_C%C3%B4ng_ngh%E1%BB%87_Th%C3%A0nh_ph%E1%BB%91_H%E1%BB%93_Ch%C3%AD_Minh.png"
   134→                alt="Logo HUTECH"
   135→                className={`object-contain rounded-xl border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-700 shadow-soft bg-white dark:bg-neutral-800 transition-all duration-300 ${
   136→                  isScrolled ? "h-10 w-10" : "h-12 w-12"
   137→                }`}
   138→                style={{ minWidth: isScrolled ? 40 : 48, minHeight: isScrolled ? 40 : 48 }}
   139→              />
   140→            </motion.div>
   141→            <motion.div className="flex flex-col" animate={{ scale: isScrolled ? 0.9 : 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}>
   142→              <span className={`font-bold tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 ${
   143→                isScrolled ? "text-lg" : "text-xl"
   144→              } text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100`}>
   145→                HUTECH
   146→              </span>
   147→              <span className="text-xs font-medium text-primary dark:text-primary">
   148→                Tuyển sinh 2025
   149→              </span>
   150→            </motion.div>
   151→          </motion.div>
   152→        </Link>
   153→
   154→        {/* Desktop Menu */}
   155→        <nav className="hidden lg:flex items-center justify-center gap-1 flex-1 max-w-4xl mx-6">
   156→          {menu.map((item, index) => (
   157→            <motion.div
   158→              key={item.path || item.label}
   159→              custom={index}
   160→              variants={menuItemVariants}
   161→              initial="hidden"
   162→              animate="visible"
   163→              whileHover="hover"
   164→              className="relative"
   165→            >
   166→              <Link to={item.path} className={navLinkClass(item.path)}>
   167→                <span className="text-base">{item.icon}</span>
   168→                <span className="hidden xl:block">{item.label}</span>
   169→              </Link>
   170→            </motion.div>
   171→          ))}
   172→
   173→          {/* Dropdown Tư vấn & Học bổng */}
   174→          <motion.div
   175→            className="relative"
   176→            custom={5}
   177→            variants={menuItemVariants}
   178→            initial="hidden"
   179→            animate="visible"
   180→            whileHover="hover"
   181→          >
   182→            <motion.button
   183→              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 text-sm text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800"
   184→              onClick={() => setShowDropdown((v) => !v)}
   185→              onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setShowDropdown(false), 200)}
   186→              whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
   187→              transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
   188→              aria-label="Tư vấn và Học bổng"
   189→              aria-expanded={showDropdown}
   190→              aria-haspopup="true"
   191→            >
   192→              <FaQuestionCircle className="text-base" />
   193→              <span className="hidden xl:block">Tư vấn & Học bổng</span>
   194→              <motion.div animate={{ rotate: showDropdown ? 180 : 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}>
   195→                <FaChevronDown className="ml-1 text-xs" />
   196→              </motion.div>
   197→            </motion.button>
   198→
   199→            <AnimatePresence>
   200→              {showDropdown && (
   201→                <motion.div
   202→                  className="absolute left-0 mt-2 w-64 bg-background dark:bg-card rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-border dark:border-border z-50 overflow-hidden"
   203→                  variants={dropdownVariants}
   204→                  initial="hidden"
   205→                  animate="visible"
   206→                  exit="hidden"
   207→                >
   208→                  <Link
   209→                    to="/dang-ky-tu-van"
   210→                    className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/50 transition-all duration-200 group"
   211→                    onClick={() => setShowDropdown(false)}
   212→                  >
   213→                    <FaQuestionCircle className="text-blue-500 dark:text-blue-400" />
   214→                    <div>
   215→                      <div className="font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-900 dark:group-hover:text-blue-100">Đăng ký tư vấn</div>
   216→                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">Hỗ trợ tư vấn tuyển sinh</div>
   217→                    </div>
   218→                  </Link>
   219→                  <Link
   220→                    to="/dang-ky-hoc-bong"
   221→                    className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/50 transition-all duration-200 group"
   222→                    onClick={() => setShowDropdown(false)}
   223→                  >
   224→                    <FaTrophy className="text-yellow-500 dark:text-yellow-400" />
   225→                    <div>
   226→                      <div className="font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-900 dark:group-hover:text-blue-100">Đăng ký học bổng</div>
   227→                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">Cơ hội nhận học bổng</div>
   228→                    </div>
   229→                  </Link>
   230→                </motion.div>
   231→              )}
   232→            </AnimatePresence>
   233→          </motion.div>
   234→        </nav>
   235→
   236→        {/* Right Section: Dark Mode + Auth */}
   237→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
   238→          {/* Dark Mode Toggle */}
   239→          <motion.button
   240→            onClick={toggleDarkMode}
   241→            className={`p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all duration-300 ${
   242→              darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"
   243→            }`}
   244→            whileHover={{ scale: 1.1 }}
   245→            whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }}
   246→            transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
   247→            aria-label={darkMode ? "Chuyển sang chế độ sáng" : "Chuyển sang chế độ tối"}
   248→            title={darkMode ? "Chuyển sang chế độ sáng" : "Chuyển sang chế độ tối"}
   249→          >
   250→            <motion.div animate={{ rotate: darkMode ? 180 : 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}>
   251→              {darkMode ? (
   252→                <FaSun className="text-yellow-400" />
   253→              ) : (
   254→                <FaMoon className="text-blue-200" />
   255→              )}
   256→            </motion.div>
   257→          </motion.button>
   258→
   259→          {user ? (
   260→            <motion.div
   261→              className="relative"
   262→              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
   263→              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
   264→              transition={{ delay: 0.6, duration: 0.3 }}
   265→            >
   266→              <motion.button
   267→                onClick={() => setShowUserDropdown(!showUserDropdown)}
   268→                className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800"
   269→                whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, y: -2 }}
   270→                whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}
   271→                transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
   272→                aria-label="Menu tài khoản"
   273→                aria-expanded={showUserDropdown}
   274→              >
   275→                <div
   276→                  className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg overflow-hidden ${
   277→                    role === "admin"
   278→                      ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-500 to-orange-500"
   279→                      : "bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500"
   280→                  }`}
   281→                >
   282→                  {avatarUrl ? (
   283→                    <img
   284→                      src={avatarUrl}
   285→                      alt="User Avatar"
   286→                      className="w-full h-full rounded-full object-cover"
   287→                      onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; e.target.nextSibling.style.display = 'flex'; }}
   288→                    />
   289→                  ) : null}
   290→                  <div className={`w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center ${avatarUrl ? 'hidden' : 'flex'}`}>
   291→                    {role === "admin" ? <FaCrown className="text-sm" /> : <FaUserCircle className="text-sm" />}
   292→                  </div>
   293→                </div>
   294→                {role === "admin" && (
   295→                  <div className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-3 h-3 bg-yellow-400 rounded-full border border-white" />
   296→                )}
   297→                <div className="hidden md:block text-left">
   298→                  <p className="text-sm font-bold leading-none text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">
   299→                    Xin chào, {displayName}
   300→                  </p>
   301→                  {role === "admin" && (
   302→                    <p className="text-xs text-yellow-300 dark:text-yellow-400 leading-none mt-1 flex items-center gap-1">
   303→                      <FaShieldAlt className="text-xs" />
   304→                      Quản trị viên
   305→                    </p>
   306→                  )}
   307→                </div>
   308→                <motion.div animate={{ rotate: showUserDropdown ? 180 : 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}>
   309→                  <FaChevronDown className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400" />
   310→                </motion.div>
   311→              </motion.button>
   312→
   313→              <AnimatePresence>
   314→                {showUserDropdown && (
   315→                  <motion.div
   316→                    className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-56 bg-background dark:bg-card rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-border dark:border-border z-50 overflow-hidden"
   317→                    variants={dropdownVariants}
   318→                    initial="hidden"
   319→                    animate="visible"
   320→                    exit="hidden"
   321→                  >
   322→                    <div className="px-4 py-3 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-gray-800 border-b border-border dark:border-border">
   323→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   324→                        <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white ${
   325→                          role === "admin" ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-500 to-orange-500" : "bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500"
   326→                        }`}>
   327→                          {avatarUrl ? (
   328→                            <img src={avatarUrl} alt="User Avatar" className="w-full h-full rounded-full object-cover"
   329→                              onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; e.target.nextSibling.style.display = 'flex'; }} />
   330→                          ) : null}
   331→                          <div className={`w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center ${avatarUrl ? 'hidden' : 'flex'}`}>
   332→                            {role === "admin" ? <FaCrown /> : <FaUser />}
   333→                          </div>
   334→                        </div>
   335→                        <div>
   336→                          <p className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 text-sm">{displayName}</p>
   337→                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 flex items-center gap-1">
   338→                            {role === "admin" ? <><FaShieldAlt className="text-yellow-500" />Quản trị viên</> : <><FaUser className="text-blue-500" />Người dùng</>}
   339→                          </p>
   340→                        </div>
   341→                      </div>
   342→                    </div>
   343→                    <div className="py-2">
   344→                      <Link
   345→                        to={role === "admin" ? "/admin/ho-so-quan-ly" : "/ho-so-nguoi-dung"}
   346→                        className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/50 transition-all duration-200"
   347→                        onClick={() => setShowUserDropdown(false)}
   348→                      >
   349→                        <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-indigo-500 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg">
   350→                          <FaUserEdit className="text-sm" />
   351→                        </div>
   352→                        <div>
   353→                          <div className="font-semibold">{role === "admin" ? "Hồ sơ quản lý" : "Hồ sơ người dùng"}</div>
   354→                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">Cập nhật thông tin cá nhân</div>
   355→                        </div>
   356→                      </Link>
   357→                      <Link
   358→                        to="/tra-cuu-ket-qua"
   359→                        className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-purple-700 dark:text-purple-300 hover:bg-purple-50 dark:hover:bg-purple-900/50 transition-all duration-200"
   360→                        onClick={() => setShowUserDropdown(false)}
   361→                      >
   362→                        <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-500 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg">
   363→                          <FaSearch className="text-sm" />
   364→                        </div>
   365→                        <div>
   366→                          <div className="font-semibold">Tra cứu kết quả</div>
   367→                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">Kiểm tra kết quả xét tuyển</div>
   368→                        </div>
   369→                      </Link>
   370→                      {role === "admin" && (
   371→                        <Link
   372→                          to="/admin/tong-quan"
   373→                          className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-green-700 dark:text-green-300 hover:bg-green-50 dark:hover:bg-green-900/50 transition-all duration-200"
   374→                          onClick={() => setShowUserDropdown(false)}
   375→                        >
   376→                          <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-green-500 to-emerald-500 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg">
   377→                            <FaCog className="text-sm" />
   378→                          </div>
   379→                          <div>
   380→                            <div className="font-semibold">Admin Dashboard</div>
   381→                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">Quản lý hệ thống</div>
   382→                          </div>
   383→                        </Link>
   384→                      )}
   385→                      <button
   386→                        onClick={() => { logout(); setShowUserDropdown(false); }}
   387→                        className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-900/50 transition-all duration-200 w-full text-left"
   388→                      >
   389→                        <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-pink-500 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg">
   390→                          <FaSignOutAlt className="text-sm" />
   391→                        </div>
   392→                        <div>
   393→                          <div className="font-semibold">Đăng xuất</div>
   394→                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">Thoát khỏi tài khoản</div>
   395→                        </div>
   396→                      </button>
   397→                    </div>
   398→                  </motion.div>
   399→                )}
   400→              </AnimatePresence>
   401→            </motion.div>
   402→          ) : (
   403→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   404→              <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.6, duration: 0.3 }}>
   405→                <Link
   406→                  to="/accounts/dang-nhap"
   407→                  className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 text-sm text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100"
   408→                >
   409→                  <FaSignInAlt className="text-base" />
   410→                  <span className="hidden sm:block">Đăng nhập</span>
   411→                </Link>
   412→              </motion.div>
   413→              <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.7, duration: 0.3 }}>
   414→                <Link
   415→                  to="/accounts/dang-ky"
   416→                  className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 text-sm text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100"
   417→                >
   418→                  <FaUserEdit className="text-base" />
   419→                  <span className="hidden sm:block">Đăng ký</span>
   420→                </Link>
   421→              </motion.div>
   422→            </div>
   423→          )}
   424→
   425→          {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
   426→          <motion.button
   427→            className={`lg:hidden p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 ml-2 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100`}
   428→            onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
   429→            whileHover={{ scale: 1.1 }}
   430→            whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }}
   431→            transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
   432→            aria-label={mobileMenuOpen ? "Đóng menu" : "Mở menu"}
   433→            aria-expanded={mobileMenuOpen}
   434→          >
   435→            {mobileMenuOpen ? <FaTimes /> : <FaBars />}
   436→          </motion.button>
   437→        </div>
   438→      </div>
   439→
   440→      {/* Mobile Menu */}
   441→      <AnimatePresence>
   442→        {mobileMenuOpen && (
   443→          <motion.div
   444→            className="lg:hidden bg-background dark:bg-card border-t border-border dark:border-border"
   445→            initial={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }}
   446→            animate={{ opacity: 1, height: "auto" }}
   447→            exit={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }}
   448→            transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: "easeInOut" }}
   449→          >
   450→            <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-4 space-y-2">
   451→              {menu.map((item) => (
   452→                <motion.div key={item.path} initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}>
   453→                  <Link
   454→                    to={item.path}
   455→                    className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all duration-200 ${
   456→                      location.pathname === item.path
   457→                        ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
   458→                        : "text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/50"
   459→                    }`}
   460→                    onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}
   461→                  >
   462→                    <span className="text-lg">{item.icon}</span>
   463→                    <span>{item.label}</span>
   464→                  </Link>
   465→                </motion.div>
   466→              ))}
   467→              <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ delay: 0.25, duration: 0.3 }} className="space-y-2">

   499→  );

   502→export default ThanhHeader;

    35→        res.send = function(data) {
    36→            // Log activity sau khi response thành công

    39→                const deviceInfo = deviceService.getDeviceInfo(userAgent);

    42→                    userId: req.user ? req.user.id : null,
    43→                    action,
    44→                    description,
    45→                    ipAddress: req.ip,
    46→                    userAgent,
    47→                    deviceInfo,
    48→                    status: 'success'
    49→                });
    50→            }
    51→            originalSend.call(this, data);
    52→        };
    53→        next();
    54→    };
    55→};

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\DoAnTuyenSinh\backend\middleware\auth.js`

```text
     1→import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
     2→import pool from '../config/database.js';
     3→
     4→export const authenticateToken = (req, res, next) => {
     5→    const authHeader = req.headers['authorization'];
     6→    const token = authHeader && authHeader.split(' ')[1]; // Bearer TOKEN
     7→
     8→    if (!token) {
     9→        return res.status(401).json({
    10→            success: false,
    11→            message: 'Access token required'
    12→        });
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    try {
    16→        const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key');
    17→        req.user = decoded;
    18→        next();
    19→    } catch (error) {
    20→        console.error('Token verification error:', error);
    21→        return res.status(403).json({
    22→            success: false,
    23→            message: 'Invalid or expired token'
    24→        });
    25→    }
    26→};
    27→
    28→export const requireRole = (roles) => {
    29→    return (req, res, next) => {
    30→        if (!req.user) {
    31→            return res.status(401).json({
    32→                success: false,
    33→                message: 'Authentication required'
    34→            });
    35→        }
    36→
    37→        if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    38→            return res.status(403).json({
    39→                success: false,
    40→                message: 'Insufficient permissions'
    41→            });
    42→        }
    43→
    44→        next();
    45→    };
    46→};
    47→
    48→export const authenticateAdminFAQ = async(req, res, next) => {
    49→    try {
    50→        const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
    51→        if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
    52→            return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Không có quyền truy cập' });
    53→        }
    54→        const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    55→        const [rows] = await pool.execute(
    56→            'SELECT id, username, role FROM users WHERE token = ? AND role IN ("admin", "staff")',
    57→            [token]
    58→        );
    59→        if (rows.length === 0) {
    60→            return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Token không hợp lệ hoặc không có quyền' });
    61→        }
    62→        req.user = rows[0];
    63→        next();
    64→    } catch (error) {
    65→        res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Lỗi xác thực', error: error.message });
    66→    }
    67→};
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→// API Configuration

     3→    import.meta.env.MODE === 'development';

     5→    import.meta.env.MODE === 'production';
     6→
     7→// API Base URLs

     9→    // Backend API URL
    10→    BASE_URL: isDevelopment ?
    11→        'http://localhost:3001' : import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001',
    12→
    13→    // API Endpoints
    14→    ENDPOINTS: {
    15→        AUTH: '/api/auth',
    16→        ADMIN: '/api/admin',
    17→        SCHOLARSHIP: '/api/scholarship',
    18→        CONSULT: '/api/consult',
    19→        HEALTH: '/health'
    20→    }

    28→
    29→    // Official website

    31→

    34→};
    35→
    36→// Helper function to build API URL
    37→export const buildApiUrl = (endpoint) => {

    39→};
    40→
    41→// Common API URLs
    42→export const API_URLS = {

    45→    REGISTER: buildApiUrl(`${API_CONFIG.ENDPOINTS.AUTH}/register`),
    46→    REGISTER_ADMIN: buildApiUrl(`${API_CONFIG.ENDPOINTS.AUTH}/register-admin`),
    47→    MAJORS: buildApiUrl(`${API_CONFIG.ENDPOINTS.AUTH}/majors`),

    62→    // Consultation endpoints

    64→    CONSULT_LIST: buildApiUrl(`${API_CONFIG.ENDPOINTS.CONSULT}/list`),
    65→
    66→    // Health check

    68→};

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\DoAnTuyenSinh\src\utils\apiClient.js`

```text
     1→import axios from 'axios';
     2→
     3→// Base API configuration
     4→const API_BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:3001/api';
     5→
     6→const apiClient = axios.create({
     7→    baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
     8→    timeout: 10000,
     9→    headers: {
    10→        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    11→    },
    12→});
    13→
    14→// Request interceptor to add auth token
    15→apiClient.interceptors.request.use(
    16→    (config) => {
    17→        const token = localStorage.getItem('authToken');
    18→        if (token) {
    19→            config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
    20→        }
    21→        return config;
    22→    },
    23→    (error) => {
    24→        return Promise.reject(error);
    25→    }
    26→);
    27→
    28→// Response interceptor for error handling
    29→apiClient.interceptors.response.use(
    30→    (response) => {
    31→        return response.data;
    32→    },
    33→    (error) => {
    34→        const originalRequest = error.config;
    35→
    36→        // Handle 401 (Unauthorized) - redirect to login
    37→        if (error.response && error.response.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
    38→            localStorage.removeItem('authToken');
    39→            localStorage.removeItem('userInfo');
    40→            window.location.href = '/accounts/dang-nhap';
    41→            return Promise.reject(error);
    42→        }
    43→
    44→        // Handle other errors
    45→        const errorMessage = (error.response && error.response.data && error.response.data.message) || 'Đã xảy ra lỗi không xác định';
    46→
    47→        console.error('API Error:', {
    48→            status: error.response && error.response.status,
    49→            message: errorMessage,
    50→            url: error.config && error.config.url
    51→        });
    52→
    53→        return Promise.reject({
    54→            status: error.response && error.response.status,
    55→            message: errorMessage,
    56→            data: error.response && error.response.data
    57→        });
    58→    }
    59→);
    60→
    61→// Auth API
    62→export const authAPI = {
    63→    login: (credentials) => apiClient.post('/auth/login', credentials),
    64→    register: (userData) => apiClient.post('/auth/register', userData),
    65→    registerAdmin: (adminData) => apiClient.post('/auth/register-admin', adminData),
    66→    getProfile: () => apiClient.get('/auth/profile'),
    67→    changePassword: (passwordData) => apiClient.post('/auth/change-password', passwordData),
    68→    refreshToken: () => apiClient.post('/auth/refresh-token'),
    69→    getFAQs: (params = {}) => apiClient.get('/auth/faqs', { params }),
    70→};
    71→
    72→// Admin API
    73→export const adminAPI = {
    74→    // Dashboard
    75→    getDashboardStats: () => apiClient.get('/admin/dashboard/stats'),
    76→
    77→    // Applications
    78→    getApplications: (params = {}) => apiClient.get('/admin/applications', { params }),
    79→    updateApplicationStatus: (id, statusData) =>
    80→        apiClient.patch(`/admin/applications/${id}/status`, statusData),
    81→
    82→    // FAQs
    83→    getFAQs: (params = {}) => apiClient.get('/admin/faqs', { params }),
    84→    createFAQ: (faqData) => apiClient.post('/admin/faqs', faqData),
    85→    updateFAQ: (id, faqData) => apiClient.put(`/admin/faqs/${id}`, faqData),
    86→    deleteFAQ: (id) => apiClient.delete(`/admin/faqs/${id}`),
    87→
    88→    // Contacts
    89→    getContacts: (params = {}) => apiClient.get('/admin/contacts', { params }),
    90→    respondToContact: (id, responseData) =>
    91→        apiClient.post(`/admin/contacts/${id}/respond`, responseData),
    92→
    93→    // Majors
    94→    getMajors: () => apiClient.get('/admin/majors'),
    95→
    96→    // Admission Methods
    97→    getAdmissionMethods: () => apiClient.get('/admin/admission-methods'),
    98→
    99→    // Settings
   100→    getSettings: () => apiClient.get('/admin/settings'),
   101→    updateSettings: (settingsData) => apiClient.put('/admin/settings', settingsData),
   102→
   103→    // Notifications
   104→    getNotifications: (params = {}) => apiClient.get('/admin/notifications', { params }),
   105→    createNotification: (data) => apiClient.post('/admin/notifications', data),
   106→    updateNotification: (id, data) => apiClient.put(`/admin/notifications/${id}`, data),
   107→    deleteNotification: (id) => apiClient.delete(`/admin/notifications/${id}`),
   108→    markNotificationRead: (id, data) => apiClient.patch(`/admin/notifications/${id}/read`, data),
   109→};
   110→
   111→// Utility functions
   112→export const setAuthToken = (token) => {
   113→    if (token) {
   114→        localStorage.setItem('authToken', token);
   115→    } else {
   116→        localStorage.removeItem('authToken');
   117→    }
   118→};
   119→
   120→export const getAuthToken = () => {
   121→    return localStorage.getItem('authToken');
   122→};
   123→
   124→export const setUserInfo = (userInfo) => {
   125→    localStorage.setItem('userInfo', JSON.stringify(userInfo));
   126→};
   127→
   128→export const getUserInfo = () => {
   129→    const userInfo = localStorage.getItem('userInfo');
   130→    return userInfo ? JSON.parse(userInfo) : null;
   131→};
   132→
   133→export const clearAuth = () => {
   134→    localStorage.removeItem('authToken');
   135→    localStorage.removeItem('userInfo');
   136→};
   137→
   138→export const isAuthenticated = () => {
   139→    return !!getAuthToken();
   140→};
   141→
   142→export const isAdmin = () => {
   143→    const userInfo = getUserInfo();
   144→    return userInfo && userInfo.role_name === 'admin';
   145→};
   146→
   147→export const isStaff = () => {
   148→    const userInfo = getUserInfo();
   149→    return userInfo && ['admin', 'staff'].includes(userInfo.role_name);
   150→};
   151→
   152→export default apiClient;
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useContext } from "react";

```md
# Phase 8: Real-time + Admin Notifications

## Plan 01: SSE Backend (Service + Endpoint + Broadcast Triggers)

**Type:** execute | **Wave:** 1 | **Autonomous:** true

### Objective

Build the Express SSE infrastructure: client registry service, SSE endpoint at `GET /api/sse/events` with JWT validation and 30s heartbeat, and broadcast triggers on new application submission.

### Context

**Files to read before implementing:**
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js` -- locate `authenticateToken` import (line 22), application POST route (line 607), existing CORS config (lines 58-64), Express `app` setup (line 25), and `pool` import (line 6)
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/middleware/auth.js` -- understand `authenticateToken` signature: sets `req.user` from decoded JWT payload containing `{id, username, role}`

**Key interfaces:**
- `authenticateToken` middleware from `./middleware/auth.js` -- validates `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
- `pool` from `./config/database.js` -- MySQL connection pool (used for `await pool.execute()`)
- Express `app` instance from `index.js`

**Backend route prefix:** The auth-prefixed routes (line ~80 of index.js) use a variable prefix. The application POST is at `${authPrefix}/apply`.

---

### Task 1: Create SSE Service

<read_first>
- Create: `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` (new file -- no read needed)
</read_first>

<action>
Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` with this exact implementation:

\```javascript
// backend/services/sseService.js
class SSEService {
    constructor() {
        // Map of channelKey -> Set of Express response objects
        // channelKey is either 'admin' (all admins) or a userId string (per-user)
        this.clients = new Map();
    }

    // Add a client response object to a channel
    addClient(channelKey, res) {
        if (!this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
            this.clients.set(channelKey, new Set());
        }
        this.clients.get(channelKey).add(res);
        console.log(`[SSE] Client connected: ${channelKey} (total: ${this.clients.get(channelKey).size})`);
    }

    // Remove a client response object from a channel
    removeClient(channelKey, res) {
        if (this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
            this.clients.get(channelKey).delete(res);
            if (this.clients.get(channelKey).size === 0) {
                this.clients.delete(channelKey);
            }
        }
        console.log(`[SSE] Client disconnected: ${channelKey}`);
    }

    // Send event to all clients in a specific channel
    broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
        const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
        if (!clientSet || clientSet.size === 0) return;

        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
        for (const res of clientSet) {
            if (!res.writableEnded) {
                res.write(message);
            }
        }
    }

    // Send event to ALL connected clients (all channels)
    broadcastAll(eventName, data) {
        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
            for (const res of clientSet) {
                if (!res.writableEnded) {
                    res.write(message);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Get count of connected clients for monitoring
    getConnectionCount(channelKey) {
        return this.clients.has(channelKey) ? this.clients.get(channelKey).size : 0;
    }

    getTotalConnections() {
        let total = 0;
        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
            total += clientSet.size;
        }
        return total;
    }
}

export default new SSEService();
\```

**Important:** Use `export default new SSEService()` (singleton pattern) so the same registry is shared across all requests.
</action>

<acceptance_criteria>
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` exists and contains `export default new SSEService()`
- File contains `addClient`, `removeClient`, `broadcast`, `broadcastAll` methods
- No syntax errors -- `node --check backend/services/sseService.js` passes
</acceptance_criteria>

<done>
SSE service singleton with client registry exists at `backend/services/sseService.js`
</done>

---

### Task 2: Add SSE Endpoint to Express

<read_first>
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js` (lines 1-100 for imports, line ~22 for authenticateToken import, lines 58-64 for CORS config, line 25 for `app` instance, line 6 for `pool` import)
</read_first>

<action>
Add the following to `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js`:

**1. Add the import** at the top of the file (after the existing imports, around line 23):
\```javascript
import sseService from './services/sseService.js';
\```

**2. Add the SSE endpoint** AFTER the CORS config (after line 64) and BEFORE the body parsing middleware (before line 67). Place it right after the `app.use(cors(...))` block:

\```javascript
// SSE endpoint for real-time notifications
// SSE endpoint for real-time notifications
app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken, (req, res) => {
    // Set SSE headers
    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
    res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no'); // Disable nginx buffering
    res.flushHeaders();

    // Determine channel: 'admin' for admin/staff roles, userId for others
    const userId = req.user.id;
    const role = req.user.role;
    const channelKey = (role === 'admin' || role === 'staff') ? 'admin' : userId;

    // Register client
    sseService.addClient(channelKey, res);

    // Send initial connection confirmation
    res.write(`event: connected\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({ channel: channelKey, message: 'SSE connected' })}\n\n`);

    // Heartbeat: send comment every 30 seconds to keep connection alive
    const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
        if (!res.writableEnded) {
            res.write(': heartbeat\n\n');
        } else {
            clearInterval(heartbeat);
        }
    }, 30000);

    // Clean up on client disconnect
    req.on('close', () => {
        clearInterval(heartbeat);
        sseService.removeClient(channelKey, res);
    });
});
\```

**Critical requirements:**
- The SSE endpoint MUST use `authenticateToken` middleware to validate JWT before establishing the stream
- Channel key MUST be `'admin'` for admin/staff roles (broadcast to all admins) and `userId` for regular users (per-user)
- Heartbeat MUST be a comment line (`: heartbeat`) not a named event, sent every 30000ms
- Cleanup MUST clear the heartbeat interval and call `sseService.removeClient` on `req.on('close')`
</action>

<acceptance_criteria>
- `backend/index.js` contains `import sseService from './services/sseService.js'`
- `backend/index.js` contains `app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken,`
- SSE handler sets `Content-Type: text/event-stream` and `Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate`
- SSE handler has `res.flushHeaders()` call after setting headers
- SSE handler registers client with `sseService.addClient(channelKey, res)`
- SSE handler sends heartbeat via `setInterval(..., 30000)` with comment line `: heartbeat\n\n`
- SSE handler has `req.on('close', ...)` that clears heartbeat and calls `sseService.removeClient`
- Channel key is `'admin'` for `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'`, otherwise `req.user.id`
</acceptance_criteria>

<done>
SSE endpoint exists at GET /api/sse/events, validates JWT, sends 30s heartbeat comments, registers client in sseService
</done>

### Verification

**Backend SSE test:**

1. Start the backend: `cd DoAnTuyenSinh/backend && npm start`
2. Get a valid JWT token by logging in via the login endpoint
3. Test SSE connection with curl:
   \```bash
   curl -N -H "Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_TOKEN>" http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events
   \```
   Expected: Streams `event: connected\ndata: {...}\n\n` then `: heartbeat\n\n` every 30s
4. Submit a new application (POST to `/api/auth/apply`) while SSE is connected
   Expected: SSE receives `event: new_application\ndata: {...}\n\n`
5. Verify connection cleanup: close the curl connection, check server logs for `[SSE] Client disconnected`

## Plan 02: NotificationBell UI (Context + Component + Integration)

**Type:** execute | **Wave:** 2 | **Autonomous:** false (has checkpoint)

### Objective

Build the frontend NotificationContext that manages the SSE connection with exponential backoff reconnection, and the NotificationBell component that shows a badge counter and dropdown list of notifications. Integrate into the admin header.

### Context

**Files to read before implementing:**
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand provider structure, exported `useUser` hook, `user.id`, `user.role`, `token` values
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/ThanhHeader.jsx` -- find the right section to insert NotificationBell (right section near ThemeToggle around line 237)
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx` -- see provider nesting order (line 191: UserContextProvider wraps everything)
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- API_BASE_URL is `http://localhost:3001/api`, full SSE URL will be `http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events`
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- already has `notifications` state, `fetchNotifications`, and a bell button using `FaBell` icon (line 16, 35, 65-83). The bell is currently only in AdminLayout, not in the public ThanhHeader.

**Important:** RT-02 says "Admin sees notification bell icon in header" -- the admin uses the admin dashboard (via AdminLayout), NOT the public ThanhHeader. So NotificationBell should be integrated into `AdminLayout.jsx`, not `ThanhHeader.jsx`. The AdminLayout already has a bell button structure (FaBell + notifications dropdown) -- we need to replace the static polling with live SSE-driven updates.

---

### Task 1: Create NotificationContext

<read_first>
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand `useUser()` return value: `{ user, role, token, isDemoMode, ... }`
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- `API_CONFIG.BASE_URL` is `http://localhost:3001` (dev) or `import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL`
</read_first>

<action>
Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` with this exact implementation:

\```javascript
// src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx
import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

const NotificationContext = createContext(null);

export const useNotifications = () => {
    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
    if (!context) {
        throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
    }
    return context;
};

export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
    const { user, role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);

    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);

    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';

    // Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s (max 30s cap)
    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((retryCount) => {
        const baseDelay = 1000;
        const delay = Math.min(baseDelay * Math.pow(2, retryCount), 30000);
        return delay;
    }, []);

    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
        // Skip SSE in demo mode or when not authenticated
        if (isDemoMode || !token || !user?.id || !isAdminOrStaff) {
            return;
        }

        // Close existing connection if any
        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
            eventSourceRef.current.close();
            eventSourceRef.current = null;
        }

        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;

        try {
            const eventSource = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
            eventSourceRef.current = eventSource;

            eventSource.onopen = () => {
                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
                setIsConnected(true);
                setIsReconnecting(false);
                retryCountRef.current = 0;
                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
            };

            // Handle new_application event (admin)
            eventSource.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
                try {
                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
                    const notification = {
                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
                        type: 'new_application',
                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
                        unread: true,
                        applicationId: data.id,
                    };
                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
                    // Show toast notification
                    toast.success(notification.title, {
                        description: notification.message,
                        duration: 5000,
                    });
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error('[SSE] Failed to parse new_application event:', err);
                }
            });

            // Handle connected event
            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {
                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
                console.log('[SSE] Received connected event:', event.data);
            });

            eventSource.onerror = () => {
                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
                setIsConnected(false);
                eventSource.close();
                eventSourceRef.current = null;

                // Exponential backoff reconnection
                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
                    setIsReconnecting(true);
                    console.log(`[SSE] Reconnecting in ${delay}ms (attempt ${retryCountRef.current + 1})`);
                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
                } else {
                    console.error('[SSE] Max reconnection attempts reached');
                    setIsReconnecting(false);
                }
            };
        } catch (err) {
            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
        }
    }, [token, user?.id, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);

    // Connect SSE when user changes
    useEffect(() => {
        isMountedRef.current = true;

        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
            // Small delay to ensure UserContext is fully loaded
            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
            return () => {
                isMountedRef.current = false;
                clearTimeout(timer);
                if (retryTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
                }
                setIsConnected(false);
                setIsReconnecting(false);
            };
        } else {
            // Clean up when logged out or not admin
            if (eventSourceRef.current) {
                eventSourceRef.current.close();
                eventSourceRef.current = null;
            }
            setIsConnected(false);
            setIsReconnecting(false);
            setNotifications([]);
            setUnreadCount(0);
        }
    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);

    // Mark notification as read
    const markAsRead = useCallback((notificationId) => {
        setNotifications(prev =>
            prev.map(n => n.id === notificationId ? { ...n, unread: false } : n)
        );
        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
    }, []);

    // Mark all as read
    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
        setUnreadCount(0);
    }, []);

    // Clear all notifications
    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
        setNotifications([]);
        setUnreadCount(0);
    }, []);

    const value = {
        notifications,
        unreadCount,
        isConnected,
        isReconnecting,
        markAsRead,
        markAllAsRead,
        clearNotifications,
    };

    return (
        <NotificationContext.Provider value={value}>
            {children}
        </NotificationContext.Provider>
    );
}
\```

**Key design decisions:**
- SSE connects only for admin/staff roles, not for regular users
- Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, max 30s, up to 10 attempts
- Max 50 notifications stored in state (oldest dropped)
- Shows sonner toast on new application event
- Cleanup on unmount: closes EventSource, clears timeout, sets `isMountedRef` flag
- Demo mode skips SSE entirely
</action>

<acceptance_criteria>
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` exists
- File exports `NotificationProvider` component and `useNotifications()` hook
- Context has state: `notifications`, `unreadCount`, `isConnected`, `isReconnecting`
- Context has methods: `markAsRead`, `markAllAsRead`, `clearNotifications`
- SSE connects only when `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'` AND `!isDemoMode` AND `token` exists
- SSE uses `EventSource` with exponential backoff reconnection (max 10 attempts, cap 30s)
- SSE handler listens for `new_application` event and shows toast via sonner
- All cleanup (EventSource close, timeout clear, `isMountedRef`) happens in useEffect return
</acceptance_criteria>

<done>
NotificationContext manages SSE connection lifecycle with exponential backoff, stores notifications, tracks unread count
</done>

### Task 2: Create NotificationBell Component

<read_first>
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` (just created above)
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- see existing notification dropdown structure around lines 35, 65-120, and bell button structure to understand styling patterns
</read_first>

<action>
Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` with this exact implementation:

\```javascript
// src/components/NotificationBell.jsx
import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
import { FaBell, FaFileAlt, FaCheck, FaTrash, FaCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
import { useNotifications } from '../contexts/NotificationContext';
import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';

const NotificationBell = () => {
    const { notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications } = useNotifications();
    const { isDemoMode } = useUser();
    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
    const dropdownRef = useRef();

    // Close dropdown on outside click
    useEffect(() => {
        const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
            if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
                setIsOpen(false);
            }
        };
        document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
        return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
    }, []);

    const getNotificationIcon = (type) => {
        switch (type) {
            case 'new_application':
                return <FaFileAlt className="text-blue-500" />;
            default:
                return <FaBell className="text-gray-500" />;
        }
    };

    const formatTimestamp = (timestamp) => {
        if (!timestamp) return '';
        const date = new Date(timestamp);
        const now = new Date();
        const diffMs = now - date;
        const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
        const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);

        if (diffMins < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
        if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins} phút trước`;
        if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours} giờ trước`;
        if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays} ngày trước`;
        return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN');
    };

    const connectionStatusColor = isConnected ? 'bg-green-500' : isReconnecting ? 'bg-yellow-500' : 'bg-red-500';
    const connectionStatusText = isConnected ? 'Đã kết nối' : isReconnecting ? 'Đang kết nối...' : 'Mất kết nối';

    return (
        <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRef}>
            {/* Bell Button */}
            <motion.button
                onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
                className={`relative p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all duration-200 ${
                    isOpen ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800' : ''
                }`}
                whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
                whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
                aria-label="Thông báo"
            >
                <FaBell className="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-lg" />
                {/* Unread Badge */}
                {unreadCount > 0 && (
                    <motion.span
                        initial={{ scale: 0 }}
                        animate={{ scale: 1 }}
                        className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-full min-w-[18px] h-[18px] flex items-center justify-center px-1"
                    >
                        {unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : unreadCount}
                    </motion.span>
                )}
                {/* Connection Status Dot */}
                {!isDemoMode && (
                    <span
                        className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-2 h-2 ${connectionStatusColor} rounded-full border border-white dark:border-gray-900`}
                        title={connectionStatusText}
                    />
                )}
            </motion.button>

            {/* Dropdown Panel */}
            <AnimatePresence>
                {isOpen && (
                    <motion.div
                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
                        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
                        transition={{ duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' }}
                        className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 overflow-hidden z-50"
                    >
                        {/* Header */}
                        <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">Thông báo</h3>
                                {!isDemoMode && (
                                    <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${connectionStatusColor}`} />
                                )}
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                {notifications.length > 0 && (
                                    <>
                                        <button
                                            onClick={markAllAsRead}
                                            className="text-xs text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-800 dark:hover:text-blue-300 font-medium"
                                            title="Đánh dấu đã đọc"
                                        >
                                            Đọc hết
                                        </button>
                                        <button
                                            onClick={clearNotifications}
                                            className="text-xs text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:text-red-800 dark:hover:text-red-300 font-medium"
                                            title="Xóa tất cả"
                                        >
                                            Xóa
                                        </button>
                                    </>
                                )}
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Notification List */}
                        <div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
                            {notifications.length === 0 ? (
                                <div className="py-12 text-center">
                                    <FaBell className="mx-auto text-gray-300 dark:text-gray-600 text-3xl mb-3" />
                                    <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-sm">Chưa có thông báo nào</p>
                                    <p className="text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">
                                        Thông báo sẽ xuất hiện khi có hồ sơ mới
                                    </p>
                                </div>
                            ) : (
                                notifications.map((notification) => (
                                    <div
                                        key={notification.id}
                                        className={`px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700 last:border-0 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
                                            notification.unread ? 'bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/10' : ''
                                        }`}
                                        onClick={() => notification.unread && markAsRead(notification.id)}
                                    >
                                        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                                            <div className="mt-0.5">
                                                {getNotificationIcon(notification.type)}
                                            </div>
                                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                                                    <p className={`text-sm font-semibold truncate ${
                                                        notification.unread
                                                            ? 'text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100'
                                                            : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300'
                                                    }`}>
                                                        {notification.title}
                                                    </p>
                                                    {notification.unread && (
                                                        <FaCircle className="text-blue-500 text-[6px] flex-shrink-0" />
                                                    )}
                                                </div>
                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-0.5 line-clamp-2">
                                                    {notification.message}
                                                </p>
                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 mt-1">
                                                    {formatTimestamp(notification.timestamp)}
                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                ))
                            )}
                        </div>

                        {/* Footer */}
                        {notifications.length > 0 && (
                            <div className="px-4 py-2 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900/50">
                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-center">
                                    {notifications.length} thông báo
                                    {!isDemoMode && (
                                        <span className="ml-1">
                                            | {connectionStatusText}
                                        </span>
                                    )}
                                </p>
                            </div>
                        )}
                    </motion.div>
                )}
            </AnimatePresence>
        </div>
    );
};

export default NotificationBell;
\```

**Key design decisions:**
- Bell icon with unread count badge (red, top-right corner)
- Connection status dot (green=connected, yellow=reconnecting, red=disconnected)
- Dropdown with notification list: icon, title, message, timestamp
- "Đọc hết" and "Xóa" action buttons in header
- Empty state when no notifications
- Click notification to mark as read
- Footer shows total count and connection status
- Demo mode hides connection status dot
</action>

<acceptance_criteria>
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` exists
- Bell button renders with `FaBell` icon
- Unread badge shows when `unreadCount > 0`, displays count (99+ max)
- Connection status dot: green when `isConnected`, yellow when `isReconnecting`, red when disconnected
- Dropdown shows notification list with icon, title, message, formatted timestamp
- "Đọc hết" button calls `markAllAsRead`, "Xóa" button calls `clearNotifications`
- Empty state shown when `notifications.length === 0`
- Click on unread notification calls `markAsRead`
- Dropdown closes on outside click (uses ref + mousedown listener)
</acceptance_criteria>

### Task 4: Verification (Human Checkpoint)

<task type="checkpoint:human-verify">
<what-built>
Complete Phase 8 implementation: SSE endpoint with heartbeat, NotificationContext with exponential backoff, NotificationBell with badge counter and dropdown. The notification bell appears in the admin dashboard header.
</what-built>

<how-to-verify>

**Backend (SSE Endpoint):**
1. Start backend: `cd DoAnTuyenSinh/backend && npm start`
2. Login as admin and capture the JWT token
3. Test SSE endpoint:
   \```bash
   curl -N -H "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>" http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events
   \```
   Expected: `event: connected\ndata: {...}\n\n` immediately, then `: heartbeat\n\n` every 30 seconds
4. Check server logs for `[SSE] Client connected: admin`
5. Close the curl connection -- check logs for `[SSE] Client disconnected: admin`

**Frontend (NotificationBell):**
1. Start frontend: `cd DoAnTuyenSinh && npm run dev`
2. Login as admin
3. Navigate to admin dashboard (`/admin/tong-quan`)
4. Verify: Bell icon visible in admin header (top-right area)
5. Verify: Small colored dot on bell icon (green=connected, check browser console for `[SSE] Connected`)
6. Have another user submit a new application (or trigger via API):
   \```bash
   curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/apply \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>" \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{"fullName":"Test User","email":"test@test.com","phone":"0123456789","majorId":1}'
   \```
7. Verify:
   - Bell badge counter increments (red badge with count)
   - Toast notification appears (top-right, blue)
   - Click bell -- dropdown shows notification with title "Hồ sơ mới" and message "Thí sinh Test User vừa nộp hồ sơ"
   - Click notification -- badge count decreases
   - Connection status dot remains green

**Reconnection Test:**
1. Stop the backend server
2. Wait 5 seconds -- verify connection dot turns yellow (reconnecting) then red (disconnected)
3. Restart the backend server
4. Wait -- verify dot turns green again and SSE reconnects automatically
</how-to-verify>

### must_haves

**Truths (observable behaviors):**
1. Admin browser maintains SSE connection to Express backend with 30s heartbeat comments
2. SSE reconnects automatically with exponential backoff if connection drops (1s, 2s, 4s... max 30s, up to 10 attempts)
3. Admin sees notification bell icon with live unread count badge in admin header
4. Admin can open notification dropdown to see list of new application alerts
5. SSE broadcasts to all connected admin clients when a new application is submitted

**Artifacts:**
- `backend/services/sseService.js` -- client registry with add/remove/broadcast/broadcastAll methods
- `backend/index.js` -- SSE endpoint at GET /api/sse/events with JWT validation, 30s heartbeat, proper cleanup
- `src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` -- SSE lifecycle management with exponential backoff reconnection
- `src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` -- bell icon with badge, dropdown panel, connection status indicator
- `src/App.jsx` -- NotificationProvider wrapping BrowserRouter
- `src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- NotificationBell rendered in header

**Key Links:**
- SSE endpoint sends `event: new_application` with `{id, candidateName, email, timestamp}` payload
- `NotificationContext` listens for `new_application` event, updates notifications array, shows sonner toast
- `NotificationBell` reads `notifications` and `unreadCount` from `NotificationContext`
- `NotificationContext` depends on `useUser()` from `UserContext` -- must be nested inside UserContextProvider

     9→Build the Express SSE infrastructure: client registry service, SSE endpoint at `GET /api/sse/events` with JWT validation and 30s heartbeat, and broadcast triggers on new application submission.
    10→
    11→### Context
    12→

    20→- Express `app` instance from `index.js`
    21→
