   172→
   173→### Task 2: Add SSE Endpoint to Express
   174→
   175→<read_first>
   176→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js` (lines 1-100 for imports, line ~22 for authenticateToken import, lines 58-64 for CORS config, line 25 for `app` instance, line 6 for `pool` import)
   177→</read_first>
   178→
   179→<action>
   180→Add the following to `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js`:
   181→
   182→**1. Add the import** at the top of the file (after the existing imports, around line 23):
   183→```javascript
   184→import sseService from './services/sseService.js';
   185→```
   186→
   187→**2. Add the SSE endpoint** AFTER the CORS config (after line 64) and BEFORE the body parsing middleware (before line 67). Place it right after the `app.use(cors(...))` block:
   188→
   189→```javascript
   190→// SSE endpoint for real-time notifications
   191→app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken, (req, res) => {
   192→    // Set SSE headers
   193→    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
   194→    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
   195→    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
   196→    res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no'); // Disable nginx buffering
   197→    res.flushHeaders();
   198→
   199→    // Determine channel: 'admin' for admin/staff roles, userId for others
   200→    const userId = req.user.id;
   201→    const role = req.user.role;
   202→    const channelKey = (role === 'admin' || role === 'staff') ? 'admin' : userId;
   203→
   204→    // Register client
   205→    sseService.addClient(channelKey, res);
   206→
   207→    // Send initial connection confirmation
   208→    res.write(`event: connected\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({ channel: channelKey, message: 'SSE connected' })}\n\n`);
   209→
   210→    // Heartbeat: send comment every 30 seconds to keep connection alive
   211→    const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
   212→        if (!res.writableEnded) {
   213→            res.write(': heartbeat\n\n');
   214→        } else {
   215→            clearInterval(heartbeat);
   216→        }
   217→    }, 30000);
   218→
   219→    // Clean up on client disconnect
   220→    req.on('close', () => {
   221→        clearInterval(heartbeat);
   222→        sseService.removeClient(channelKey, res);
   223→    });
   224→});
   225→```
   226→
   227→**Critical requirements:**
   228→- The SSE endpoint MUST use `authenticateToken` middleware to validate JWT before establishing the stream
   229→- Channel key MUST be `'admin'` for admin/staff roles (broadcast to all admins) and `userId` for regular users (per-user)
   230→- Heartbeat MUST be a comment line (`: heartbeat`) not a named event, sent every 30000ms
   231→- Cleanup MUST clear the heartbeat interval and call `sseService.removeClient` on `req.on('close')`
   232→</action>
   233→
   234→<acceptance_criteria>
   235→- `backend/index.js` contains `import sseService from './services/sseService.js'`
   236→- `backend/index.js` contains `app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken,`
   237→- SSE handler sets `Content-Type: text/event-stream` and `Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate`
   238→- SSE handler has `res.flushHeaders()` call after setting headers
   239→- SSE handler registers client with `sseService.addClient(channelKey, res)`
   240→- SSE handler sends heartbeat via `setInterval(..., 30000)` with comment line `: heartbeat\n\n`
   241→- SSE handler has `req.on('close', ...)` that clears heartbeat and calls `sseService.removeClient`
   242→- Channel key is `'admin'` for `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'`, otherwise `req.user.id`
   243→</acceptance_criteria>
   244→
   245→<done>
   246→SSE endpoint exists at GET /api/sse/events, validates JWT, sends 30s heartbeat comments, registers client in sseService
   247→</done>

   315→## Plan 02: NotificationBell UI (Context + Component + Integration)
   316→
   317→**Type:** execute | **Wave:** 2 | **Autonomous:** false (has checkpoint)
   318→
   319→### Objective

   322→
   323→### Context
   324→
   325→**Files to read before implementing:**
   326→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand provider structure, exported `useUser` hook, `user.id`, `user.role`, `token` values
   327→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/ThanhHeader.jsx` -- find the right section to insert NotificationBell (right section near ThemeToggle around line 237)
   328→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx` -- see provider nesting order (line 191: UserContextProvider wraps everything)
   329→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- API_BASE_URL is `http://localhost:3001/api`, full SSE URL will be `http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events`
   330→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- already has `notifications` state, `fetchNotifications`, and a bell button using `FaBell` icon (line 16, 35, 65-83). The bell is currently only in AdminLayout, not in the public ThanhHeader.
   331→
   332→**Important:** RT-02 says "Admin sees notification bell icon in header" -- the admin uses the admin dashboard (via AdminLayout), NOT the public ThanhHeader. So NotificationBell should be integrated into `AdminLayout.jsx`, not `ThanhHeader.jsx`. The AdminLayout already has a bell button structure (FaBell + notifications dropdown) -- we need to replace the static polling with live SSE-driven updates.

   335→
   336→### Task 1: Create NotificationContext
   337→
   338→<read_first>
   339→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand `useUser()` return value: `{ user, role, token, isDemoMode, ... }`
   340→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- `API_CONFIG.BASE_URL` is `http://localhost:3001` (dev) or `import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL`
   341→</read_first>
   342→
   343→<action>
   344→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   345→
   346→```javascript
   347→// src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx
   348→import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
   349→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   350→import { toast } from 'sonner';
   351→
   352→const NotificationContext = createContext(null);
   353→
   354→export const useNotifications = () => {
   355→    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
   356→    if (!context) {
   357→        throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
   358→    }
   359→    return context;
   360→};
   361→
   362→export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
   363→    const { user, role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
   364→    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
   365→    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
   366→    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   367→    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   368→
   369→    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
   370→    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
   371→    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
   372→    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);
   373→
   374→    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';
   375→
   376→    // Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s (max 30s cap)
   377→    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((retryCount) => {
   378→        const baseDelay = 1000;
   379→        const delay = Math.min(baseDelay * Math.pow(2, retryCount), 30000);
   380→        return delay;
   381→    }, []);
   382→
   383→    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
   384→        // Skip SSE in demo mode or when not authenticated
   385→        if (isDemoMode || !token || !user?.id || !isAdminOrStaff) {
   386→            return;
   387→        }
   388→
   389→        // Close existing connection if any
   390→        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   391→            eventSourceRef.current.close();
   392→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
   393→        }
   394→
   395→        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
   396→        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;
   397→
   398→        try {
   399→            const eventSource = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
   400→            eventSourceRef.current = eventSource;
   401→
   402→            eventSource.onopen = () => {
   403→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   404→                setIsConnected(true);
   405→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   406→                retryCountRef.current = 0;
   407→                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
   408→            };
   409→
   410→            // Handle new_application event (admin)
   411→            eventSource.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
   412→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   413→                try {
   414→                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   415→                    const notification = {
   416→                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
   417→                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
   418→                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
   419→                        type: 'new_application',
   420→                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
   421→                        unread: true,
   422→                        applicationId: data.id,
   423→                    };
   424→                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
   425→                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
   426→                    // Show toast notification
   427→                    toast.success(notification.title, {
   428→                        description: notification.message,
   429→                        duration: 5000,
   430→                    });
   431→                } catch (err) {
   432→                    console.error('[SSE] Failed to parse new_application event:', err);
   433→                }
   434→            });
   435→
   436→            // Handle connected event
   437→            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {
   438→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   439→                console.log('[SSE] Received connected event:', event.data);
   440→            });
   441→
   442→            eventSource.onerror = () => {
   443→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   444→                setIsConnected(false);
   445→                eventSource.close();
   446→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   447→
   448→                // Exponential backoff reconnection
   449→                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
   450→                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
   451→                    setIsReconnecting(true);
   452→                    console.log(`[SSE] Reconnecting in ${delay}ms (attempt ${retryCountRef.current + 1})`);
   453→                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
   454→                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
   455→                } else {
   456→                    console.error('[SSE] Max reconnection attempts reached');
   457→                    setIsReconnecting(false);
   458→                }
   459→            };
   460→        } catch (err) {
   461→            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
   462→        }
   463→    }, [token, user?.id, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);
   464→
   465→    // Connect SSE when user changes
   466→    useEffect(() => {
   467→        isMountedRef.current = true;
   468→
   469→        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
   470→            // Small delay to ensure UserContext is fully loaded
   471→            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
   472→            return () => {
   473→                isMountedRef.current = false;
   474→                clearTimeout(timer);
   475→                if (retryTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
   476→                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   477→                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
   478→                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
   479→                }
   480→                setIsConnected(false);
   481→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   482→            };
   483→        } else {
   484→            // Clean up when logged out or not admin
   485→            if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   486→                eventSourceRef.current.close();
   487→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   488→            }
   489→            setIsConnected(false);
   490→            setIsReconnecting(false);
   491→            setNotifications([]);
   492→            setUnreadCount(0);
   493→        }
   494→    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);
   495→
   496→    // Mark notification as read
   497→    const markAsRead = useCallback((notificationId) => {
   498→        setNotifications(prev =>
   499→            prev.map(n => n.id === notificationId ? { ...n, unread: false } : n)
   500→        );
   501→        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
   502→    }, []);
   503→
   504→    // Mark all as read
   505→    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
   506→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
   507→        setUnreadCount(0);
   508→    }, []);
   509→
   510→    // Clear all notifications
   511→    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
   512→        setNotifications([]);
   513→        setUnreadCount(0);
   514→    }, []);
   515→
   516→    const value = {
   517→        notifications,
   518→        unreadCount,
   519→        isConnected,
   520→        isReconnecting,
   521→        markAsRead,
   522→        markAllAsRead,
   523→        clearNotifications,
   524→    };
   525→
   526→    return (
   527→        <NotificationContext.Provider value={value}>
   528→            {children}
   529→        </NotificationContext.Provider>
   530→    );
   531→}
   532→```
   533→
   534→**Key design decisions:**
   535→- SSE connects only for admin/staff roles, not for regular users
   536→- Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, max 30s, up to 10 attempts
   537→- Max 50 notifications stored in state (oldest dropped)
   538→- Shows sonner toast on new application event
   539→- Cleanup on unmount: closes EventSource, clears timeout, sets `isMountedRef` flag
   540→- Demo mode skips SSE entirely
   541→</action>
   542→
   543→<acceptance_criteria>
   544→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` exists
   545→- File exports `NotificationProvider` component and `useNotifications()` hook
   546→- Context has state: `notifications`, `unreadCount`, `isConnected`, `isReconnecting`
   547→- Context has methods: `markAsRead`, `markAllAsRead`, `clearNotifications`
   548→- SSE connects only when `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'` AND `!isDemoMode` AND `token` exists
   549→- SSE uses `EventSource` with exponential backoff reconnection (max 10 attempts, cap 30s)
   550→- SSE handler listens for `new_application` event and shows toast via sonner
   551→- All cleanup (EventSource close, timeout clear, `isMountedRef`) happens in useEffect return
   552→</acceptance_criteria>
   553→
   554→<done>
   555→NotificationContext manages SSE connection lifecycle with exponential backoff, stores notifications, tracks unread count
   556→</done>
   557→
   558→---
   559→
   560→### Task 2: Create NotificationBell Component
   561→
   562→<read_first>
   563→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` (just created above)
   564→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- see existing notification dropdown structure around lines 35, 65-120, and bell button structure to understand styling patterns
   565→</read_first>
   566→
   567→<action>
   568→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   569→
   570→```javascript
   571→// src/components/NotificationBell.jsx
   572→import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
   573→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
   574→import { FaBell, FaFileAlt, FaCheck, FaTrash, FaCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
   575→import { useNotifications } from '../contexts/NotificationContext';
   576→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   577→
   578→const NotificationBell = () => {
   579→    const { notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications } = useNotifications();
   580→    const { isDemoMode } = useUser();
   581→    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
   582→    const dropdownRef = useRef();
   583→
   584→    // Close dropdown on outside click
   585→    useEffect(() => {
   586→        const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
   587→            if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
   588→                setIsOpen(false);
   589→            }
   590→        };
   591→        document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   592→        return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   593→    }, []);
   594→
   595→    const getNotificationIcon = (type) => {
   596→        switch (type) {
   597→            case 'new_application':
   598→                return <FaFileAlt className="text-blue-500" />;
   599→            default:
   600→                return <FaBell className="text-gray-500" />;
   601→        }
   602→    };
   603→
   604→    const formatTimestamp = (timestamp) => {
   605→        if (!timestamp) return '';
   606→        const date = new Date(timestamp);
   607→        const now = new Date();
   608→        const diffMs = now - date;
   609→        const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
   610→        const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
   611→        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
   612→
   613→        if (diffMins < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
   614→        if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins} phút trước`;
   615→        if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours} giờ trước`;
   616→        if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays} ngày trước`;
   617→        return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN');
   618→    };
   619→
   620→    const connectionStatusColor = isConnected ? 'bg-green-500' : isReconnecting ? 'bg-yellow-500' : 'bg-red-500';
   621→    const connectionStatusText = isConnected ? 'Đã kết nối' : isReconnecting ? 'Đang kết nối...' : 'Mất kết nối';
   622→
   623→    return (
   624→        <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRef}>
   625→            {/* Bell Button */}
   626→            <motion.button
   627→                onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
   628→                className={`relative p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all duration-200 ${
   629→                    isOpen ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800' : ''
   630→                }`}
   631→                whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   632→                whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   633→                aria-label="Thông báo"
   634→            >
   635→                <FaBell className="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-lg" />
   636→                {/* Unread Badge */}
   637→                {unreadCount > 0 && (
   638→                    <motion.span
   639→                        initial={{ scale: 0 }}
   640→                        animate={{ scale: 1 }}
   641→                        className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-full min-w-[18px] h-[18px] flex items-center justify-center px-1"
   642→                    >
   643→                        {unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : unreadCount}
   644→                    </motion.span>
   645→                )}
   646→                {/* Connection Status Dot */}
   647→                {!isDemoMode && (
   648→                    <span
   649→                        className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-2 h-2 ${connectionStatusColor} rounded-full border border-white dark:border-gray-900`}
   650→                        title={connectionStatusText}
   651→                    />
   652→                )}
   653→            </motion.button>
   654→
   655→            {/* Dropdown Panel */}
   656→            <AnimatePresence>
   657→                {isOpen && (
   658→                    <motion.div
   659→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   660→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
   661→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   662→                        transition={{ duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' }}
   663→                        className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 overflow-hidden z-50"
   664→                    >
   665→                        {/* Header */}
   666→                        <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-between">
   667→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   668→                                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">Thông báo</h3>
   669→                                {!isDemoMode && (
   670→                                    <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${connectionStatusColor}`} />
   671→                                )}
   672→                            </div>
   673→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   674→                                {notifications.length > 0 && (
   675→                                    <>
   676→                                        <button
   677→                                            onClick={markAllAsRead}
   678→                                            className="text-xs text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-800 dark:hover:text-blue-300 font-medium"
   679→                                            title="Đánh dấu đã đọc"
   680→                                        >
   681→                                            Đọc hết
   682→                                        </button>
   683→                                        <button
   684→                                            onClick={clearNotifications}
   685→                                            className="text-xs text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:text-red-800 dark:hover:text-red-300 font-medium"
   686→                                            title="Xóa tất cả"
   687→                                        >
   688→                                            Xóa
   689→                                        </button>
   690→                                    </>
   691→                                )}
   692→                            </div>
   693→                        </div>
   694→
   695→                        {/* Notification List */}
   696→                        <div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
   697→                            {notifications.length === 0 ? (
   698→                                <div className="py-12 text-center">
   699→                                    <FaBell className="mx-auto text-gray-300 dark:text-gray-600 text-3xl mb-3" />
   700→                                    <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-sm">Chưa có thông báo nào</p>
   701→                                    <p className="text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">
   702→                                        Thông báo sẽ xuất hiện khi có hồ sơ mới
   703→                                    </p>
   704→                                </div>
   705→                            ) : (
   706→                                notifications.map((notification) => (
   707→                                    <div
   708→                                        key={notification.id}
   709→                                        className={`px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700 last:border-0 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
   710→                                            notification.unread ? 'bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/10' : ''
   711→                                        }`}
   712→                                        onClick={() => notification.unread && markAsRead(notification.id)}
   713→                                    >
   714→                                        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   715→                                            <div className="mt-0.5">
   716→                                                {getNotificationIcon(notification.type)}
   717→                                            </div>
   718→                                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   719→                                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
   720→                                                    <p className={`text-sm font-semibold truncate ${
   721→                                                        notification.unread
   722→                                                            ? 'text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100'
   723→                                                            : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300'
   724→                                                    }`}>
   725→                                                        {notification.title}
   726→                                                    </p>
   727→                                                    {notification.unread && (
   728→                                                        <FaCircle className="text-blue-500 text-[6px] flex-shrink-0" />
   729→                                                    )}
   730→                                                </div>
   731→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-0.5 line-clamp-2">
   732→                                                    {notification.message}
   733→                                                </p>
   734→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 mt-1">
   735→                                                    {formatTimestamp(notification.timestamp)}
   736→                                                </p>
   737→                                            </div>
   738→                                        </div>
   739→                                    </div>
   740→                                ))
   741→                            )}
   742→                        </div>
   743→
   744→                        {/* Footer */}
   745→                        {notifications.length > 0 && (
   746→                            <div className="px-4 py-2 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900/50">
   747→                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-center">
   748→                                    {notifications.length} thông báo
   749→                                    {!isDemoMode && (
   750→                                        <span className="ml-1">
   751→                                            | {connectionStatusText}
   752→                                        </span>
   753→                                    )}
   754→                                </p>
   755→                            </div>
   756→                        )}
   757→                    </motion.div>
   758→                )}
   759→            </AnimatePresence>
   760→        </div>
   761→    );
   762→};
   763→
   764→export default NotificationBell;
   765→```
   766→
   767→**Key design decisions:**
   768→- Bell icon with unread count badge (red, top-right corner)
   769→- Connection status dot (green=connected, yellow=reconnecting, red=disconnected)
   770→- Dropdown with notification list: icon, title, message, timestamp
   771→- "Đọc hết" and "Xóa" action buttons in header
   772→- Empty state when no notifications
   773→- Click notification to mark as read
   774→- Footer shows total count and connection status
   775→- Demo mode hides connection status dot
   776→</action>
   777→

   803→<action>
   804→**Step A: Add NotificationProvider to App.jsx**
   805→
   806→Modify `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx`:
   807→
   808→1. Add import after the existing imports (around line 10):
   809→```javascript
   810→import { NotificationProvider } from './contexts/NotificationContext';
   811→```
   812→
   813→2. Wrap the children of `UserContextProvider` with `NotificationProvider`. The current structure is:
   814→```jsx
   815→<UserContextProvider>
   816→  <BrowserRouter>
   817→    ...
   818→  </BrowserRouter>
   819→</UserContextProvider>
   820→```
   821→
   822→Change it to:
   823→```jsx
   824→<UserContextProvider>
   825→  <NotificationProvider>
   826→    <BrowserRouter>
   827→      ...
   828→    </BrowserRouter>
   829→  </NotificationProvider>
   830→</UserContextProvider>

    51→---
    52→
    53→# Phase 8: Real-time + Admin Notifications
    54→
    55→## Plan 01: SSE Backend (Service + Endpoint + Broadcast Triggers)
    56→
    57→**Type:** execute | **Wave:** 1 | **Autonomous:** true
    58→
    59→### Objective
    60→
    61→Build the Express SSE infrastructure: client registry service, SSE endpoint at `GET /api/sse/events` with JWT validation and 30s heartbeat, and broadcast triggers on new application submission.
    62→
    63→### Context
    64→
    65→**Files to read before implementing:**
    66→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js` -- locate `authenticateToken` import (line 22), application POST route (line 607), existing CORS config (lines 58-64), Express `app` setup (line 25), and `pool` import (line 6)
    67→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/middleware/auth.js` -- understand `authenticateToken` signature: sets `req.user` from decoded JWT payload containing `{id, username, role}`
    68→
    69→**Key interfaces:**
    70→- `authenticateToken` middleware from `./middleware/auth.js` -- validates `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
    71→- `pool` from `./config/database.js` -- MySQL connection pool (used for `await pool.execute()`)
    72→- Express `app` instance from `index.js`
    73→
    74→**Backend route prefix:** The auth-prefixed routes (line ~80 of index.js) use a variable prefix. The application POST is at `${authPrefix}/apply`.
    75→
    76→---
    77→
    78→### Task 1: Create SSE Service
    79→
    80→<read_first>
    81→- Create: `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` (new file -- no read needed)
    82→</read_first>
    83→
    84→<action>
    85→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` with this exact implementation:
    86→
    87→```javascript
    88→// backend/services/sseService.js
    89→class SSEService {
    90→    constructor() {
    91→        // Map of channelKey -> Set of Express response objects
    92→        // channelKey is either 'admin' (all admins) or a userId string (per-user)
    93→        this.clients = new Map();
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    // Add a client response object to a channel
    97→    addClient(channelKey, res) {
    98→        if (!this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
    99→            this.clients.set(channelKey, new Set());
   100→        }
   101→        this.clients.get(channelKey).add(res);
   102→        console.log(`[SSE] Client connected: ${channelKey} (total: ${this.clients.get(channelKey).size})`);
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    // Remove a client response object from a channel
   106→    removeClient(channelKey, res) {
   107→        if (this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
   108→            this.clients.get(channelKey).delete(res);
   109→            if (this.clients.get(channelKey).size === 0) {
   110→                this.clients.delete(channelKey);
   111→            }
   112→        }
   113→        console.log(`[SSE] Client disconnected: ${channelKey}`);
   114→    }
   115→
   116→    // Send event to all clients in a specific channel
   117→    broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
   118→        const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
   119→        if (!clientSet || clientSet.size === 0) return;
   120→
   121→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
   122→        for (const res of clientSet) {
   123→            if (!res.writableEnded) {
   124→                res.write(message);
   125→            }
   126→        }
   127→    }
   128→
   129→    // Send event to ALL connected clients (all channels)
   130→    broadcastAll(eventName, data) {
   131→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
   132→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
   133→            for (const res of clientSet) {
   134→                if (!res.writableEnded) {
   135→                    res.write(message);
   136→                }
   137→            }
   138→        }
   139→    }
   140→
   141→    // Get count of connected clients for monitoring
   142→    getConnectionCount(channelKey) {
   143→        return this.clients.has(channelKey) ? this.clients.get(channelKey).size : 0;
   144→    }
   145→
   146→    getTotalConnections() {
   147→        let total = 0;
   148→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
   149→            total += clientSet.size;
   150→        }
   151→        return total;
   152→    }
   153→}
   154→
   155→export default new SSEService();
   156→```
   157→
   158→**Important:** Use `export default new SSEService()` (singleton pattern) so the same registry is shared across all requests.
   159→</action>
   160→
   161→<acceptance_criteria>
   162→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` exists and contains `export default new SSEService()`
   163→- File contains `addClient`, `removeClient`, `broadcast`, `broadcastAll` methods

   165→</acceptance_criteria>

   169→</done>
   170→
   171→---
   172→
   173→### Task 2: Add SSE Endpoint to Express
   174→
   175→<read_first>
   176→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js` (lines 1-100 for imports, line ~22 for authenticateToken import, lines 58-64 for CORS config, line 25 for `app` instance, line 6 for `pool` import)
   177→</read_first>
   178→
   179→<action>
   180→Add the following to `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js`:
   181→
   182→**1. Add the import** at the top of the file (after the existing imports, around line 23):
   183→```javascript
   184→import sseService from './services/sseService.js';
   185→```
   186→
   187→**2. Add the SSE endpoint** AFTER the CORS config (after line 64) and BEFORE the body parsing middleware (before line 67). Place it right after the `app.use(cors(...))` block:
   188→
   189→```javascript
   190→// SSE endpoint for real-time notifications
   191→app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken, (req, res) => {
   192→    // Set SSE headers
   193→    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
   194→    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
   195→    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
   196→    res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no'); // Disable nginx buffering
   197→    res.flushHeaders();
   198→
   199→    // Determine channel: 'admin' for admin/staff roles, userId for others
   200→    const userId = req.user.id;
   201→    const role = req.user.role;
   202→    const channelKey = (role === 'admin' || role === 'staff') ? 'admin' : userId;
   203→
   204→    // Register client
   205→    sseService.addClient(channelKey, res);
   206→
   207→    // Send initial connection confirmation
   208→    res.write(`event: connected\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({ channel: channelKey, message: 'SSE connected' })}\n\n`);
   209→
   210→    // Heartbeat: send comment every 30 seconds to keep connection alive
   211→    const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
   212→        if (!res.writableEnded) {
   213→            res.write(': heartbeat\n\n');
   214→        } else {
   215→            clearInterval(heartbeat);
   216→        }
   217→    }, 30000);
   218→
   219→    // Clean up on client disconnect
   220→    req.on('close', () => {
   221→        clearInterval(heartbeat);
   222→        sseService.removeClient(channelKey, res);
   223→    });
   224→});
   225→```
   226→
   227→**Critical requirements:**
   228→- The SSE endpoint MUST use `authenticateToken` middleware to validate JWT before establishing the stream
   229→- Channel key MUST be `'admin'` for admin/staff roles (broadcast to all admins) and `userId` for regular users (per-user)
   230→- Heartbeat MUST be a comment line (`: heartbeat`) not a named event, sent every 30000ms
   231→- Cleanup MUST clear the heartbeat interval and call `sseService.removeClient` on `req.on('close')`
   232→</action>
   233→
   234→<acceptance_criteria>
   235→- `backend/index.js` contains `import sseService from './services/sseService.js'`
   236→- `backend/index.js` contains `app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken,`
   237→- SSE handler sets `Content-Type: text/event-stream` and `Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate`
   238→- SSE handler has `res.flushHeaders()` call after setting headers
   239→- SSE handler registers client with `sseService.addClient(channelKey, res)`
   240→- SSE handler sends heartbeat via `setInterval(..., 30000)` with comment line `: heartbeat\n\n`
   241→- SSE handler has `req.on('close', ...)` that clears heartbeat and calls `sseService.removeClient`
   242→- Channel key is `'admin'` for `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'`, otherwise `req.user.id`
   243→</acceptance_criteria>
   244→
   245→<done>
   246→SSE endpoint exists at GET /api/sse/events, validates JWT, sends 30s heartbeat comments, registers client in sseService
   247→</done>
   248→
   249→---

   304→3. Test SSE connection with curl:

   314→
   315→## Plan 02: NotificationBell UI (Context + Component + Integration)
   316→
   317→**Type:** execute | **Wave:** 2 | **Autonomous:** false (has checkpoint)
   318→
   319→### Objective
   320→
   321→Build the frontend NotificationContext that manages the SSE connection with exponential backoff reconnection, and the NotificationBell component that shows a badge counter and dropdown list of notifications. Integrate into the admin header.
   322→
   323→### Context
   324→
   325→**Files to read before implementing:**
   326→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand provider structure, exported `useUser` hook, `user.id`, `user.role`, `token` values
   327→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/ThanhHeader.jsx` -- find the right section to insert NotificationBell (right section near ThemeToggle around line 237)
   328→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx` -- see provider nesting order (line 191: UserContextProvider wraps everything)
   329→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- API_BASE_URL is `http://localhost:3001/api`, full SSE URL will be `http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events`
   330→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- already has `notifications` state, `fetchNotifications`, and a bell button using `FaBell` icon (line 16, 35, 65-83). The bell is currently only in AdminLayout, not in the public ThanhHeader.
   331→
   332→**Important:** RT-02 says "Admin sees notification bell icon in header" -- the admin uses the admin dashboard (via AdminLayout), NOT the public ThanhHeader. So NotificationBell should be integrated into `AdminLayout.jsx`, not `ThanhHeader.jsx`. The AdminLayout already has a bell button structure (FaBell + notifications dropdown) -- we need to replace the static polling with live SSE-driven updates.
   333→
   334→---
   335→
   336→### Task 1: Create NotificationContext
   337→
   338→<read_first>
   339→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand `useUser()` return value: `{ user, role, token, isDemoMode, ... }`
   340→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- `API_CONFIG.BASE_URL` is `http://localhost:3001` (dev) or `import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL`
   341→</read_first>
   342→
   343→<action>
   344→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   345→
   346→```javascript
   347→// src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx
   348→import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
   349→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   350→import { toast } from 'sonner';
   351→
   352→const NotificationContext = createContext(null);
   353→
   354→export const useNotifications = () => {
   355→    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
   356→    if (!context) {
   357→        throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
   358→    }
   359→    return context;
   360→};
   361→
   362→export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
   363→    const { user, role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
   364→    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
   365→    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
   366→    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   367→    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   368→
   369→    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
   370→    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
   371→    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
   372→    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);
   373→
   374→    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';
   375→
   376→    // Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s (max 30s cap)
   377→    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((retryCount) => {
   378→        const baseDelay = 1000;
   379→        const delay = Math.min(baseDelay * Math.pow(2, retryCount), 30000);
   380→        return delay;
   381→    }, []);
   382→
   383→    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
   384→        // Skip SSE in demo mode or when not authenticated
   385→        if (isDemoMode || !token || !user?.id || !isAdminOrStaff) {
   386→            return;
   387→        }
   388→
   389→        // Close existing connection if any
   390→        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   391→            eventSourceRef.current.close();
   392→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
   393→        }
   394→
   395→        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
   396→        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;
   397→
   398→        try {
   399→            const eventSource = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
   400→            eventSourceRef.current = eventSource;
   401→
   402→            eventSource.onopen = () => {
   403→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   404→                setIsConnected(true);
   405→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   406→                retryCountRef.current = 0;
   407→                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
   408→            };
   409→
   410→            // Handle new_application event (admin)
   411→            eventSource.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
   412→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   413→                try {
   414→                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   415→                    const notification = {
   416→                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
   417→                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
   418→                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
   419→                        type: 'new_application',
   420→                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
   421→                        unread: true,
   422→                        applicationId: data.id,
   423→                    };
   424→                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
   425→                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
   426→                    // Show toast notification
   427→                    toast.success(notification.title, {
   428→                        description: notification.message,
   429→                        duration: 5000,
   430→                    });
   431→                } catch (err) {
   432→                    console.error('[SSE] Failed to parse new_application event:', err);
   433→                }
   434→            });
   435→
   436→            // Handle connected event
   437→            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {
   438→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   439→                console.log('[SSE] Received connected event:', event.data);
   440→            });
   441→
   442→            eventSource.onerror = () => {
   443→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   444→                setIsConnected(false);
   445→                eventSource.close();
   446→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   447→
   448→                // Exponential backoff reconnection
   449→                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
   450→                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
   451→                    setIsReconnecting(true);
   452→                    console.log(`[SSE] Reconnecting in ${delay}ms (attempt ${retryCountRef.current + 1})`);
   453→                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
   454→                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
   455→                } else {
   456→                    console.error('[SSE] Max reconnection attempts reached');
   457→                    setIsReconnecting(false);
   458→                }
   459→            };
   460→        } catch (err) {
   461→            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
   462→        }
   463→    }, [token, user?.id, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);
   464→
   465→    // Connect SSE when user changes
   466→    useEffect(() => {
   467→        isMountedRef.current = true;
   468→
   469→        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
   470→            // Small delay to ensure UserContext is fully loaded
   471→            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
   472→            return () => {
   473→                isMountedRef.current = false;
   474→                clearTimeout(timer);
   475→                if (retryTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
   476→                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   477→                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
   478→                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
   479→                }
   480→                setIsConnected(false);
   481→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   482→            };
   483→        } else {
   484→            // Clean up when logged out or not admin
   485→            if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   486→                eventSourceRef.current.close();
   487→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   488→            }
   489→            setIsConnected(false);
   490→            setIsReconnecting(false);
   491→            setNotifications([]);
   492→            setUnreadCount(0);
   493→        }
   494→    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);
   495→
   496→    // Mark notification as read
   497→    const markAsRead = useCallback((notificationId) => {
   498→        setNotifications(prev =>
   499→            prev.map(n => n.id === notificationId ? { ...n, unread: false } : n)
   500→        );
   501→        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
   502→    }, []);
   503→
   504→    // Mark all as read
   505→    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
   506→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
   507→        setUnreadCount(0);
   508→    }, []);
   509→
   510→    // Clear all notifications
   511→    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
   512→        setNotifications([]);
   513→        setUnreadCount(0);
   514→    }, []);
   515→
   516→    const value = {
   517→        notifications,
   518→        unreadCount,
   519→        isConnected,
   520→        isReconnecting,
   521→        markAsRead,
   522→        markAllAsRead,
   523→        clearNotifications,
   524→    };
   525→
   526→    return (
   527→        <NotificationContext.Provider value={value}>
   528→            {children}
   529→        </NotificationContext.Provider>
   530→    );
   531→}
   532→```
   533→
   534→**Key design decisions:**
   535→- SSE connects only for admin/staff roles, not for regular users
   536→- Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, max 30s, up to 10 attempts
   537→- Max 50 notifications stored in state (oldest dropped)
   538→- Shows sonner toast on new application event
   539→- Cleanup on unmount: closes EventSource, clears timeout, sets `isMountedRef` flag
   540→- Demo mode skips SSE entirely
   541→</action>
   542→
   543→<acceptance_criteria>
   544→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` exists
   545→- File exports `NotificationProvider` component and `useNotifications()` hook
   546→- Context has state: `notifications`, `unreadCount`, `isConnected`, `isReconnecting`
   547→- Context has methods: `markAsRead`, `markAllAsRead`, `clearNotifications`
   548→- SSE connects only when `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'` AND `!isDemoMode` AND `token` exists
   549→- SSE uses `EventSource` with exponential backoff reconnection (max 10 attempts, cap 30s)
   550→- SSE handler listens for `new_application` event and shows toast via sonner
   551→- All cleanup (EventSource close, timeout clear, `isMountedRef`) happens in useEffect return
   552→</acceptance_criteria>
   553→
   554→<done>
   555→NotificationContext manages SSE connection lifecycle with exponential backoff, stores notifications, tracks unread count
   556→</done>
   557→
   558→---
   559→
   560→### Task 2: Create NotificationBell Component
   561→
   562→<read_first>
   563→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` (just created above)
   564→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- see existing notification dropdown structure around lines 35, 65-120, and bell button structure to understand styling patterns
   565→</read_first>
   566→
   567→<action>
   568→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   569→
   570→```javascript
   571→// src/components/NotificationBell.jsx
   572→import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
   573→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
   574→import { FaBell, FaFileAlt, FaCheck, FaTrash, FaCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
   575→import { useNotifications } from '../contexts/NotificationContext';
   576→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   577→
   578→const NotificationBell = () => {
   579→    const { notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications } = useNotifications();
   580→    const { isDemoMode } = useUser();
   581→    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
   582→    const dropdownRef = useRef();
   583→
   584→    // Close dropdown on outside click
   585→    useEffect(() => {
   586→        const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
   587→            if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
   588→                setIsOpen(false);
   589→            }
   590→        };
   591→        document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   592→        return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   593→    }, []);
   594→
   595→    const getNotificationIcon = (type) => {
   596→        switch (type) {
   597→            case 'new_application':
   598→                return <FaFileAlt className="text-blue-500" />;
   599→            default:
   600→                return <FaBell className="text-gray-500" />;
   601→        }
   602→    };
   603→
   604→    const formatTimestamp = (timestamp) => {
   605→        if (!timestamp) return '';
   606→        const date = new Date(timestamp);
   607→        const now = new Date();
   608→        const diffMs = now - date;
   609→        const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
   610→        const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
   611→        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
   612→
   613→        if (diffMins < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
   614→        if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins} phút trước`;
   615→        if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours} giờ trước`;
   616→        if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays} ngày trước`;
   617→        return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN');
   618→    };
   619→
   620→    const connectionStatusColor = isConnected ? 'bg-green-500' : isReconnecting ? 'bg-yellow-500' : 'bg-red-500';
   621→    const connectionStatusText = isConnected ? 'Đã kết nối' : isReconnecting ? 'Đang kết nối...' : 'Mất kết nối';
   622→
   623→    return (
   624→        <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRef}>
   625→            {/* Bell Button */}
   626→            <motion.button
   627→                onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
   628→                className={`relative p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all duration-200 ${
   629→                    isOpen ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800' : ''
   630→                }`}
   631→                whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   632→                whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   633→                aria-label="Thông báo"
   634→            >
   635→                <FaBell className="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-lg" />
   636→                {/* Unread Badge */}
   637→                {unreadCount > 0 && (
   638→                    <motion.span
   639→                        initial={{ scale: 0 }}
   640→                        animate={{ scale: 1 }}
   641→                        className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-full min-w-[18px] h-[18px] flex items-center justify-center px-1"
   642→                    >
   643→                        {unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : unreadCount}
   644→                    </motion.span>
   645→                )}
   646→                {/* Connection Status Dot */}
   647→                {!isDemoMode && (
   648→                    <span
   649→                        className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-2 h-2 ${connectionStatusColor} rounded-full border border-white dark:border-gray-900`}
   650→                        title={connectionStatusText}
   651→                    />
   652→                )}
   653→            </motion.button>
   654→
   655→            {/* Dropdown Panel */}
   656→            <AnimatePresence>
   657→                {isOpen && (
   658→                    <motion.div
   659→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   660→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
   661→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   662→                        transition={{ duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' }}
   663→                        className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 overflow-hidden z-50"
   664→                    >
   665→                        {/* Header */}
   666→                        <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-between">
   667→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   668→                                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">Thông báo</h3>
   669→                                {!isDemoMode && (
   670→                                    <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${connectionStatusColor}`} />
   671→                                )}
   672→                            </div>
   673→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   674→                                {notifications.length > 0 && (
   675→                                    <>
   676→                                        <button
   677→                                            onClick={markAllAsRead}
   678→                                            className="text-xs text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-800 dark:hover:text-blue-300 font-medium"
   679→                                            title="Đánh dấu đã đọc"
   680→                                        >
   681→                                            Đọc hết
   682→                                        </button>
   683→                                        <button
   684→                                            onClick={clearNotifications}
   685→                                            className="text-xs text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:text-red-800 dark:hover:text-red-300 font-medium"
   686→                                            title="Xóa tất cả"
   687→                                        >
   688→                                            Xóa
   689→                                        </button>
   690→                                    </>
   691→                                )}
   692→                            </div>
   693→                        </div>
   694→
   695→                        {/* Notification List */}
   696→                        <div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
   697→                            {notifications.length === 0 ? (
   698→                                <div className="py-12 text-center">
   699→                                    <FaBell className="mx-auto text-gray-300 dark:text-gray-600 text-3xl mb-3" />
   700→                                    <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-sm">Chưa có thông báo nào</p>
   701→                                    <p className="text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">
   702→                                        Thông báo sẽ xuất hiện khi có hồ sơ mới
   703→                                    </p>
   704→                                </div>
   705→                            ) : (
   706→                                notifications.map((notification) => (
   707→                                    <div
   708→                                        key={notification.id}
   709→                                        className={`px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700 last:border-0 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
   710→                                            notification.unread ? 'bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/10' : ''
   711→                                        }`}
   712→                                        onClick={() => notification.unread && markAsRead(notification.id)}
   713→                                    >
   714→                                        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   715→                                            <div className="mt-0.5">
   716→                                                {getNotificationIcon(notification.type)}
   717→                                            </div>
   718→                                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   719→                                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
   720→                                                    <p className={`text-sm font-semibold truncate ${
   721→                                                        notification.unread
   722→                                                            ? 'text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100'
   723→                                                            : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300'
   724→                                                    }`}>
   725→                                                        {notification.title}
   726→                                                    </p>
   727→                                                    {notification.unread && (
   728→                                                        <FaCircle className="text-blue-500 text-[6px] flex-shrink-0" />
   729→                                                    )}
   730→                                                </div>
   731→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-0.5 line-clamp-2">
   732→                                                    {notification.message}
   733→                                                </p>
   734→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 mt-1">
   735→                                                    {formatTimestamp(notification.timestamp)}
   736→                                                </p>
   737→                                            </div>
   738→                                        </div>
   739→                                    </div>
   740→                                ))
   741→                            )}
   742→                        </div>
   743→
   744→                        {/* Footer */}
   745→                        {notifications.length > 0 && (
   746→                            <div className="px-4 py-2 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900/50">
   747→                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-center">
   748→                                    {notifications.length} thông báo
   749→                                    {!isDemoMode && (
   750→                                        <span className="ml-1">
   751→                                            | {connectionStatusText}
   752→                                        </span>
   753→                                    )}
   754→                                </p>
   755→                            </div>
   756→                        )}
   757→                    </motion.div>
   758→                )}
   759→            </AnimatePresence>
   760→        </div>
   761→    );
   762→};
   763→
   764→export default NotificationBell;
   765→```
   766→
   767→**Key design decisions:**
   768→- Bell icon with unread count badge (red, top-right corner)
   769→- Connection status dot (green=connected, yellow=reconnecting, red=disconnected)
   770→- Dropdown with notification list: icon, title, message, timestamp
   771→- "Đọc hết" and "Xóa" action buttons in header
   772→- Empty state when no notifications
   773→- Click notification to mark as read
   774→- Footer shows total count and connection status
   775→- Demo mode hides connection status dot
   776→</action>
   777→
   778→<acceptance_criteria>
   779→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` exists
   780→- Bell button renders with `FaBell` icon
   781→- Unread badge shows when `unreadCount > 0`, displays count (99+ max)
   782→- Connection status dot: green when `isConnected`, yellow when `isReconnecting`, red when disconnected
   783→- Dropdown shows notification list with icon, title, message, formatted timestamp
   784→- "Đọc hết" button calls `markAllAsRead`, "Xóa" button calls `clearNotifications`
   785→- Empty state shown when `notifications.length === 0`
   786→- Click on unread notification calls `markAsRead`
   787→- Dropdown closes on outside click (uses ref + mousedown listener)
   788→</acceptance_criteria>
   789→
   790→<done>
   791→NotificationBell component renders bell icon with badge, dropdown panel with notification list, and connection status indicator
   792→</done>
   793→
   794→---
   795→
   796→### Task 3: Integrate NotificationProvider and NotificationBell
   797→
   798→<read_first>
   799→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx` -- see provider nesting (line 191: UserContextProvider is the innermost real provider)
   800→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- see existing bell button, notification refs, and right section of header (around line 237)
   801→</read_first>
   802→
   803→<action>
   804→**Step A: Add NotificationProvider to App.jsx**
   805→
   806→Modify `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx`:
   807→
   808→1. Add import after the existing imports (around line 10):
   809→```javascript
   810→import { NotificationProvider } from './contexts/NotificationContext';
   811→```
   812→
   813→2. Wrap the children of `UserContextProvider` with `NotificationProvider`. The current structure is:
   814→```jsx
   815→<UserContextProvider>
   816→  <BrowserRouter>
   817→    ...
   818→  </BrowserRouter>
   819→</UserContextProvider>
   820→```
   821→
   822→Change it to:
   823→```jsx
   824→<UserContextProvider>
   825→  <NotificationProvider>
   826→    <BrowserRouter>
   827→      ...
   828→    </BrowserRouter>
   829→  </NotificationProvider>
   830→</UserContextProvider>
   831→```
   832→
   833→**Important:** `NotificationProvider` MUST be INSIDE `UserContextProvider` because NotificationContext depends on `useUser()` which comes from UserContext.
   834→
   835→**Step B: Add NotificationBell to AdminLayout.jsx**
   836→
   837→Modify `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx`:
   838→
   839→1. Add import at the top with other imports (after line 29):
   840→```javascript
   841→import NotificationBell from '../../components/NotificationBell';
   842→```
   843→
   844→2. Find the top navbar/header section of AdminLayout (look for the `<header>` element or the section with `FaCog`, `FaBell`, etc. around line 270+). The header has a right section with `FaBell` (existing) and profile dropdown.
   845→
   846→   Replace the existing `FaBell` button with `<NotificationBell />`. The existing bell button in AdminLayout uses a different approach (polling via `fetchNotifications`). We need to keep the NotificationBell component but we can keep the existing notification dropdown for now -- the NotificationContext will provide the SSE-driven notifications while the existing `notifications` state from AdminLayout can coexist as a secondary source or be replaced.
   847→
   848→   **Recommended approach:** Replace the existing bell button + notifications dropdown with `<NotificationBell />` and remove the old `fetchNotifications` useEffect and `notifications` state (since SSE will now drive notifications in real-time).
   849→
   850→   Find the section that renders the bell icon (around line 270-310 in AdminLayout). Look for `FaBell` in the JSX. Replace the notification bell button + dropdown section with:
   851→   ```jsx
   852→   <NotificationBell />
   853→   ```
   854→
   855→   Then remove the `notifications` state (line 45), `notificationsLoading` state (line 46), `fetchNotifications` async function (lines 65-83), and the `useEffect` that calls `fetchNotifications` (should be around line 48+).
   856→
   857→   Keep the existing profile dropdown and other header elements intact.
   858→
   859→   **Alternative (safer):** If the existing AdminLayout notification dropdown has additional functionality that should be preserved, keep both -- add `<NotificationBell />` as an additional button next to the existing bell, and remove just the SSE-replaced notification fetch useEffect. But since RT-02 only requires "notification bell icon with badge counter and dropdown", replacing the existing structure with NotificationBell is cleaner.
   860→</action>
   861→
   862→<acceptance_criteria>
   863→- `App.jsx` contains `import { NotificationProvider } from './contexts/NotificationContext'`
   864→- `App.jsx` has `<NotificationProvider>` wrapping `<BrowserRouter>` inside `<UserContextProvider>`
   865→- `AdminLayout.jsx` contains `import NotificationBell from '../../components/NotificationBell'`
   866→- `AdminLayout.jsx` renders `<NotificationBell />` in the header's right section
   867→- `AdminLayout.jsx` does NOT have `fetchNotifications` or `notifications` state that would conflict with NotificationContext (either removed or left for non-SSE notifications)
   868→</acceptance_criteria>
   869→
   870→<done>
   871→NotificationProvider wraps the app inside UserContextProvider, NotificationBell renders in AdminLayout header for admin users
   872→</done>
   873→
   874→---
   875→
   876→### Task 4: Verification (Human Checkpoint)
   877→
   878→<task type="checkpoint:human-verify">
   879→<what-built>
   880→Complete Phase 8 implementation: SSE endpoint with heartbeat, NotificationContext with exponential backoff, NotificationBell with badge counter and dropdown. The notification bell appears in the admin dashboard header.
   881→</what-built>
   882→
   883→<how-to-verify>
   884→
   885→**Backend (SSE Endpoint):**
   886→1. Start backend: `cd DoAnTuyenSinh/backend && npm start`
   887→2. Login as admin and capture the JWT token
   888→3. Test SSE endpoint:
   889→   ```bash
   890→   curl -N -H "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>" http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events
   891→   ```
   892→   Expected: `event: connected\ndata: {...}\n\n` immediately, then `: heartbeat\n\n` every 30 seconds
   893→4. Check server logs for `[SSE] Client connected: admin`
   894→5. Close the curl connection -- check logs for `[SSE] Client disconnected: admin`
   895→
   896→**Frontend (NotificationBell):**
   897→1. Start frontend: `cd DoAnTuyenSinh && npm run dev`
   898→2. Login as admin
   899→3. Navigate to admin dashboard (`/admin/tong-quan`)
   900→4. Verify: Bell icon visible in admin header (top-right area)
   901→5. Verify: Small colored dot on bell icon (green=connected, check browser console for `[SSE] Connected`)
   902→6. Have another user submit a new application (or trigger via API):
   903→   ```bash
   904→   curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/apply \
   905→     -H "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>" \
   906→     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   907→     -d '{"fullName":"Test User","email":"test@test.com","phone":"0123456789","majorId":1}'
   908→   ```
   909→7. Verify:
   910→   - Bell badge counter increments (red badge with count)
   911→   - Toast notification appears (top-right, blue)
   912→   - Click bell -- dropdown shows notification with title "Hồ sơ mới" and message "Thí sinh Test User vừa nộp hồ sơ"
   913→   - Click notification -- badge count decreases
   914→   - Connection status dot remains green
   915→
   916→**Reconnection Test:**
   917→1. Stop the backend server
   918→2. Wait 5 seconds -- verify connection dot turns yellow (reconnecting) then red (disconnected)
   919→3. Restart the backend server
   920→4. Wait -- verify dot turns green again and SSE reconnects automatically
   921→</how-to-verify>
   922→
   923→<resume-signal>Type "approved" or describe issues
   924→</resume-signal>
   925→</task>
   926→
```

 `./\.planning\ROADMAP.md`

```text
     1→# Roadmap: DoAnTuyenSinh
     2→
     3→## Milestones
     4→
     5→- **M1** - UI/UX Redesign - Phases 1-6 (shipped 2026-03-28)
     6→- **M2** - Advanced Features - Phases 7-9 (in progress)
     7→
     8→## Phases
     9→
    10→- [ ] **Phase 7: PWA Infrastructure** - Service Worker, offline page, install prompt
    11→- [ ] **Phase 8: Real-time + Admin Notifications** - SSE endpoint, NotificationBell
    12→- [ ] **Phase 9: Student Notifications + i18n** - Student SSE, LanguageSwitcher, locale files
    13→
    14→---
    15→
    16→## Phase Details
    17→
    18→### Phase 7: PWA Infrastructure
    19→
    20→**Goal**: App works offline, loads instantly on repeat visits, and can be installed as a standalone app
    21→
    22→**Depends on**: Nothing (M2 first phase)
    23→
    24→**Requirements**: PWA-01, PWA-02, PWA-03
    25→
    26→**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
    27→
    28→1. Returning visitors see cached content served from Service Worker within 200ms
    29→2. When network is disconnected, user sees offline page with message and retry button
    30→3. First-time or engaged user sees install prompt banner ("Cai dat HUTECHS App")
    31→4. Static assets (JS, CSS, images) are cached with content-hashed filenames and cache-first strategy
    32→5. API calls use network-first strategy to prevent stale data
    33→
    34→**Plans**: 3 plans
    35→
    36→Plans:
    37→- [x] 07-01: Install and configure vite-plugin-pwa in vite.config.js with Workbox caching strategies (2026-03-31, commit 3ecd6c0)
    38→- [x] 07-02: Create offline fallback page (public/offline.html) and OfflineBoundary component
    39→- [x] 07-03: Implement deferred install prompt banner with InstallPrompt component and useOffline hook
    40→
    41→### Phase 8: Real-time + Admin Notifications
    42→
    43→**Goal**: Admins receive live notifications when new applications are submitted, with a notification bell in the header
    44→
    45→**Depends on**: Phase 7
    46→
    47→**Requirements**: RT-01, RT-02
    48→
    49→**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
    50→
    51→1. Admin browser maintains SSE connection to Express backend with 30s heartbeat
    52→2. SSE reconnects automatically with exponential backoff if connection drops
    53→3. Admin sees notification bell icon with live unread count badge in header
    54→4. Admin can open notification dropdown to see list of new application alerts
    55→5. SSE broadcasts to all connected admin clients when a new application is submitted
    56→
    57→**Plans**: 3 plans
    58→
    59→Plans:
    60→- [ ] 08-01: Create SSE service (backend/services/sseService.js) with client registry and heartbeat
    61→- [ ] 08-02: Add SSE endpoint (GET /api/sse/events) in Express backend with JWT validation
    62→- [ ] 08-03: Build NotificationBell component with badge counter, NotificationContext, and useSSE hook
    63→
    64→### Phase 9: Student Notifications + i18n
    65→
    66→**Goal**: Students receive real-time in-app notifications when their application status changes, and users can switch between Vietnamese and English
    67→
    68→**Depends on**: Phase 8
    69→
    70→**Requirements**: RT-03, I18N-01, I18N-02, I18N-03
    71→
    72→**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
    73→
    74→1. Authenticated student browser establishes SSE connection tied to their studentId
    75→2. Student receives in-app toast notification when admin updates their application status
    76→3. User can switch language between Vietnamese and English via LanguageSwitcher in header
    77→4. Language preference persists across browser sessions (localStorage)
    78→5. SEO meta tags (title, description) update dynamically based on current language
    79→
    80→**Plans**: 3 plans
    81→
    82→Plans:
    83→- [ ] 09-01: Wire SSE student notifications — trigger broadcast on status update, render in-app toast
    84→- [ ] 09-02: Set up i18n infrastructure with react-i18next, LanguageSwitcher, locale files (VI/EN)
    85→- [ ] 09-03: Add SEO meta tags with react-helmet-async, update per language, wrap common strings
    86→
    87→---
    88→
    89→## Progress
    90→
    91→| Phase | Plans Complete | Status | Completed |
    92→|-------|----------------|--------|-----------|
    93→| 7. PWA Infrastructure | 3/3 | Complete | 2026-03-31 |
    94→| 8. Real-time + Admin | 0/3 | Not started | - |
    95→| 9. Student RT + i18n | 0/3 | Not started | - |
    96→
    97→**Coverage:** 9/9 requirements mapped
    98→
    99→---
   100→
   101→*M2 Roadmap created: 2026-03-31*
   102→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\.planning\REQUIREMENTS.md`

```text
     1→# Requirements: DoAnTuyenSinh - Milestone M2
     2→
     3→**Defined:** 2026-03-30
     4→**Core Value:** Thí sinh có thể hoàn tất toàn bộ quy trình tuyển sinh từ đăng ký đến tra cứu kết quả trên nền tảng web hiện đại, chuyên nghiệp, nhanh chóng.
     5→
     6→## v1 Requirements
     7→
     8→Requirements for M2 Advanced Features. Each maps to roadmap phases.
     9→
    10→### PWA
    11→
    12→- [x] **PWA-01**: Service Worker được đăng ký tự động tại build time qua vite-plugin-pwa, với Workbox caching strategies (cache-first cho static assets, network-first cho API calls)
    13→- [x] **PWA-02**: Khi mất kết nối mạng, user thấy offline page với thông báo và retry button
    14→- [x] **PWA-03**: User được prompt cài đặt ứng dụng ("Cài đặt HUTECHS App") qua install prompt API
    15→- [ ] **PWA-04**: Push notifications qua Firebase Cloud Messaging khi có cập nhật hồ sơ — DEFERRED (cần Firebase project setup)
    16→
    17→### Real-time
    18→
    19→- [ ] **RT-01**: Express backend có SSE endpoint với heartbeat 30s, client reconnection logic với exponential backoff
    20→- [ ] **RT-02**: Admin thấy notification bell icon trong header với badge counter, popup dropdown hiển thị danh sách thông báo mới
    21→- [ ] **RT-03**: Thí sinh nhận thông báo in-app qua SSE khi trạng thái hồ sơ được cập nhật bởi admin
    22→
    23→### i18n
    24→
    25→- [ ] **I18N-01**: react-i18next infrastructure với lazy-loaded locale files, LanguageSwitcher trong header (VI/EN)
    26→- [ ] **I18N-02**: Locale files đầy đủ cho tiếng Việt và tiếng Anh, page-by-page string migration
    27→- [ ] **I18N-03**: SEO meta tags (react-helmet-async) tự động cập nhật theo ngôn ngữ hiện tại
    28→
    29→## Out of Scope
    30→
    31→| Feature | Reason |
    32→|---------|--------|
    33→| FCM push notifications (PWA-04) | Cần Firebase project setup, VAPID key management, backend FCM integration. Deferred đến sau khi có Firebase. |
    34→| RTL language support | Không có yêu cầu cho ngôn ngữ RTL trong scope hiện tại |
    35→| Payment gateway | Không trong scope M2 |
    36→| TypeScript migration | JavaScript đủ cho M2 scope |
    37→
    38→## Traceability
    39→
    40→Which phases cover which requirements. Updated during roadmap creation.
    41→
    42→| Requirement | Phase | Status |
    43→|-------------|-------|--------|
    44→| PWA-01 | Phase 7 | Complete |
    45→| PWA-02 | Phase 7 | Complete |
    46→| PWA-03 | Phase 7 | Complete |
    47→| RT-01 | Phase 8 | Pending |
    48→| RT-02 | Phase 8 | Pending |
    49→| RT-03 | Phase 9 | Pending |
    50→| I18N-01 | Phase 9 | Pending |
    51→| I18N-02 | Phase 9 | Pending |
    52→| I18N-03 | Phase 9 | Pending |
    53→
    54→**Coverage:**
    55→- v1 requirements: 9 total
    56→- Mapped to phases: 9
    57→- Unmapped: 0 ✓
    58→
    59→---
    60→*Requirements defined: 2026-03-30*
    61→*Last updated: 2026-03-31 — Phase 7 (PWA-01, PWA-02, PWA-03) marked complete*
    62→
```
