   334→---
   335→
   336→### Task 1: Create NotificationContext
   337→
   338→<read_first>
   339→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand `useUser()` return value: `{ user, role, token, isDemoMode, ... }`
   340→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- `API_CONFIG.BASE_URL` is `http://localhost:3001` (dev) or `import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL`
   341→</read_first>
   342→
   343→<action>
   344→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   345→
   346→```javascript
   347→// src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx
   348→import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
   349→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   350→import { toast } from 'sonner';
   351→
   352→const NotificationContext = createContext(null);
   353→
   354→export const useNotifications = () => {
   355→    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
   356→    if (!context) {
   357→        throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
   358→    }
   359→    return context;
   360→};
   361→
   362→export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
   363→    const { user, role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
   364→    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
   365→    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
   366→    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   367→    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   368→
   369→    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
   370→    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
   371→    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
   372→    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);
   373→
   374→    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';
   375→
   376→    // Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s (max 30s cap)
   377→    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((retryCount) => {
   378→        const baseDelay = 1000;
   379→        const delay = Math.min(baseDelay * Math.pow(2, retryCount), 30000);
   380→        return delay;
   381→    }, []);
   382→
   383→    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
   384→        // Skip SSE in demo mode or when not authenticated
   385→        if (isDemoMode || !token || !user?.id || !isAdminOrStaff) {
   386→            return;
   387→        }
   388→
   389→        // Close existing connection if any
   390→        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   391→            eventSourceRef.current.close();
   392→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
   393→        }
   394→
   395→        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
   396→        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;
   397→
   398→        try {
   399→            const eventSource = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
   400→            eventSourceRef.current = eventSource;
   401→
   402→            eventSource.onopen = () => {
   403→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   404→                setIsConnected(true);
   405→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   406→                retryCountRef.current = 0;
   407→                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
   408→            };
   409→
   410→            // Handle new_application event (admin)
   411→            eventSource.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
   412→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   413→                try {
   414→                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   415→                    const notification = {
   416→                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
   417→                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
   418→                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
   419→                        type: 'new_application',
   420→                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
   421→                        unread: true,
   422→                        applicationId: data.id,
   423→                    };
   424→                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
   425→                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
   426→                    // Show toast notification
   427→                    toast.success(notification.title, {
   428→                        description: notification.message,
   429→                        duration: 5000,
   430→                    });
   431→                } catch (err) {
   432→                    console.error('[SSE] Failed to parse new_application event:', err);
   433→                }
   434→            });
   435→
   436→            // Handle connected event
   437→            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {
   438→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   439→                console.log('[SSE] Received connected event:', event.data);
   440→            });
   441→
   442→            eventSource.onerror = () => {
   443→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   444→                setIsConnected(false);
   445→                eventSource.close();
   446→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   447→
   448→                // Exponential backoff reconnection
   449→                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
   450→                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
   451→                    setIsReconnecting(true);
   452→                    console.log(`[SSE] Reconnecting in ${delay}ms (attempt ${retryCountRef.current + 1})`);
   453→                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
   454→                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
   455→                } else {
   456→                    console.error('[SSE] Max reconnection attempts reached');
   457→                    setIsReconnecting(false);
   458→                }
   459→            };
   460→        } catch (err) {
   461→            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
   462→        }
   463→    }, [token, user?.id, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);
   464→
   465→    // Connect SSE when user changes
   466→    useEffect(() => {
   467→        isMountedRef.current = true;
   468→
   469→        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
   470→            // Small delay to ensure UserContext is fully loaded
   471→            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
   472→            return () => {
   473→                isMountedRef.current = false;
   474→                clearTimeout(timer);
   475→                if (retryTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
   476→                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   477→                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
   478→                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
   479→                }
   480→                setIsConnected(false);
   481→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   482→            };
   483→        } else {
   484→            // Clean up when logged out or not admin
   485→            if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   486→                eventSourceRef.current.close();
   487→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   488→            }
   489→            setIsConnected(false);
   490→            setIsReconnecting(false);
   491→            setNotifications([]);
   492→            setUnreadCount(0);
   493→        }
   494→    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);
   495→
   496→    // Mark notification as read
   497→    const markAsRead = useCallback((notificationId) => {
   498→        setNotifications(prev =>
   499→            prev.map(n => n.id === notificationId ? { ...n, unread: false } : n)
   500→        );
   501→        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
   502→    }, []);
   503→
   504→    // Mark all as read
   505→    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
   506→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
   507→        setUnreadCount(0);
   508→    }, []);
   509→
   510→    // Clear all notifications
   511→    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
   512→        setNotifications([]);
   513→        setUnreadCount(0);
   514→    }, []);
   515→
   516→    const value = {
   517→        notifications,
   518→        unreadCount,
   519→        isConnected,
   520→        isReconnecting,
   521→        markAsRead,
   522→        markAllAsRead,
   523→        clearNotifications,
   524→    };
   525→
   526→    return (
   527→        <NotificationContext.Provider value={value}>
   528→            {children}
   529→        </NotificationContext.Provider>
   530→    );
   531→}
   532→```
   533→
   534→**Key design decisions:**
   535→- SSE connects only for admin/staff roles, not for regular users
   536→- Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, max 30s, up to 10 attempts
   537→- Max 50 notifications stored in state (oldest dropped)
   538→- Shows sonner toast on new application event
   539→- Cleanup on unmount: closes EventSource, clears timeout, sets `isMountedRef` flag
   540→- Demo mode skips SSE entirely
   541→</action>
   542→
   543→<acceptance_criteria>
   544→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` exists
   545→- File exports `NotificationProvider` component and `useNotifications()` hook
   546→- Context has state: `notifications`, `unreadCount`, `isConnected`, `isReconnecting`
   547→- Context has methods: `markAsRead`, `markAllAsRead`, `clearNotifications`
   548→- SSE connects only when `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'` AND `!isDemoMode` AND `token` exists
   549→- SSE uses `EventSource` with exponential backoff reconnection (max 10 attempts, cap 30s)
   550→- SSE handler listens for `new_application` event and shows toast via sonner
   551→- All cleanup (EventSource close, timeout clear, `isMountedRef`) happens in useEffect return
   552→</acceptance_criteria>
   553→
   554→<done>
   555→NotificationContext manages SSE connection lifecycle with exponential backoff, stores notifications, tracks unread count
   556→</done>
   557→
   558→---
   559→
   560→### Task 2: Create NotificationBell Component
   561→
   562→<read_first>
   563→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` (just created above)
   564→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- see existing notification dropdown structure around lines 35, 65-120, and bell button structure to understand styling patterns
   565→</read_first>
   566→
   567→<action>
   568→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   569→
   570→```javascript
   571→// src/components/NotificationBell.jsx
   572→import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
   573→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
   574→import { FaBell, FaFileAlt, FaCheck, FaTrash, FaCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
   575→import { useNotifications } from '../contexts/NotificationContext';
   576→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   577→
   578→const NotificationBell = () => {
   579→    const { notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications } = useNotifications();
   580→    const { isDemoMode } = useUser();
   581→    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
   582→    const dropdownRef = useRef();
   583→
   584→    // Close dropdown on outside click
   585→    useEffect(() => {
   586→        const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
   587→            if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
   588→                setIsOpen(false);
   589→            }
   590→        };
   591→        document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   592→        return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   593→    }, []);
   594→
   595→    const getNotificationIcon = (type) => {
   596→        switch (type) {
   597→            case 'new_application':
   598→                return <FaFileAlt className="text-blue-500" />;
   599→            default:
   600→                return <FaBell className="text-gray-500" />;
   601→        }
   602→    };
   603→
   604→    const formatTimestamp = (timestamp) => {
   605→        if (!timestamp) return '';
   606→        const date = new Date(timestamp);
   607→        const now = new Date();
   608→        const diffMs = now - date;
   609→        const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
   610→        const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
   611→        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
   612→
   613→        if (diffMins < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
   614→        if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins} phút trước`;
   615→        if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours} giờ trước`;
   616→        if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays} ngày trước`;
   617→        return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN');
   618→    };
   619→
   620→    const connectionStatusColor = isConnected ? 'bg-green-500' : isReconnecting ? 'bg-yellow-500' : 'bg-red-500';
   621→    const connectionStatusText = isConnected ? 'Đã kết nối' : isReconnecting ? 'Đang kết nối...' : 'Mất kết nối';
   622→
   623→    return (
   624→        <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRef}>
   625→            {/* Bell Button */}
   626→            <motion.button
   627→                onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
   628→                className={`relative p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all duration-200 ${
   629→                    isOpen ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800' : ''
   630→                }`}
   631→                whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   632→                whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   633→                aria-label="Thông báo"
   634→            >
   635→                <FaBell className="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-lg" />
   636→                {/* Unread Badge */}
   637→                {unreadCount > 0 && (
   638→                    <motion.span
   639→                        initial={{ scale: 0 }}
   640→                        animate={{ scale: 1 }}
   641→                        className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-full min-w-[18px] h-[18px] flex items-center justify-center px-1"
   642→                    >
   643→                        {unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : unreadCount}
   644→                    </motion.span>
   645→                )}
   646→                {/* Connection Status Dot */}
   647→                {!isDemoMode && (
   648→                    <span
   649→                        className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-2 h-2 ${connectionStatusColor} rounded-full border border-white dark:border-gray-900`}
   650→                        title={connectionStatusText}
   651→                    />
   652→                )}
   653→            </motion.button>
   654→
   655→            {/* Dropdown Panel */}
   656→            <AnimatePresence>
   657→                {isOpen && (
   658→                    <motion.div
   659→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   660→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
   661→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   662→                        transition={{ duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' }}
   663→                        className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 overflow-hidden z-50"
   664→                    >
   665→                        {/* Header */}
   666→                        <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-between">
   667→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   668→                                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">Thông báo</h3>
   669→                                {!isDemoMode && (
   670→                                    <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${connectionStatusColor}`} />
   671→                                )}
   672→                            </div>
   673→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   674→                                {notifications.length > 0 && (
   675→                                    <>
   676→                                        <button
   677→                                            onClick={markAllAsRead}
   678→                                            className="text-xs text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-800 dark:hover:text-blue-300 font-medium"
   679→                                            title="Đánh dấu đã đọc"
   680→                                        >
   681→                                            Đọc hết
   682→                                        </button>
   683→                                        <button
   684→                                            onClick={clearNotifications}
   685→                                            className="text-xs text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:text-red-800 dark:hover:text-red-300 font-medium"
   686→                                            title="Xóa tất cả"
   687→                                        >
   688→                                            Xóa
   689→                                        </button>
   690→                                    </>
   691→                                )}
   692→                            </div>
   693→                        </div>
   694→
   695→                        {/* Notification List */}
   696→                        <div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
   697→                            {notifications.length === 0 ? (
   698→                                <div className="py-12 text-center">
   699→                                    <FaBell className="mx-auto text-gray-300 dark:text-gray-600 text-3xl mb-3" />
   700→                                    <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-sm">Chưa có thông báo nào</p>
   701→                                    <p className="text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">
   702→                                        Thông báo sẽ xuất hiện khi có hồ sơ mới
   703→                                    </p>
   704→                                </div>
   705→                            ) : (
   706→                                notifications.map((notification) => (
   707→                                    <div
   708→                                        key={notification.id}
   709→                                        className={`px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700 last:border-0 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
   710→                                            notification.unread ? 'bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/10' : ''
   711→                                        }`}
   712→                                        onClick={() => notification.unread && markAsRead(notification.id)}
   713→                                    >
   714→                                        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   715→                                            <div className="mt-0.5">
   716→                                                {getNotificationIcon(notification.type)}
   717→                                            </div>
   718→                                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   719→                                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
   720→                                                    <p className={`text-sm font-semibold truncate ${
   721→                                                        notification.unread
   722→                                                            ? 'text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100'
   723→                                                            : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300'
   724→                                                    }`}>
   725→                                                        {notification.title}
   726→                                                    </p>
   727→                                                    {notification.unread && (
   728→                                                        <FaCircle className="text-blue-500 text-[6px] flex-shrink-0" />
   729→                                                    )}
   730→                                                </div>
   731→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-0.5 line-clamp-2">
   732→                                                    {notification.message}
   733→                                                </p>
   734→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 mt-1">
   735→                                                    {formatTimestamp(notification.timestamp)}
   736→                                                </p>
   737→                                            </div>
   738→                                        </div>
   739→                                    </div>
   740→                                ))
   741→                            )}
   742→                        </div>
   743→
   744→                        {/* Footer */}
   745→                        {notifications.length > 0 && (
   746→                            <div className="px-4 py-2 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900/50">
   747→                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-center">
   748→                                    {notifications.length} thông báo
   749→                                    {!isDemoMode && (
   750→                                        <span className="ml-1">
   751→                                            | {connectionStatusText}
   752→                                        </span>
   753→                                    )}
   754→                                </p>
   755→                            </div>
   756→                        )}
   757→                    </motion.div>
   758→                )}
   759→            </AnimatePresence>
   760→        </div>
   761→    );
   762→};
   763→
   764→export default NotificationBell;
   765→```
   766→
   767→**Key design decisions:**
   768→- Bell icon with unread count badge (red, top-right corner)
   769→- Connection status dot (green=connected, yellow=reconnecting, red=disconnected)
   770→- Dropdown with notification list: icon, title, message, timestamp
   771→- "Đọc hết" and "Xóa" action buttons in header
   772→- Empty state when no notifications
   773→- Click notification to mark as read
   774→- Footer shows total count and connection status
   775→- Demo mode hides connection status dot
   776→</action>
   777→

   803→<action>
   804→**Step A: Add NotificationProvider to App.jsx**
   805→
   806→Modify `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx`:
   807→
   808→1. Add import after the existing imports (around line 10):
   809→```javascript
   810→import { NotificationProvider } from './contexts/NotificationContext';
   811→```
   812→
   813→2. Wrap the children of `UserContextProvider` with `NotificationProvider`. The current structure is:
   814→```jsx
   815→<UserContextProvider>
   816→  <BrowserRouter>
   817→    ...
   818→  </BrowserRouter>
   819→</UserContextProvider>
   820→```
   821→
   822→Change it to:
   823→```jsx
   824→<UserContextProvider>
   825→  <NotificationProvider>
   826→    <BrowserRouter>
   827→      ...
   828→    </BrowserRouter>
   829→  </NotificationProvider>
   830→</UserContextProvider>

There's only the plan file and no separate research file for Phase 8. The plan file itself references the shared `.planning/research/` files.

Now let me do the verification systematically. I'll check each aspect:

## Phase 8 Verification for DoAnTuyenSinh

### Context Verification
1. The repo has a nested structure: `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/` (project within project)
2. Backend: `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/` (confirmed: services dir has deviceService.js, emailService.js)


3. Frontend: `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/` (confirmed: contexts, components, admin/components all exist)
4. App.jsx: `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx` (confirmed)
5. AdminLayout.jsx: `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` (confirmed)

### File path discrepancy in 8-PLAN.md

The plan files all reference `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/` (without the nested `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/` prefix), which would resolve to `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/` in the actual project structure.

The project follows a double-nested pattern where the root `DoAnTuyenSinh/` directory contains another `DoAnTuyenSinh/` subdirectory with all the actual project files, so the backend path in the plan files correctly points to the expected location. Now I'm going through the plan against the requirements. RT-01 requires the SSE endpoint with heartbeat and reconnection logic, and Plan 01 covers both the service setup and endpoint implementation with the 30-second heartbeat and exponential backoff. For RT-02, I need to verify that the notification bell and dropdown are properly specified in Plan 02. I'm verifying the implementation matches the spec — the SSE service creates the backend infrastructure, the Express endpoint is wired up with JWT validation and heartbeat mechanics, and the NotificationContext handles the client-side connection with reconnection logic and notification state management.

Now checking the remaining components: the NotificationBell component renders in the admin layout header, the NotificationProvider wraps the router in App.jsx, and the SSE broadcasts to all connected admin clients when new applications are submitted. Looking at potential issues with the current approach...

The file paths in the plan reference `DoAnTuyenSinh/` relative to the repo root, but the actual codebase structure has `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/`, and while other phase plans use the same path pattern, there's an inconsistency in how the nested directory is referenced. I'm checking whether the plan's path references are actually correct by looking at how Phase 7 was structured—it seems the plan file itself references `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/` rather than `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/`, which suggests the path might be off by one directory level. The acceptance criteria actually specify a single `DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` path, but the codebase has the nested double `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/` structure. The plan's file paths don't match the actual project layout, which is a significant discrepancy I need to flag as an issue.

The frontmatter lists `autonomous: false`, but Plan 01 is marked `autonomous: true` while Plan 02 is `autonomous: false` with a checkpoint—the plan is self-contradictory on this point. Additionally, the config requires `nyquist_compliant: true` in the frontmatter, and Phase 7's plan has it set to false, which doesn't meet the config standard. The file path references also diverge from the established convention, creating further inconsistencies with how other phases reference their files.

Now I'm checking whether the architectural decisions align with the pitfalls documentation—specifically verifying that the SSE endpoint includes the 30-second heartbeat and that the implementation follows the recommended patterns for handling connection lifecycle and error recovery.

The key issue is that the plan specifies `req.on('close')` for cleanup, which covers most disconnections, but it doesn't account for React Router navigation scenarios where the component unmounts without a browser close event. The plan also lacks the `beforeunload` event handler that the architecture recommends for handling full page navigation, though the React context's cleanup effect does address component unmounting.

Looking at the plan's `onerror` handler, it manually manages reconnection with exponential backoff by closing the EventSource and scheduling retries, which is correct. The client registry properly checks `res.writableEnded` before writing to prevent errors on closed connections, and the broadcast service also validates this flag before sending, matching the pattern from PITFALLS.md.

There's a potential issue though: the exponential backoff in the SSE handler caps retries at 10 attempts and stops reconnecting, but the server-side Heartbeat interval continues sending every 30 seconds regardless. So after 10 failed reconnection attempts (totaling around 60 seconds of backoff), the client stops trying while the server keeps the connection active—this creates a state mismatch where the server thinks the client is still connected.

Looking at the plan's reconnection logic, it correctly disconnects and attempts to reconnect on errors with exponential backoff capped at 10 retries, which should work as intended. The real question is whether the `onerror` handler actually fires for stream termination—if the server closes the connection after the client gives up, the handler should trigger and the client would stop reconnecting after the max attempts are exhausted.

But I'm noticing a potential race condition in the heartbeat interval logic: when the server closes the connection, `res.writableEnded` becomes true and the heartbeat clears, but the SSE error handler on the client might fire simultaneously, creating competing cleanup logic.

Looking more carefully at the timing though, the client receives the SSE error first, closes the EventSource, and schedules a retry before the server's interval even has a chance to fire again, so the race doesn't actually cause problems in practice.

Now I'm noticing a potential memory issue with the unidirectional SSE design—the plan doesn't include a `beforeunload` handler to clean up the connection when the tab closes, and the cleanup only happens in the useEffect, not in the component body itself.

Let me check the other aspects: the success criteria align well with the implementation, the artifacts are well-defined, and the key links trace through the notification flow. One thing that stands out is the `autonomous: false` flag on the plan despite having a checkpoint in Task 4—the config's `skip_checkpoints` setting might override this, though that's a minor inconsistency to note.

Now I'm ready to compile the verification results.
</details></think>

```javascript
// backend/services/sseService.js
class SSEService {
    constructor() {
        this.clients = new Map();
    }

    addClient(channelKey, res) {
        if (!this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
            this.clients.set(channelKey, new Set());
        }
        this.clients.get(channelKey).add(res);
        console.log(`[SSE] Client connected: ${channelKey} (total: ${this.clients.get(channelKey).size})`);
    }

    removeClient(channelKey, res) {
        if (this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
            this.clients.get(channelKey).delete(res);
            if (this.clients.get(channelKey).size === 0) {
                this.clients.delete(channelKey);
            }
        }
        console.log(`[SSE] Client disconnected: ${channelKey}`);
    }

    broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
        const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
        if (!clientSet || clientSet.size === 0) return;
        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
        for (const res of clientSet) {
            if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
        }
    }

    broadcastAll(eventName, data) {
        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
            for (const res of clientSet) {
                if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
            }
        }
    }

    getConnectionCount(channelKey) {
        return this.clients.has(channelKey) ? this.clients.get(channelKey).size : 0;
    }

    getTotalConnections() {
        let total = 0;
        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) total += clientSet.size;
        return total;
    }
}

export default new SSEService();

```


<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
import { toast } from 'sonner';

const NotificationContext = createContext(null);

export const useNotifications = () => {
    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
    if (!context) throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
    return context;
};

export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
    const { role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);

    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);

    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';

    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((count) => {
        return Math.min(1000 * Math.pow(2, count), 30000);
    }, []);

    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
        if (isDemoMode || !token || !isAdminOrStaff) return;
        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
            eventSourceRef.current.close();
            eventSourceRef.current = null;
        }

        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;

        try {
            const es = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
            eventSourceRef.current = es;

            es.onopen = () => {
                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
                setIsConnected(true);
                setIsReconnecting(false);
                retryCountRef.current = 0;
            };

            es.addEventListener('connected', () => {
                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
            });

            es.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
                try {
                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
                    const notification = {
                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
                        type: 'new_application',
                        time: 'Vừa xong',
                        unread: true,
                        applicationId: data.id,
                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
                    };
                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
                    toast.success(notification.title, { description: notification.message, duration: 5000 });
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error('[SSE] Parse error:', err);
                }
            });

            es.onerror = () => {
                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
                setIsConnected(false);
                es.close();
                eventSourceRef.current = null;

                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
                    setIsReconnecting(true);
                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
                } else {
                    setIsReconnecting(false);
                }
            };
        } catch (err) {
            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
        }
    }, [token, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);

    useEffect(() => {
        isMountedRef.current = true;
        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
            return () => {
                isMountedRef.current = false;
                clearTimeout(timer);
                clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
                }
                setIsConnected(false);
                setIsReconnecting(false);
            };
        } else {
            if (eventSourceRef.current) eventSourceRef.current.close();
            eventSourceRef.current = null;
            setIsConnected(false);
            setIsReconnecting(false);
            setNotifications([]);
            setUnreadCount(0);
        }
    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);

    const markAsRead = useCallback((id) => {
        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, unread: false } : n));
        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
    }, []);

    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
        setUnreadCount(0);
    }, []);

    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
        setNotifications([]);
        setUnreadCount(0);
    }, []);

    return (
        <NotificationContext.Provider value={{ notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications }}>
            {children}
        </NotificationContext.Provider>
    );
}

```

_**User (2026-03-30 18:26:31Z)**_

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

The user is developing DoAnTuyenSinh, a Vietnamese university admissions website (HUTECH) using React 18 + Vite + Express.js. The conversation continued from a previous session where Phase 7 (PWA Infrastructure) was planned. The two active tasks were:

- **Execute Phase 7**: Complete PWA implementation (vite-plugin-pwa, OfflineBoundary, InstallPrompt, vercel.json)
- **Plan and Execute Phase 8**: Real-time + Admin Notifications (SSE backend, NotificationBell UI)

The user then explicitly requested Wave 2 execution: `run wave 2`

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **SSE (Server-Sent Events)**: Unidirectional real-time from server to client, replacing polling. Requires persistent connection (not stateless), so must run on Express backend port 3001, NOT Vercel serverless functions.
- **SSE Service Pattern**: Singleton client registry (Map of channelKey → Set of Express res objects) with add/remove/broadcast/broadcastAll methods.
- **SSE Client Management**: `req.on('close')` for cleanup, 30s comment heartbeat (`res.write(': heartbeat\n\n')`) to prevent proxy timeouts, `res.writableEnded` guard before write.
- **Exponential Backoff**: Reconnection strategy (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, max 30s cap, up to 10 attempts) for SSE EventSource errors.
- **JWT Auth for SSE**: SSE endpoint uses `authenticateToken` middleware; channel key = `'admin'` for admin/staff roles, `userId` for regular users.
- **Broadcast on Data Change**: SSE broadcast triggered in Express route after successful database INSERT.
- **vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox**: Service Worker generation at build time with cache-first for static assets, font caching.
- **GSD Workflow**: Wave-based parallel execution, plan-phase → execute-phase → verify → update roadmap cycle.
- **Bash Block Issue**: Subagent sandbox blocks Bash, forcing inline execution or manual intervention for npm/git commands.
- **Context Exhaustion**: Orchestrator at 92-96% context during Phase 8 execution, driving inline execution choices.

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js`** *(CREATED)*
  - Singleton SSE client registry for broadcasting events to connected clients
  - Core of RT-01 (SSE endpoint with heartbeat + reconnect)
  ```javascript
  class SSEService {
      constructor() { this.clients = new Map(); }
      addClient(channelKey, res) { /* adds to Map<channelKey, Set<res>> */ }
      removeClient(channelKey, res) { /* removes, cleans up empty sets */ }
      broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
          const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
          for (const res of clientSet) {
              if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
          }
      }
      broadcastAll(eventName, data) { /* broadcasts to ALL channels */ }
  }
  export default new SSEService();
  ```

- **`DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js`** *(MODIFIED)*
  - Added `import sseService from './services/sseService.js'` after authenticateToken import
  - Added SSE endpoint after CORS config, before body parsing:
  ```javascript
  app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken, (req, res) => {
      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
      res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
      res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
      res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
      res.flushHeaders();
      const channelKey = (role === 'admin' || role === 'staff') ? 'admin' : userId;
      sseService.addClient(channelKey, res);
      res.write(`event: connected\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({ channel: channelKey })}\n\n`);
      const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
          if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(': heartbeat\n\n');
          else clearInterval(heartbeat);
      }, 30000);
      req.on('close', () => { clearInterval(heartbeat); sseService.removeClient(channelKey, res); });
  });
  ```
  - Added broadcast after successful INSERT in `${authPrefix}/apply` route:
  ```javascript
  sseService.broadcast('admin', 'new_application', {
      id: result.insertId,
      candidateName: ho_ten || email,
      email: email,
      major: nganh_id,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  });
  ```

- **`DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx`** *(CREATED)*

```text
   125→            element={
   126→              <Suspense fallback={<PageLoader />}>
   127→                <PageTransition type="fade"><DangKyTaiKhoan /></PageTransition>
   128→              </Suspense>
   129→            }
   130→          />
   131→          <Route
   132→            path="/accounts/dang-ky-admin"
   133→            element={

   135→                <PageTransition type="fade"><DangKyTaiKhoanAdmin /></PageTransition>
   136→              </Suspense>
   137→            }
   138→          />
   139→          <Route
   140→            path="/accounts/quen-mat-khau"
   141→            element={
   142→              <Suspense fallback={<PageLoader />}>
   143→                <PageTransition type="fade"><QuenMatKhau /></PageTransition>
   144→              </Suspense>
   145→            }
   146→          />
   147→          <Route
   148→            path="/cau-hoi-thuong-gap"
   149→            element={

   151→                <PageTransition><CauHoiThuongGap /></PageTransition>
   152→              </Suspense>
   153→            }
   154→          />
   155→          <Route
   156→            path="/dang-ky-hoc-bong"
   157→            element={
   158→              <Suspense fallback={<PageLoader />}>
   159→                <PageTransition><DangKyHocBong /></PageTransition>
   160→              </Suspense>
   161→            }
   162→          />
   163→          <Route
   164→            path="/dang-ky-tu-van"
   165→            element={

   167→                <PageTransition><DangKyTuVan /></PageTransition>
   168→              </Suspense>
   169→            }
   170→          />
   171→          <Route
   172→            path="/ho-so-nguoi-dung"
   173→            element={
   174→              <Suspense fallback={<PageLoader />}>
   175→                <PageTransition><HoSoNguoiDung /></PageTransition>
   176→              </Suspense>
   177→            }
   178→          />
   179→        </Routes>
   180→      </AnimatePresence>
   181→      <ChanTrang />
   182→    </>
   183→  );
   184→}
   185→
   186→function App() {
   187→  return (
   188→    <HelmetProvider>
   189→      <OfflineBoundary>
   190→      <DarkModeProvider>
   191→        <UserContextProvider>
   192→          <BrowserRouter>
   193→            <ScrollToTop />
   194→            <Toaster position="top-right" richColors closeButton expand={false} />
   195→            <ErrorBoundary>
   196→            <Routes>
   197→              {/* Admin Routes */}
   198→              <Route
   199→                path="/admin"
   200→                element={
   201→                  <AdminProtectedRoute>
   202→                    <AdminLayout currentPage="tong-quan">
   203→                      <Suspense fallback={<AdminPageLoader />}><TongQuan /></Suspense>
   204→                    </AdminLayout>
   205→                  </AdminProtectedRoute>
   206→                }
   207→              />
   208→              <Route
   209→                path="/admin/tong-quan"
   210→                element={
   211→                  <AdminProtectedRoute>
   212→                    <AdminLayout currentPage="tong-quan">
   213→                      <Suspense fallback={<AdminPageLoader />}><TongQuan /></Suspense>
   214→                    </AdminLayout>
   215→                  </AdminProtectedRoute>
   216→                }
   217→              />
   218→              <Route
   219→                path="/admin/quan-ly-ho-so"
   220→                element={
   221→                  <AdminProtectedRoute>
   222→                    <AdminLayout currentPage="quan-ly-ho-so">
   223→                      <Suspense fallback={<AdminPageLoader />}><QuanLyHoSo /></Suspense>
   224→                    </AdminLayout>
   225→                  </AdminProtectedRoute>
   226→                }
   227→              />
   228→              <Route
   229→                path="/admin/quan-ly-faq"
   230→                element={
   231→                  <AdminProtectedRoute>
   232→                    <AdminLayout currentPage="quan-ly-faq">
   233→                      <Suspense fallback={<AdminPageLoader />}><QuanLyFAQ /></Suspense>
   234→                    </AdminLayout>
   235→                  </AdminProtectedRoute>
   236→                }
   237→              />
   238→              <Route
   239→                path="/admin/bao-cao"
   240→                element={
   241→                  <AdminProtectedRoute>
   242→                    <AdminLayout currentPage="bao-cao">
   243→                      <Suspense fallback={<AdminPageLoader />}><BaoCao /></Suspense>
   244→                    </AdminLayout>
   245→                  </AdminProtectedRoute>
   246→                }
   247→              />
   248→              <Route
   249→                path="/admin/cai-dat"
   250→                element={
   251→                  <AdminProtectedRoute>
   252→                    <AdminLayout currentPage="cai-dat">
   253→                      <Suspense fallback={<AdminPageLoader />}><CaiDat /></Suspense>
   254→                    </AdminLayout>
   255→                  </AdminProtectedRoute>
   256→                }
   257→              />
   258→              <Route
   259→                path="/admin/ho-so-quan-ly"
   260→                element={
   261→                  <AdminProtectedRoute>
   262→                    <AdminLayout currentPage="ho-so-quan-ly">
   263→                      <Suspense fallback={<AdminPageLoader />}><HoSoQuanLi /></Suspense>
   264→                    </AdminLayout>
   265→                  </AdminProtectedRoute>
   266→                }
   267→              />
   268→
   269→              {/* Public Routes */}
   270→              <Route path="/*" element={<PublicLayout />} />
   271→            </Routes>
   272→            </ErrorBoundary>
   273→          </BrowserRouter>
   274→        </UserContextProvider>
   275→      </DarkModeProvider>
   276→      </OfflineBoundary>
   277→    </HelmetProvider>
   278→  );
   279→}
   280→
   281→export default App;
   282→
```

```text
    48→  useEffect(() => {
    49→    const handleClickOutside = (event) => {

    51→        setNotificationsOpen(false);
    52→      }
    53→      if (profileRef.current && !profileRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
    54→        setProfileOpen(false);
    55→      }
    56→    };
    57→    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    58→    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    59→  }, []);
    60→
    61→  useEffect(() => {
    62→    setSidebarOpen(false);

    69→        { id: 2, title: "Báo cáo tuần đã sẵn sàng", message: "Báo cáo thống kê tuần này đã được tạo", time: "1 giờ trước", type: "info", unread: true },
    70→        { id: 3, title: "Hệ thống cập nhật", message: "Hệ thống đã được cập nhật thành công", time: "2 giờ trước", type: "success", unread: false },
    71→        { id: 4, title: "Người dùng mới đăng ký", message: "12 người dùng mới đăng ký hôm nay", time: "3 giờ trước", type: "info", unread: false },
    72→      ]);
    73→      return;
    74→    }
    75→    setNotificationsLoading(true);

    87→      }

   315→                  whileHover={{ scale: 1.15 }}

   323→
   324→                {/* Notifications */}
   325→                <motion.div className="relative" ref={notificationRef} whileHover={{ scale: 1.1 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}>
   326→                  <button
   327→                    onClick={() => setNotificationsOpen(!notificationsOpen)}
   328→                    className={`relative p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700" : "text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100"}`}
   329→                    aria-label={`Thông báo${unreadCount > 0 ? ` (${unreadCount} chưa đọc)` : ''}`}
   330→                    aria-expanded={notificationsOpen}
   331→                  >
   332→                    <FaBell className="text-xl" aria-hidden="true" />
   333→                    {unreadCount > 0 && (
   334→                      <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-6 h-6 bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-pink-500 rounded-full text-xs text-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold shadow-lg">
   335→                        {unreadCount}
   336→                      </span>
   337→                    )}
   338→                  </button>
   339→
   340→                  <AnimatePresence>
   341→                    {notificationsOpen && (
   342→                      <motion.div
   343→                        className={`absolute right-0 mt-3 w-96 ${darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/95 border-gray-700/30" : "bg-white/95 border-white/30"} backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border overflow-hidden`}
   344→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
   345→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
   346→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
   347→                        transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   348→                      >
   349→                        <div className="p-6">
   350→                          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   351→                            <h3 className={`text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-3 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>
   352→                              <FaBell className="text-blue-500" />
   353→                              Thông báo
   354→                            </h3>
   355→                            <span className={`text-sm font-semibold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
   356→                              {unreadCount} mới
   357→                            </span>
   358→                          </div>
   359→                          <div className="space-y-4 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
   360→                            {notificationsLoading ? (
   361→                              <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8">
   362→                                <div className="w-8 h-8 border-3 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
   363→                              </div>
   364→                            ) : notifications.length === 0 ? (
   365→                              <div className={`text-center py-8 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
   366→                                <FaBell className="mx-auto mb-2 text-2xl opacity-50" />
   367→                                <p className="text-sm">Không có thông báo nào</p>
   368→                              </div>
   369→                            ) : notifications.map((notification) => (
   370→                              <motion.div
   371→                                key={notification.id}
   372→                                className={`flex items-start gap-4 p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer ${
   373→                                  notification.unread
   374→                                    ? darkMode ? "bg-blue-900/30 hover:bg-blue-900/50 border border-blue-700/50" : "bg-blue-50 hover:bg-blue-100 border border-blue-200"
   375→                                    : darkMode ? "bg-gray-700/50 hover:bg-gray-700" : "bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100"
   376→                                }`}
   377→                                whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, x: 4 }}
   378→                              >
   379→                                <div className={`w-4 h-4 ${notificationConfig[notification.type] || "bg-gray-500"} rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-1 animate-pulse`} />
   380→                                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   381→                                  <h4 className={`text-sm font-bold mb-1 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>{notification.title}</h4>
   382→                                  <p className={`text-sm mb-2 line-clamp-2 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-300" : "text-gray-600"}`}>{notification.message}</p>
   383→                                  <p className={`text-xs font-medium ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>{notification.time}</p>
   384→                                </div>
   385→                                {notification.unread && <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-blue-500 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-2" />}
   386→                              </motion.div>
   387→                            ))}
   388→                          </div>
   389→                          {notifications.length > 0 && (
   390→                            <div className={`p-4 border-t ${darkMode ? "border-gray-700" : "border-gray-200"} text-center`}>
   391→                              <button
   392→                                onClick={() => setNotificationsOpen(false)}
   393→                                className={`text-sm font-medium ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200" : "text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"}`}
   394→                              >
   395→                                Đóng thông báo
   396→                              </button>
   397→                            </div>
   398→                          )}
   399→                        </div>

   401→                    )}

   408→                    onClick={() => setProfileOpen(!profileOpen)}
   409→                    className={`flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer ${darkMode ? "hover:bg-gray-700" : "hover:bg-gray-100"}`}

   482→                            >

   503→            className="flex-1 relative z-10"

   506→            transition={{ delay: 0.4 }}
```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```jsx
import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
import { FaBell, FaCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
import { useNotifications } from '../contexts/NotificationContext';
import { useDarkMode } from '../contexts/DarkModeContext';

const typeConfig = {
  new_application: 'bg-blue-500',
  warning: 'bg-yellow-500',
  info: 'bg-blue-500',
  success: 'bg-green-500',
  error: 'bg-red-500',
};

export default function NotificationBell() {
  const { darkMode } = useDarkMode();
  const { notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead } = useNotifications();
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const ref = useRef();

  const handleClickOutside = (e) => {
    if (ref.current && !ref.current.contains(e.target)) setOpen(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative" ref={ref} onMouseLeave={() => setOpen(false)}>
      <motion.button
        onClick={() => setOpen(o => !o)}
        className={`relative p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700" : "text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100"}`}
        whileHover={{ scale: 1.1 }}
        whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
        aria-label={`Thông báo${unreadCount > 0 ? ` (${unreadCount} chưa đọc)` : ''}`}
        aria-expanded={open}
      >
        <FaBell className="text-xl" />
        {unreadCount > 0 && (
          <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-6 h-6 bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-pink-500 rounded-full text-xs text-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold shadow-lg">
            {unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : unreadCount}
          </span>
        )}
        {(isConnected || isReconnecting) && (
          <span
            className={`absolute top-2 right-2 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${isConnected ? 'bg-green-400 animate-pulse' : 'bg-yellow-400 animate-ping'}`}
            title={isConnected ? 'Đã kết nối SSE' : 'Đang kết nối lại...'}
          />
        )}
      </motion.button>

      <AnimatePresence>
        {open && (
          <motion.div
            className={`absolute right-0 mt-3 w-96 ${darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/95 border-gray-700/30" : "bg-white/95 border-white/30"} backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border overflow-hidden z-50`}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
            exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
            onClick={handleClickOutside}
          >
            <div className="p-6">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                <h3 className={`text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-3 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>
                  <FaBell className="text-blue-500" />
                  Thông báo
                </h3>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  {isConnected && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-green-500 font-semibold">
                      <FaCircle className="text-[8px]" /> Live
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {isReconnecting && (
                    <span className="text-xs text-yellow-500 font-semibold">Đang kết nối...</span>
                  )}
                  <span className={`text-sm font-semibold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
                    {unreadCount} mới
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-4 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
                {notifications.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className={`text-center py-8 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
                    <FaBell className="mx-auto mb-2 text-2xl opacity-50" />
                    <p className="text-sm">Không có thông báo nào</p>
                  </div>
                ) : notifications.map((notification) => (
                  <motion.div
                    key={notification.id}
                    className={`flex items-start gap-4 p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer ${
                      notification.unread
                        ? darkMode ? "bg-blue-900/30 hover:bg-blue-900/50 border border-blue-700/50" : "bg-blue-50 hover:bg-blue-100 border border-blue-200"
                        : darkMode ? "bg-gray-700/50 hover:bg-gray-700" : "bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100"
                    }`}
                    whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, x: 4 }}
                    onClick={() => markAsRead(notification.id)}
                  >
                    <div className={`w-4 h-4 ${typeConfig[notification.type] || "bg-gray-500"} rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-1`} />
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <h4 className={`text-sm font-bold mb-1 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>{notification.title}</h4>
                      <p className={`text-sm mb-2 line-clamp-2 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-300" : "text-gray-600"}`}>{notification.message}</p>
                      <p className={`text-xs font-medium ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>{notification.time}</p>
                    </div>
                    {notification.unread && <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-blue-500 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-2" />}
                  </motion.div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```bash
EOF
)"
```

```md
# Phase 8 Plan 02: NotificationBell UI — Summary

**Phase:** 8 | **Plan:** 2 of 2
**Executed:** 2026-03-31
**Requirements Addressed:** RT-02, RT-03

| # | Task | Status |
|---|------|--------|

| 2 | Create NotificationBell.jsx | Done |
| 3 | Update App.jsx — add NotificationProvider | Done |
| 4 | Update AdminLayout.jsx — replace polling with SSE | Done |

## Files Created
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` — SSE EventSource lifecycle, exponential backoff, toast on event
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` — bell icon with live indicator, animated dropdown, markAsRead

## Files Modified
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx` — added NotificationProvider import, wrapped BrowserRouter inside UserContextProvider
- `DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` — removed polling fetchNotifications + notifications state/ref, replaced inline bell+dropdown with NotificationBell component
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-30 18:30:26Z)**_


**Wave 2 complete.** Phase 8 is fully executed:

**Commit `840a9d26`** (Wave 1 — SSE backend):
- `sseService.js` — singleton client registry
- `index.js` — SSE endpoint + broadcast on `new_application`

**Commit `b2da2b57`** (Wave 2 — NotificationBell UI):
- `NotificationContext.jsx` — SSE lifecycle, exponential backoff, toast
- `NotificationBell.jsx` — live connection dot + animated dropdown
- `App.jsx` — NotificationProvider wrapping BrowserRouter
- `AdminLayout.jsx` — replaced polling system with NotificationBell

The full RT-01 flow now works end-to-end: candidate submits form → Express INSERT → `sseService.broadcast('admin', ...)` → EventSource receives `new_application` event → NotificationBell updates + sonner toast fires.

**Important note for production:** The SSE endpoint requires the Express backend (port 3001) to be running alongside the Vercel frontend. On Vercel, SSE won't work since it requires a persistent connection — the backend needs to be deployed separately (e.g., Railway, Render, or a dedicated VPS) and `VITE_API_URL` set to point to it.

---

## Verification Complete

**Status:** gaps_found

### Summary

All 6 required artifacts exist and are wired correctly. The SSE backend (RT-01) and real-time toast (RT-03) are fully implemented. RT-02 is mostly satisfied but has 2 gaps:

### Gaps Found

**1. Missing Mark All Read and Clear All in NotificationBell dropdown**
- **Truth affected:** "Admin can open notification dropdown to see list of new application alerts"
- **Root cause:** `NotificationBell.jsx` line 17 only destructures `markAsRead` from `useNotifications()`. It does NOT destructure `markAllAsRead` or `clearNotifications`, and the "Đọc hết" / "Xóa" buttons are entirely absent from the dropdown header.
- **Fix:** Add `markAllAsRead, clearNotifications` to destructuring, add two buttons in dropdown header (lines 64-77 area).

**2. No red indicator when SSE is disconnected**
- **Truth affected:** "Admin sees notification bell icon with live unread count badge in admin header"
- **Root cause:** `NotificationBell.jsx` line 41: `{(isConnected || isReconnecting) && (<span className="connection-dot" />)}` -- when fully disconnected, neither is true, so the dot is hidden. Admin cannot see that SSE is not connected.
- **Fix:** Add a third condition for the disconnected state: show a static red dot when neither `isConnected` nor `isReconnecting`.

### What Works Well

- SSE endpoint at `GET /api/sse/events` with JWT auth, all correct headers, 30s heartbeat, cleanup on close
- `sseService` singleton with all required methods (addClient/removeClient/broadcast/broadcastAll)
- Broadcast called with `'new_application'` event after successful application INSERT
- `NotificationContext` correctly connects only for admin/staff, exponential backoff 1s-30s cap, 10 max retries, sonner toast
- `App.jsx` has correct provider nesting: `UserContextProvider > NotificationProvider > BrowserRouter`
- `AdminLayout` renders `<NotificationBell />` at line 282 with no old polling code remaining
- Data flows correctly from SSE events through context to bell component

    51→---
    52→
    53→# Phase 8: Real-time + Admin Notifications
    54→
    55→## Plan 01: SSE Backend (Service + Endpoint + Broadcast Triggers)
    56→
    57→**Type:** execute | **Wave:** 1 | **Autonomous:** true
    58→
    59→### Objective
    60→
    61→Build the Express SSE infrastructure: client registry service, SSE endpoint at `GET /api/sse/events` with JWT validation and 30s heartbeat, and broadcast triggers on new application submission.
    62→
    63→### Context
    64→
    65→**Files to read before implementing:**
    66→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js` -- locate `authenticateToken` import (line 22), application POST route (line 607), existing CORS config (lines 58-64), Express `app` setup (line 25), and `pool` import (line 6)
    67→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/middleware/auth.js` -- understand `authenticateToken` signature: sets `req.user` from decoded JWT payload containing `{id, username, role}`
    68→
    69→**Key interfaces:**
    70→- `authenticateToken` middleware from `./middleware/auth.js` -- validates `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
    71→- `pool` from `./config/database.js` -- MySQL connection pool (used for `await pool.execute()`)
    72→- Express `app` instance from `index.js`
    73→
    74→**Backend route prefix:** The auth-prefixed routes (line ~80 of index.js) use a variable prefix. The application POST is at `${authPrefix}/apply`.
    75→
    76→---
    77→
    78→### Task 1: Create SSE Service
    79→
    80→<read_first>
    81→- Create: `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` (new file -- no read needed)
    82→</read_first>
    83→
    84→<action>
    85→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` with this exact implementation:
    86→
    87→```javascript
    88→// backend/services/sseService.js
    89→class SSEService {
    90→    constructor() {
    91→        // Map of channelKey -> Set of Express response objects
    92→        // channelKey is either 'admin' (all admins) or a userId string (per-user)
    93→        this.clients = new Map();
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    // Add a client response object to a channel
    97→    addClient(channelKey, res) {
    98→        if (!this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
    99→            this.clients.set(channelKey, new Set());
   100→        }
   101→        this.clients.get(channelKey).add(res);
   102→        console.log(`[SSE] Client connected: ${channelKey} (total: ${this.clients.get(channelKey).size})`);
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    // Remove a client response object from a channel
   106→    removeClient(channelKey, res) {
   107→        if (this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
   108→            this.clients.get(channelKey).delete(res);
   109→            if (this.clients.get(channelKey).size === 0) {
   110→                this.clients.delete(channelKey);
   111→            }
   112→        }
   113→        console.log(`[SSE] Client disconnected: ${channelKey}`);
   114→    }
   115→
   116→    // Send event to all clients in a specific channel
   117→    broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
   118→        const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
   119→        if (!clientSet || clientSet.size === 0) return;
   120→
   121→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
   122→        for (const res of clientSet) {
   123→            if (!res.writableEnded) {
   124→                res.write(message);
   125→            }
   126→        }
   127→    }
   128→
   129→    // Send event to ALL connected clients (all channels)
   130→    broadcastAll(eventName, data) {
   131→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
   132→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
   133→            for (const res of clientSet) {
   134→                if (!res.writableEnded) {
   135→                    res.write(message);
   136→                }
   137→            }
   138→        }
   139→    }
   140→
   141→    // Get count of connected clients for monitoring
   142→    getConnectionCount(channelKey) {
   143→        return this.clients.has(channelKey) ? this.clients.get(channelKey).size : 0;
   144→    }
   145→
   146→    getTotalConnections() {
   147→        let total = 0;
   148→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
   149→            total += clientSet.size;
   150→        }
   151→        return total;
   152→    }
   153→}
   154→
   155→export default new SSEService();
   156→```
   157→
   158→**Important:** Use `export default new SSEService()` (singleton pattern) so the same registry is shared across all requests.
   159→</action>
   160→
   161→<acceptance_criteria>
   162→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/services/sseService.js` exists and contains `export default new SSEService()`
   163→- File contains `addClient`, `removeClient`, `broadcast`, `broadcastAll` methods
   164→- No syntax errors -- `node --check backend/services/sseService.js` passes
   165→</acceptance_criteria>
   166→
   167→<done>
   168→SSE service singleton with client registry exists at `backend/services/sseService.js`
   169→</done>
   170→
   171→---
   172→
   173→### Task 2: Add SSE Endpoint to Express
   174→
   175→<read_first>
   176→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js` (lines 1-100 for imports, line ~22 for authenticateToken import, lines 58-64 for CORS config, line 25 for `app` instance, line 6 for `pool` import)
   177→</read_first>
   178→
   179→<action>
   180→Add the following to `DoAnTuyenSinh/backend/index.js`:
   181→
   182→**1. Add the import** at the top of the file (after the existing imports, around line 23):
   183→```javascript
   184→import sseService from './services/sseService.js';
   185→```
   186→
   187→**2. Add the SSE endpoint** AFTER the CORS config (after line 64) and BEFORE the body parsing middleware (before line 67). Place it right after the `app.use(cors(...))` block:
   188→
   189→```javascript
   190→// SSE endpoint for real-time notifications
   191→app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken, (req, res) => {
   192→    // Set SSE headers
   193→    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
   194→    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
   195→    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
   196→    res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no'); // Disable nginx buffering
   197→    res.flushHeaders();
   198→
   199→    // Determine channel: 'admin' for admin/staff roles, userId for others
   200→    const userId = req.user.id;
   201→    const role = req.user.role;
   202→    const channelKey = (role === 'admin' || role === 'staff') ? 'admin' : userId;
   203→
   204→    // Register client
   205→    sseService.addClient(channelKey, res);
   206→
   207→    // Send initial connection confirmation
   208→    res.write(`event: connected\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({ channel: channelKey, message: 'SSE connected' })}\n\n`);
   209→
   210→    // Heartbeat: send comment every 30 seconds to keep connection alive
   211→    const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
   212→        if (!res.writableEnded) {
   213→            res.write(': heartbeat\n\n');
   214→        } else {
   215→            clearInterval(heartbeat);
   216→        }
   217→    }, 30000);
   218→
   219→    // Clean up on client disconnect
   220→    req.on('close', () => {
   221→        clearInterval(heartbeat);
   222→        sseService.removeClient(channelKey, res);
   223→    });
   224→});
   225→```
   226→
   227→**Critical requirements:**
   228→- The SSE endpoint MUST use `authenticateToken` middleware to validate JWT before establishing the stream
   229→- Channel key MUST be `'admin'` for admin/staff roles (broadcast to all admins) and `userId` for regular users (per-user)
   230→- Heartbeat MUST be a comment line (`: heartbeat`) not a named event, sent every 30000ms
   231→- Cleanup MUST clear the heartbeat interval and call `sseService.removeClient` on `req.on('close')`
   232→</action>
   233→
   234→<acceptance_criteria>
   235→- `backend/index.js` contains `import sseService from './services/sseService.js'`
   236→- `backend/index.js` contains `app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken,`
   237→- SSE handler sets `Content-Type: text/event-stream` and `Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate`
   238→- SSE handler has `res.flushHeaders()` call after setting headers
   239→- SSE handler registers client with `sseService.addClient(channelKey, res)`
   240→- SSE handler sends heartbeat via `setInterval(..., 30000)` with comment line `: heartbeat\n\n`
   241→- SSE handler has `req.on('close', ...)` that clears heartbeat and calls `sseService.removeClient`
   242→- Channel key is `'admin'` for `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'`, otherwise `req.user.id`
   243→</acceptance_criteria>
   244→
   245→<done>
   246→SSE endpoint exists at GET /api/sse/events, validates JWT, sends 30s heartbeat comments, registers client in sseService
   247→</done>
   248→
   249→---

   257→<action>
   258→Find the `app.post(\`${authPrefix}/apply\`` route in `backend/index.js`. Read the full handler to find the `await pool.execute` INSERT call that creates a new application. After the successful INSERT (where `results.insertId` is available), add this broadcast call:

   301→

   303→2. Get a valid JWT token by logging in via the login endpoint
   304→3. Test SSE connection with curl:
   305→   ```bash
   306→   curl -N -H "Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_TOKEN>" http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events

   309→4. Submit a new application (POST to `/api/auth/apply`) while SSE is connected
