   314→
   315→## Plan 02: NotificationBell UI (Context + Component + Integration)
   316→
   317→**Type:** execute | **Wave:** 2 | **Autonomous:** false (has checkpoint)
   318→
   319→### Objective
   320→
   321→Build the frontend NotificationContext that manages the SSE connection with exponential backoff reconnection, and the NotificationBell component that shows a badge counter and dropdown list of notifications. Integrate into the admin header.
   322→
   323→### Context
   324→
   325→**Files to read before implementing:**
   326→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand provider structure, exported `useUser` hook, `user.id`, `user.role`, `token` values
   327→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/ThanhHeader.jsx` -- find the right section to insert NotificationBell (right section near ThemeToggle around line 237)
   328→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/App.jsx` -- see provider nesting order (line 191: UserContextProvider wraps everything)
   329→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- API_BASE_URL is `http://localhost:3001/api`, full SSE URL will be `http://localhost:3001/api/sse/events`
   330→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- already has `notifications` state, `fetchNotifications`, and a bell button using `FaBell` icon (line 16, 35, 65-83). The bell is currently only in AdminLayout, not in the public ThanhHeader.
   331→
   332→**Important:** RT-02 says "Admin sees notification bell icon in header" -- the admin uses the admin dashboard (via AdminLayout), NOT the public ThanhHeader. So NotificationBell should be integrated into `AdminLayout.jsx`, not `ThanhHeader.jsx`. The AdminLayout already has a bell button structure (FaBell + notifications dropdown) -- we need to replace the static polling with live SSE-driven updates.
   333→
   334→---
   335→
   336→### Task 1: Create NotificationContext
   337→
   338→<read_first>
   339→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/accounts/UserContext.jsx` -- understand `useUser()` return value: `{ user, role, token, isDemoMode, ... }`
   340→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/config/apiConfig.js` -- `API_CONFIG.BASE_URL` is `http://localhost:3001` (dev) or `import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL`
   341→</read_first>
   342→
   343→<action>
   344→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   345→
   346→```javascript
   347→// src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx
   348→import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
   349→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   350→import { toast } from 'sonner';
   351→
   352→const NotificationContext = createContext(null);
   353→
   354→export const useNotifications = () => {
   355→    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
   356→    if (!context) {
   357→        throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
   358→    }
   359→    return context;
   360→};
   361→
   362→export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
   363→    const { user, role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
   364→    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
   365→    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
   366→    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   367→    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   368→
   369→    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
   370→    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
   371→    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
   372→    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);
   373→
   374→    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';
   375→
   376→    // Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s (max 30s cap)
   377→    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((retryCount) => {
   378→        const baseDelay = 1000;
   379→        const delay = Math.min(baseDelay * Math.pow(2, retryCount), 30000);
   380→        return delay;
   381→    }, []);
   382→
   383→    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
   384→        // Skip SSE in demo mode or when not authenticated
   385→        if (isDemoMode || !token || !user?.id || !isAdminOrStaff) {
   386→            return;
   387→        }
   388→
   389→        // Close existing connection if any
   390→        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   391→            eventSourceRef.current.close();
   392→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
   393→        }
   394→
   395→        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
   396→        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;
   397→
   398→        try {
   399→            const eventSource = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
   400→            eventSourceRef.current = eventSource;
   401→
   402→            eventSource.onopen = () => {
   403→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   404→                setIsConnected(true);
   405→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   406→                retryCountRef.current = 0;
   407→                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
   408→            };
   409→
   410→            // Handle new_application event (admin)
   411→            eventSource.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
   412→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   413→                try {
   414→                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   415→                    const notification = {
   416→                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
   417→                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
   418→                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
   419→                        type: 'new_application',
   420→                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
   421→                        unread: true,
   422→                        applicationId: data.id,
   423→                    };
   424→                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
   425→                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
   426→                    // Show toast notification
   427→                    toast.success(notification.title, {
   428→                        description: notification.message,
   429→                        duration: 5000,
   430→                    });
   431→                } catch (err) {
   432→                    console.error('[SSE] Failed to parse new_application event:', err);
   433→                }
   434→            });
   435→
   436→            // Handle connected event
   437→            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {
   438→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   439→                console.log('[SSE] Received connected event:', event.data);
   440→            });
   441→
   442→            eventSource.onerror = () => {
   443→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
   444→                setIsConnected(false);
   445→                eventSource.close();
   446→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   447→
   448→                // Exponential backoff reconnection
   449→                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
   450→                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
   451→                    setIsReconnecting(true);
   452→                    console.log(`[SSE] Reconnecting in ${delay}ms (attempt ${retryCountRef.current + 1})`);
   453→                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
   454→                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
   455→                } else {
   456→                    console.error('[SSE] Max reconnection attempts reached');
   457→                    setIsReconnecting(false);
   458→                }
   459→            };
   460→        } catch (err) {
   461→            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
   462→        }
   463→    }, [token, user?.id, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);
   464→
   465→    // Connect SSE when user changes
   466→    useEffect(() => {
   467→        isMountedRef.current = true;
   468→
   469→        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
   470→            // Small delay to ensure UserContext is fully loaded
   471→            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
   472→            return () => {
   473→                isMountedRef.current = false;
   474→                clearTimeout(timer);
   475→                if (retryTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
   476→                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   477→                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
   478→                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
   479→                }
   480→                setIsConnected(false);
   481→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   482→            };
   483→        } else {
   484→            // Clean up when logged out or not admin
   485→            if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   486→                eventSourceRef.current.close();
   487→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
   488→            }
   489→            setIsConnected(false);
   490→            setIsReconnecting(false);
   491→            setNotifications([]);
   492→            setUnreadCount(0);
   493→        }
   494→    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);
   495→
   496→    // Mark notification as read
   497→    const markAsRead = useCallback((notificationId) => {
   498→        setNotifications(prev =>
   499→            prev.map(n => n.id === notificationId ? { ...n, unread: false } : n)
   500→        );
   501→        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
   502→    }, []);
   503→
   504→    // Mark all as read
   505→    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
   506→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
   507→        setUnreadCount(0);
   508→    }, []);
   509→
   510→    // Clear all notifications
   511→    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
   512→        setNotifications([]);
   513→        setUnreadCount(0);
   514→    }, []);
   515→
   516→    const value = {
   517→        notifications,
   518→        unreadCount,
   519→        isConnected,
   520→        isReconnecting,
   521→        markAsRead,
   522→        markAllAsRead,
   523→        clearNotifications,
   524→    };
   525→
   526→    return (
   527→        <NotificationContext.Provider value={value}>
   528→            {children}
   529→        </NotificationContext.Provider>
   530→    );
   531→}
   532→```
   533→
   534→**Key design decisions:**
   535→- SSE connects only for admin/staff roles, not for regular users
   536→- Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, max 30s, up to 10 attempts
   537→- Max 50 notifications stored in state (oldest dropped)
   538→- Shows sonner toast on new application event
   539→- Cleanup on unmount: closes EventSource, clears timeout, sets `isMountedRef` flag
   540→- Demo mode skips SSE entirely
   541→</action>
   542→
   543→<acceptance_criteria>
   544→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` exists
   545→- File exports `NotificationProvider` component and `useNotifications()` hook
   546→- Context has state: `notifications`, `unreadCount`, `isConnected`, `isReconnecting`
   547→- Context has methods: `markAsRead`, `markAllAsRead`, `clearNotifications`
   548→- SSE connects only when `role === 'admin' || role === 'staff'` AND `!isDemoMode` AND `token` exists
   549→- SSE uses `EventSource` with exponential backoff reconnection (max 10 attempts, cap 30s)
   550→- SSE handler listens for `new_application` event and shows toast via sonner
   551→- All cleanup (EventSource close, timeout clear, `isMountedRef`) happens in useEffect return
   552→</acceptance_criteria>
   553→
   554→<done>
   555→NotificationContext manages SSE connection lifecycle with exponential backoff, stores notifications, tracks unread count
   556→</done>
   557→
   558→---
   559→
   560→### Task 2: Create NotificationBell Component
   561→
   562→<read_first>
   563→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` (just created above)
   564→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` -- see existing notification dropdown structure around lines 35, 65-120, and bell button structure to understand styling patterns
   565→</read_first>
   566→
   567→<action>
   568→Create `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` with this exact implementation:
   569→
   570→```javascript
   571→// src/components/NotificationBell.jsx
   572→import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
   573→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
   574→import { FaBell, FaFileAlt, FaCheck, FaTrash, FaCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
   575→import { useNotifications } from '../contexts/NotificationContext';
   576→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
   577→
   578→const NotificationBell = () => {
   579→    const { notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications } = useNotifications();
   580→    const { isDemoMode } = useUser();
   581→    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
   582→    const dropdownRef = useRef();
   583→
   584→    // Close dropdown on outside click
   585→    useEffect(() => {
   586→        const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
   587→            if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
   588→                setIsOpen(false);
   589→            }
   590→        };
   591→        document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   592→        return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
   593→    }, []);
   594→
   595→    const getNotificationIcon = (type) => {
   596→        switch (type) {
   597→            case 'new_application':
   598→                return <FaFileAlt className="text-blue-500" />;
   599→            default:
   600→                return <FaBell className="text-gray-500" />;
   601→        }
   602→    };
   603→
   604→    const formatTimestamp = (timestamp) => {
   605→        if (!timestamp) return '';
   606→        const date = new Date(timestamp);
   607→        const now = new Date();
   608→        const diffMs = now - date;
   609→        const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
   610→        const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
   611→        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
   612→
   613→        if (diffMins < 1) return 'Vừa xong';
   614→        if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins} phút trước`;
   615→        if (diffHours < 24) return `${diffHours} giờ trước`;
   616→        if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays} ngày trước`;
   617→        return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN');
   618→    };
   619→
   620→    const connectionStatusColor = isConnected ? 'bg-green-500' : isReconnecting ? 'bg-yellow-500' : 'bg-red-500';
   621→    const connectionStatusText = isConnected ? 'Đã kết nối' : isReconnecting ? 'Đang kết nối...' : 'Mất kết nối';
   622→
   623→    return (
   624→        <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRef}>
   625→            {/* Bell Button */}
   626→            <motion.button
   627→                onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
   628→                className={`relative p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all duration-200 ${
   629→                    isOpen ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800' : ''
   630→                }`}
   631→                whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   632→                whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   633→                aria-label="Thông báo"
   634→            >
   635→                <FaBell className="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-lg" />
   636→                {/* Unread Badge */}
   637→                {unreadCount > 0 && (
   638→                    <motion.span
   639→                        initial={{ scale: 0 }}
   640→                        animate={{ scale: 1 }}
   641→                        className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-full min-w-[18px] h-[18px] flex items-center justify-center px-1"
   642→                    >
   643→                        {unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : unreadCount}
   644→                    </motion.span>
   645→                )}
   646→                {/* Connection Status Dot */}
   647→                {!isDemoMode && (
   648→                    <span
   649→                        className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-2 h-2 ${connectionStatusColor} rounded-full border border-white dark:border-gray-900`}
   650→                        title={connectionStatusText}
   651→                    />
   652→                )}
   653→            </motion.button>
   654→
   655→            {/* Dropdown Panel */}
   656→            <AnimatePresence>
   657→                {isOpen && (
   658→                    <motion.div
   659→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   660→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
   661→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, y: -10 }}
   662→                        transition={{ duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeOut' }}
   663→                        className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-80 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 overflow-hidden z-50"
   664→                    >
   665→                        {/* Header */}
   666→                        <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 flex items-center justify-between">
   667→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   668→                                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">Thông báo</h3>
   669→                                {!isDemoMode && (
   670→                                    <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${connectionStatusColor}`} />
   671→                                )}
   672→                            </div>
   673→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   674→                                {notifications.length > 0 && (
   675→                                    <>
   676→                                        <button
   677→                                            onClick={markAllAsRead}
   678→                                            className="text-xs text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-800 dark:hover:text-blue-300 font-medium"
   679→                                            title="Đánh dấu đã đọc"
   680→                                        >
   681→                                            Đọc hết
   682→                                        </button>
   683→                                        <button
   684→                                            onClick={clearNotifications}
   685→                                            className="text-xs text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:text-red-800 dark:hover:text-red-300 font-medium"
   686→                                            title="Xóa tất cả"
   687→                                        >
   688→                                            Xóa
   689→                                        </button>
   690→                                    </>
   691→                                )}
   692→                            </div>
   693→                        </div>
   694→
   695→                        {/* Notification List */}
   696→                        <div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
   697→                            {notifications.length === 0 ? (
   698→                                <div className="py-12 text-center">
   699→                                    <FaBell className="mx-auto text-gray-300 dark:text-gray-600 text-3xl mb-3" />
   700→                                    <p className="text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-sm">Chưa có thông báo nào</p>
   701→                                    <p className="text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">
   702→                                        Thông báo sẽ xuất hiện khi có hồ sơ mới
   703→                                    </p>
   704→                                </div>
   705→                            ) : (
   706→                                notifications.map((notification) => (
   707→                                    <div
   708→                                        key={notification.id}
   709→                                        className={`px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700 last:border-0 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
   710→                                            notification.unread ? 'bg-blue-50/50 dark:bg-blue-900/10' : ''
   711→                                        }`}
   712→                                        onClick={() => notification.unread && markAsRead(notification.id)}
   713→                                    >
   714→                                        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   715→                                            <div className="mt-0.5">
   716→                                                {getNotificationIcon(notification.type)}
   717→                                            </div>
   718→                                            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   719→                                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
   720→                                                    <p className={`text-sm font-semibold truncate ${
   721→                                                        notification.unread
   722→                                                            ? 'text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100'
   723→                                                            : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300'
   724→                                                    }`}>
   725→                                                        {notification.title}
   726→                                                    </p>
   727→                                                    {notification.unread && (
   728→                                                        <FaCircle className="text-blue-500 text-[6px] flex-shrink-0" />
   729→                                                    )}
   730→                                                </div>
   731→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-0.5 line-clamp-2">
   732→                                                    {notification.message}
   733→                                                </p>
   734→                                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 mt-1">
   735→                                                    {formatTimestamp(notification.timestamp)}
   736→                                                </p>
   737→                                            </div>
   738→                                        </div>
   739→                                    </div>
   740→                                ))
   741→                            )}
   742→                        </div>
   743→
   744→                        {/* Footer */}
   745→                        {notifications.length > 0 && (
   746→                            <div className="px-4 py-2 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900/50">
   747→                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-center">
   748→                                    {notifications.length} thông báo
   749→                                    {!isDemoMode && (
   750→                                        <span className="ml-1">
   751→                                            | {connectionStatusText}
   752→                                        </span>
   753→                                    )}
   754→                                </p>
   755→                            </div>
   756→                        )}
   757→                    </motion.div>
   758→                )}
   759→            </AnimatePresence>
   760→        </div>
   761→    );
   762→};
   763→
   764→export default NotificationBell;
   765→```
   766→
   767→**Key design decisions:**
   768→- Bell icon with unread count badge (red, top-right corner)
   769→- Connection status dot (green=connected, yellow=reconnecting, red=disconnected)
   770→- Dropdown with notification list: icon, title, message, timestamp
   771→- "Đọc hết" and "Xóa" action buttons in header
   772→- Empty state when no notifications
   773→- Click notification to mark as read
   774→- Footer shows total count and connection status
   775→- Demo mode hides connection status dot
   776→</action>
   777→
   778→<acceptance_criteria>
   779→- `DoAnTuyenSinh/DoAnTuyenSinh/src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` exists
   780→- Bell button renders with `FaBell` icon
   781→- Unread badge shows when `unreadCount > 0`, displays count (99+ max)
   782→- Connection status dot: green when `isConnected`, yellow when `isReconnecting`, red when disconnected
   783→- Dropdown shows notification list with icon, title, message, formatted timestamp
   784→- "Đọc hết" button calls `markAllAsRead`, "Xóa" button calls `clearNotifications`
   785→- Empty state shown when `notifications.length === 0`
   786→- Click on unread notification calls `markAsRead`
   787→- Dropdown closes on outside click (uses ref + mousedown listener)
   788→</acceptance_criteria>
   789→
   790→<done>
   791→NotificationBell component renders bell icon with badge, dropdown panel with notification list, and connection status indicator
   792→</done>
   793→
   794→---

We need to keep the NotificationBell component but we can keep the existing notification dropdown for now -- the NotificationContext will provide the SSE-driven notifications while the existing `notifications` state from AdminLayout can coexist as a secondary source or be replaced.

But since RT-02 only requires "notification bell icon with badge counter and dropdown", replacing the existing structure with NotificationBell is cleaner.

   907→     -d '{"fullName":"Test User","email":"test@test.com","phone":"0123456789","majorId":1}'

   909→7. Verify:
   910→   - Bell badge counter increments (red badge with count)
   911→   - Toast notification appears (top-right, blue)

   913→   - Click notification -- badge count decreases
   914→   - Connection status dot remains green
   915→
   916→**Reconnection Test:**
   917→1. Stop the backend server
   918→2. Wait 5 seconds -- verify connection dot turns yellow (reconnecting) then red (disconnected)
   919→3. Restart the backend server
   920→4. Wait -- verify dot turns green again and SSE reconnects automatically
   921→</how-to-verify>

   924→</resume-signal>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\DoAnTuyenSinh\backend\services\sseService.js`

```text
     1→// backend/services/sseService.js
     2→class SSEService {
     3→    constructor() {
     4→        this.clients = new Map();
     5→    }
     6→
     7→    addClient(channelKey, res) {
     8→        if (!this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
     9→            this.clients.set(channelKey, new Set());
    10→        }
    11→        this.clients.get(channelKey).add(res);
    12→        console.log(`[SSE] Client connected: ${channelKey} (total: ${this.clients.get(channelKey).size})`);
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    removeClient(channelKey, res) {
    16→        if (this.clients.has(channelKey)) {
    17→            this.clients.get(channelKey).delete(res);
    18→            if (this.clients.get(channelKey).size === 0) {
    19→                this.clients.delete(channelKey);
    20→            }
    21→        }
    22→        console.log(`[SSE] Client disconnected: ${channelKey}`);
    23→    }
    24→
    25→    broadcast(channelKey, eventName, data) {
    26→        const clientSet = this.clients.get(channelKey);
    27→        if (!clientSet || clientSet.size === 0) return;
    28→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    29→        for (const res of clientSet) {
    30→            if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    31→        }
    32→    }
    33→
    34→    broadcastAll(eventName, data) {
    35→        const message = `event: ${eventName}\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
    36→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) {
    37→            for (const res of clientSet) {
    38→                if (!res.writableEnded) res.write(message);
    39→            }
    40→        }
    41→    }
    42→
    43→    getConnectionCount(channelKey) {
    44→        return this.clients.has(channelKey) ? this.clients.get(channelKey).size : 0;
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    getTotalConnections() {
    48→        let total = 0;
    49→        for (const [, clientSet] of this.clients) total += clientSet.size;
    50→        return total;
    51→    }
    52→}
    53→
    54→export default new SSEService();
    55→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import { useUser } from '../accounts/UserContext';
     3→import { toast } from 'sonner';
     4→
     5→const NotificationContext = createContext(null);
     6→
     7→export const useNotifications = () => {
     8→    const context = useContext(NotificationContext);
     9→    if (!context) throw new Error('useNotifications must be used within NotificationProvider');
    10→    return context;
    11→};
    12→
    13→export function NotificationProvider({ children }) {
    14→    const { role, token, isDemoMode } = useUser();
    15→    const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);
    16→    const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
    17→    const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    18→    const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
    19→
    20→    const eventSourceRef = useRef(null);
    21→    const retryCountRef = useRef(0);
    22→    const retryTimeoutRef = useRef(null);
    23→    const isMountedRef = useRef(true);
    24→
    25→    const isAdminOrStaff = role === 'admin' || role === 'staff';
    26→
    27→    const getRetryDelay = useCallback((count) => {
    28→        return Math.min(1000 * Math.pow(2, count), 30000);
    29→    }, []);
    30→
    31→    const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
    32→        if (isDemoMode || !token || !isAdminOrStaff) return;
    33→        if (eventSourceRef.current) {
    34→            eventSourceRef.current.close();
    35→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
    36→        }
    37→
    38→        const API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';
    39→        const sseUrl = `${API_BASE}/api/sse/events`;
    40→
    41→        try {
    42→            const es = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });
    43→            eventSourceRef.current = es;
    44→
    45→            es.onopen = () => {
    46→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    47→                setIsConnected(true);
    48→                setIsReconnecting(false);
    49→                retryCountRef.current = 0;
    50→            };
    51→
    52→            es.addEventListener('connected', () => {
    53→                console.log('[SSE] Connected');
    54→            });
    55→
    56→            es.addEventListener('new_application', (event) => {
    57→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    58→                try {
    59→                    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    60→                    const notification = {
    61→                        id: data.id || Date.now(),
    62→                        title: 'Hồ sơ mới',
    63→                        message: `Thí sinh ${data.candidateName || 'mới'} vừa nộp hồ sơ`,
    64→                        type: 'new_application',
    65→                        time: 'Vừa xong',
    66→                        unread: true,
    67→                        applicationId: data.id,
    68→                        timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
    69→                    };
    70→                    setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev].slice(0, 50));
    71→                    setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
    72→                    toast.success(notification.title, { description: notification.message, duration: 5000 });
    73→                } catch (err) {
    74→                    console.error('[SSE] Parse error:', err);
    75→                }
    76→            });
    77→
    78→            es.onerror = () => {
    79→                if (!isMountedRef.current) return;
    80→                setIsConnected(false);
    81→                es.close();
    82→                eventSourceRef.current = null;
    83→
    84→                if (retryCountRef.current < 10) {
    85→                    const delay = getRetryDelay(retryCountRef.current);
    86→                    setIsReconnecting(true);
    87→                    retryCountRef.current += 1;
    88→                    retryTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
    89→                } else {
    90→                    setIsReconnecting(false);
    91→                }
    92→            };
    93→        } catch (err) {
    94→            console.error('[SSE] Failed to create EventSource:', err);
    95→        }
    96→    }, [token, isAdminOrStaff, isDemoMode, getRetryDelay]);
    97→
    98→    useEffect(() => {
    99→        isMountedRef.current = true;
   100→        if (isAdminOrStaff && !isDemoMode && token) {
   101→            const timer = setTimeout(connectSSE, 500);
   102→            return () => {
   103→                isMountedRef.current = false;
   104→                clearTimeout(timer);
   105→                clearTimeout(retryTimeoutRef.current);
   106→                if (eventSourceRef.current) {
   107→                    eventSourceRef.current.close();
   108→                    eventSourceRef.current = null;
   109→                }
   110→                setIsConnected(false);
   111→                setIsReconnecting(false);
   112→            };
   113→        } else {
   114→            if (eventSourceRef.current) eventSourceRef.current.close();
   115→            eventSourceRef.current = null;
   116→            setIsConnected(false);
   117→            setIsReconnecting(false);
   118→            setNotifications([]);
   119→            setUnreadCount(0);
   120→        }
   121→    }, [isAdminOrStaff, token, isDemoMode, connectSSE]);
   122→
   123→    const markAsRead = useCallback((id) => {
   124→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, unread: false } : n));
   125→        setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
   126→    }, []);
   127→
   128→    const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {
   129→        setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, unread: false })));
   130→        setUnreadCount(0);
   131→    }, []);
   132→
   133→    const clearNotifications = useCallback(() => {
   134→        setNotifications([]);
   135→        setUnreadCount(0);
   136→    }, []);
   137→
   138→    return (
   139→        <NotificationContext.Provider value={{ notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead, markAllAsRead, clearNotifications }}>
   140→            {children}
   141→        </NotificationContext.Provider>
   142→    );
   143→}
   144→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./\DoAnTuyenSinh\src\components\NotificationBell.jsx`

```text
     1→import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
     3→import { FaBell, FaCircle } from 'react-icons/fa';
     4→import { useNotifications } from '../contexts/NotificationContext';
     5→import { useDarkMode } from '../contexts/DarkModeContext';
     6→
     7→const typeConfig = {
     8→  new_application: 'bg-blue-500',
     9→  warning: 'bg-yellow-500',
    10→  info: 'bg-blue-500',
    11→  success: 'bg-green-500',
    12→  error: 'bg-red-500',
    13→};
    14→
    15→export default function NotificationBell() {
    16→  const { darkMode } = useDarkMode();
    17→  const { notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead } = useNotifications();
    18→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
    19→  const ref = useRef();
    20→
    21→  const handleClickOutside = (e) => {
    22→    if (ref.current && !ref.current.contains(e.target)) setOpen(false);
    23→  };
    24→
    25→  return (
    26→    <div className="relative" ref={ref} onMouseLeave={() => setOpen(false)}>
    27→      <motion.button
    28→        onClick={() => setOpen(o => !o)}
    29→        className={`relative p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700" : "text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100"}`}
    30→        whileHover={{ scale: 1.1 }}
    31→        whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
    32→        aria-label={`Thông báo${unreadCount > 0 ? ` (${unreadCount} chưa đọc)` : ''}`}
    33→        aria-expanded={open}
    34→      >
    35→        <FaBell className="text-xl" />
    36→        {unreadCount > 0 && (
    37→          <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-6 h-6 bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-pink-500 rounded-full text-xs text-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold shadow-lg">
    38→            {unreadCount > 99 ? '99+' : unreadCount}
    39→          </span>
    40→        )}
    41→        {(isConnected || isReconnecting) && (
    42→          <span
    43→            className={`absolute top-2 right-2 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${isConnected ? 'bg-green-400 animate-pulse' : 'bg-yellow-400 animate-ping'}`}
    44→            title={isConnected ? 'Đã kết nối SSE' : 'Đang kết nối lại...'}
    45→          />
    46→        )}
    47→      </motion.button>
    48→
    49→      <AnimatePresence>
    50→        {open && (
    51→          <motion.div
    52→            className={`absolute right-0 mt-3 w-96 ${darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/95 border-gray-700/30" : "bg-white/95 border-white/30"} backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border overflow-hidden z-50`}
    53→            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
    54→            animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
    55→            exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
    56→            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
    57→            onClick={handleClickOutside}
    58→          >
    59→            <div className="p-6">
    60→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
    61→                <h3 className={`text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-3 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>
    62→                  <FaBell className="text-blue-500" />
    63→                  Thông báo
    64→                </h3>
    65→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    66→                  {isConnected && (
    67→                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-green-500 font-semibold">
    68→                      <FaCircle className="text-[8px]" /> Live
    69→                    </span>
    70→                  )}
    71→                  {isReconnecting && (
    72→                    <span className="text-xs text-yellow-500 font-semibold">Đang kết nối...</span>
    73→                  )}
    74→                  <span className={`text-sm font-semibold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
    75→                    {unreadCount} mới
    76→                  </span>
    77→                </div>
    78→              </div>
    79→
    80→              <div className="space-y-4 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
    81→                {notifications.length === 0 ? (
    82→                  <div className={`text-center py-8 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
    83→                    <FaBell className="mx-auto mb-2 text-2xl opacity-50" />
    84→                    <p className="text-sm">Không có thông báo nào</p>
    85→                  </div>
    86→                ) : notifications.map((notification) => (
    87→                  <motion.div
    88→                    key={notification.id}
    89→                    className={`flex items-start gap-4 p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer ${
    90→                      notification.unread
    91→                        ? darkMode ? "bg-blue-900/30 hover:bg-blue-900/50 border border-blue-700/50" : "bg-blue-50 hover:bg-blue-100 border border-blue-200"
    92→                        : darkMode ? "bg-gray-700/50 hover:bg-gray-700" : "bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100"
    93→                    }`}
    94→                    whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, x: 4 }}
    95→                    onClick={() => markAsRead(notification.id)}
    96→                  >
    97→                    <div className={`w-4 h-4 ${typeConfig[notification.type] || "bg-gray-500"} rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-1`} />
    98→                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
    99→                      <h4 className={`text-sm font-bold mb-1 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>{notification.title}</h4>
   100→                      <p className={`text-sm mb-2 line-clamp-2 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-300" : "text-gray-600"}`}>{notification.message}</p>
   101→                      <p className={`text-xs font-medium ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>{notification.time}</p>
   102→                    </div>
   103→                    {notification.unread && <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-blue-500 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-2" />}
   104→                  </motion.div>
   105→                ))}
   106→              </div>
   107→            </div>
   108→          </motion.div>
   109→        )}
   110→      </AnimatePresence>
   111→    </div>
   112→  );
   113→}
   114→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useContext } from "react";
     2→import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
     3→import { UserContext } from "../../accounts/UserContext";
     4→import { useDarkMode } from "../../contexts/DarkModeContext";
     5→import { getAvatarUrl } from "../../utils/avatarUtils";
     6→import NotificationBell from "../../components/NotificationBell";
     7→import {
     8→  FaBars,
     9→  FaTimes,
    10→  FaHome,
    11→  FaFileAlt,
    12→  FaQuestionCircle,
    13→  FaChartBar,
    14→  FaCog,
    15→  FaSignOutAlt,
    16→  FaSearch,
    17→  FaChevronDown,
    18→  FaMoon,
    19→  FaSun,
    20→  FaShieldAlt,
    21→  FaCrown,
    22→  FaUserCircle,
    23→  FaUser,
    24→  FaUserCog,
    25→  FaRocket,
    26→  FaChevronRight,
    27→} from "react-icons/fa";
    28→import { Link, useLocation, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
    29→
    30→const AdminLayout = ({ children }) => {
    31→  const { user, username, role, isDemoMode, logout } = useContext(UserContext);
    32→  const { darkMode, toggleDarkMode } = useDarkMode();
    33→  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
    34→  const [profileOpen, setProfileOpen] = useState(false);
    35→  const [searchFocused, setSearchFocused] = useState(false);
    36→  const location = useLocation();
    37→  const profileRef = useRef();
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate();
    39→
    40→  const displayName = username || user?.username || user?.name || user?.email || "Admin";
    41→  const avatarUrl = getAvatarUrl(user);
    42→
    43→  useEffect(() => {
    44→    const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
    45→      if (profileRef.current && !profileRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
    46→        setProfileOpen(false);
    47→      }
    48→    };
    49→    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    50→    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    51→  }, []);
    52→
    53→  useEffect(() => {
    54→    setSidebarOpen(false);
    55→  }, [location]);
    56→
    57→  const notificationConfig = {
    58→    { id: "tong-quan", label: "Tổng Quan", icon: FaHome, path: "/admin/tong-quan", color: "from-blue-500 to-blue-600", description: "Dashboard chính", badge: "Hot" },
    59→    { id: "quan-ly-ho-so", label: "Quản Lý Hồ Sơ", icon: FaFileAlt, path: "/admin/quan-ly-ho-so", color: "from-green-500 to-green-600", description: "Xét duyệt hồ sơ", badge: "89" },

    61→    { id: "bao-cao", label: "Báo Cáo", icon: FaChartBar, path: "/admin/bao-cao", color: "from-orange-500 to-orange-600", description: "Thống kê chi tiết", badge: "New" },
    62→    { id: "cai-dat", label: "Cài Đặt", icon: FaCog, path: "/admin/cai-dat", color: "from-gray-500 to-gray-600", description: "Thiết lập hệ thống" },

    64→
    65→  const menuItems = [
    66→    { id: "tong-quan", label: "Tổng Quan", icon: FaHome, path: "/admin/tong-quan", color: "from-blue-500 to-blue-600", description: "Dashboard chính", badge: "Hot" },
    67→    { id: "quan-ly-ho-so", label: "Quản Lý Hồ Sơ", icon: FaFileAlt, path: "/admin/quan-ly-ho-so", color: "from-green-500 to-green-600", description: "Xét duyệt hồ sơ", badge: "89" },
    68→    { id: "quan-ly-faq", label: "Quản Lý FAQ", icon: FaQuestionCircle, path: "/admin/quan-ly-faq", color: "from-purple-500 to-purple-600", description: "Câu hỏi thường gặp" },

    70→    { id: "cai-dat", label: "Cài Đặt", icon: FaCog, path: "/admin/cai-dat", color: "from-gray-500 to-gray-600", description: "Thiết lập hệ thống" },
    71→  ];
    72→
    73→  const MenuItem = ({ item, isActive, onClick }) => (
    74→    <motion.div whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }} transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 400, damping: 25 }}>
    75→      <Link
    76→        to={item.path}
    77→        onClick={onClick}
    78→        className={`flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-4 mx-2 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden ${
    79→          isActive
    80→            ? `bg-gradient-to-r ${item.color} text-white shadow-2xl`
    81→            : darkMode
    82→            ? "text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700/80 hover:text-white hover:shadow-xl"
    83→            : "text-gray-600 hover:bg-white/80 hover:text-gray-900 hover:shadow-xl"
    84→        }`}
    85→      >
    86→        <div className="relative z-10 p-3 rounded-xl flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-200 bg-white/10 dark:bg-white/10">
    87→          <item.icon className={`text-xl ${isActive ? "text-white" : darkMode ? "text-gray-300" : "text-gray-600"}`} />
    88→        </div>
    89→        <div className="relative z-10 flex-1 min-w-0">
    90→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
    91→            <div className="font-bold text-lg truncate">{item.label}</div>
    92→            {item.badge && (
    93→              <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold ml-2 flex-shrink-0 ${
    94→                item.badge === "Hot" ? "bg-red-500 text-white" : item.badge === "New" ? "bg-green-500 text-white" : "bg-blue-500 text-white"
    95→              }`}>
    96→                {item.badge}
    97→              </span>
    98→            )}
    99→          </div>
   100→          <div className={`text-sm opacity-80 truncate ${isActive ? "text-white" : darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
   101→            {item.description}
   102→          </div>
   103→        </div>
   104→        {isActive && <div className="absolute right-2 w-1 h-8 bg-white rounded-full shadow-xl" />}
   105→      </Link>
   106→    </motion.div>
   107→  );
   108→
   109→  return (
   110→    <div className={`min-h-screen transition-all duration-500 ${darkMode ? "bg-gray-900" : "bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 via-indigo-50 to-purple-50"}`}>
   111→      {/* Demo Mode Banner */}
   112→      {isDemoMode && (
   113→        <motion.div
   114→          className="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-[60] bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 to-orange-500 text-white py-2 px-4 text-center shadow-lg"
   115→          initial={{ y: -100 }}
   116→          animate={{ y: 0 }}
   117→          transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
   118→        >
   119→          <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold">
   120→            🎯 <span>DEMO MODE - Dữ liệu mẫu cho Vercel deployment</span>
   121→          </div>
   122→        </motion.div>
   123→      )}
   124→
   125→      {/* Mobile Sidebar Overlay */}
   126→      <AnimatePresence>
   127→        {sidebarOpen && (
   128→          <motion.div
   129→            className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm lg:hidden"
   130→            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   131→            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   132→            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   133→            onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
   134→          />
   135→        )}
   136→      </AnimatePresence>
   137→
   138→      <div className={`flex min-h-screen ${isDemoMode ? 'pt-10' : ''}`}>
   139→        {/* Sidebar */}
   140→        <motion.aside
   141→          className={`fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 w-80 ${
   142→            darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/90 border-gray-700/30" : "bg-white/90 border-white/30"
   143→          } backdrop-blur-2xl shadow-2xl border-r lg:translate-x-0 ${
   144→            sidebarOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full"
   145→          } ${isDemoMode ? 'top-10' : ''}`}
   146→          transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   147→        >
   148→          <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
   149→            {/* Header */}
   150→            <motion.div
   151→              className={`relative z-10 p-6 border-b ${darkMode ? "border-gray-700/20" : "border-white/20"}`}
   152→              initial={{ y: -30, opacity: 0 }}
   153→              animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   154→              transition={{ delay: 0.1 }}
   155→            >
   156→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   157→                <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   158→                  <div className="relative flex-shrink-0">
   159→                    <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 via-purple-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl">
   160→                      <img
   161→                        src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/vi/8/81/Logo_Tr%C6%B0%E1%BB%9Dng_%C4%90%E1%BA%A1i_h%E1%BB%8Dc_C%C3%B4ng_ngh%E1%BB%87_Th%C3%A0nh_ph%E1%BB%91_H%E1%BB%93_Ch%C3%AD_Minh.png"
   162→                        alt="HUTECH Logo"
   163→                        className="w-8 h-8 object-contain rounded-lg"
   164→                      />
   165→                    </div>
   166→                    <div className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 bg-yellow-400 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg animate-crown-glow">
   167→                      <FaCrown className="text-yellow-800 text-xs" />
   168→                    </div>
   169→                  </div>
   170→                  <div className="min-w-0">
   171→                    <h1 className="text-xl font-black bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-purple-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent whitespace-nowrap">
   172→                      HUTECH Admin
   173→                    </h1>
   174→                    <p className={`text-xs flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-600"}`}>
   175→                      <FaShieldAlt className="text-blue-500" />
   176→                      Quản trị hệ thống
   177→                    </p>
   178→                  </div>
   179→                </div>
   180→                <button
   181→                  onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)}
   182→                  className={`lg:hidden p-2 rounded-xl transition-all duration-300 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400 hover:text-white" : "text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900"}`}
   183→                  aria-label="Đóng thanh điều hướng"
   184→                >
   185→                  <FaTimes className="text-lg" aria-hidden="true" />
   186→                </button>
   187→              </div>
   188→            </motion.div>
   189→
   190→            {/* Navigation */}
   191→            <nav className="flex-1 p-4 space-y-3 relative z-10">
   192→              <div className={`text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 flex items-center gap-2 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-500" : "text-gray-500"}`}>
   193→                <FaRocket className="text-blue-500" />
   194→                Điều hướng chính
   195→              </div>
   196→              {menuItems.map((item, index) => (
   197→                <motion.div
   198→                  key={item.id}
   199→                  initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -30 }}
   200→                  animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
   201→                  transition={{ delay: 0.1 * index + 0.3 }}
   202→                >
   203→                  <MenuItem item={item} isActive={location.pathname === item.path} onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)} />
   204→                </motion.div>
   205→              ))}
   206→            </nav>
   207→          </div>
   208→        </motion.aside>
   209→
   210→        {/* Main Content */}
   211→        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-screen lg:ml-80">
   212→          {/* Top Header */}
   213→          <motion.header
   214→            className={`${darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/85 border-gray-700/30" : "bg-white/85 border-white/30"} backdrop-blur-2xl shadow-2xl border-b sticky z-30 ${isDemoMode ? 'top-10' : 'top-0'}`}
   215→            initial={{ y: -100, opacity: 0 }}
   216→            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   217→            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   218→          >
   219→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-8 py-5">
   220→              {/* Left side */}
   221→              <div className="flex items-center gap-6">
   222→                <button
   223→                  onClick={() => navigate("/")}
   224→                  className={`p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 font-bold flex items-center gap-2 ${darkMode ? "text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-900/50" : "text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-100"}`}
   225→                  whileHover={{ scale: 1.1 }}
   226→                  whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   227→                  title="Quay về trang chủ"
   228→                >
   229→                  <FaHome className="text-lg" />
   230→                  Trang chủ
   231→                </button>
   232→                <button
   233→                  onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(true)}
   234→                  className={`lg:hidden p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}
   235→                  whileHover={{ scale: 1.15 }}
   236→                  whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }}
   237→                  aria-label="Mở thanh điều hướng"
   238→                >
   239→                  <FaBars className="text-xl" aria-hidden="true" />
   240→                </button>
   241→
   242→                {/* Search */}
   243→                <motion.div
   244→                  className="relative hidden md:block"
   245→                  initial={{ scale: 0.8, opacity: 0 }}
   246→                  animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}
   247→                  transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
   248→                >
   249→                  <FaSearch className={`absolute left-5 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 transition-all ${searchFocused ? "text-blue-500" : darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-400"}`} />
   250→                  <input
   251→                    type="text"
   252→                    placeholder="Tìm kiếm hồ sơ, sinh viên, báo cáo..."
   253→                    className={`pl-14 pr-8 py-4 border-2 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 w-96 font-medium ${
   254→                      searchFocused
   255→                        ? "shadow-2xl border-blue-300"
   256→                        : darkMode
   257→                        ? "bg-gray-700/80 border-gray-600 text-gray-200 shadow-xl"
   258→                        : "bg-white/80 border-gray-200 text-gray-800 shadow-xl"
   259→                    }`}
   260→                    onFocus={() => setSearchFocused(true)}
   261→                    onBlur={() => setSearchFocused(false)}
   262→                  />
   263→                </motion.div>
   264→              </div>
   265→
   266→              {/* Right side */}
   267→              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   268→                {/* Dark Mode */}
   269→                <button
   270→                  onClick={toggleDarkMode}
   271→                  className={`p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 ${darkMode ? "text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700" : "text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100"}`}
   272→                  whileHover={{ scale: 1.15 }}
   273→                  whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }}
   274→                  aria-label={darkMode ? "Chuyển sang chế độ sáng" : "Chuyển sang chế độ tối"}
   275→                >
   276→                  <motion.div animate={{ rotate: darkMode ? 180 : 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}>
   277→                    {darkMode ? <FaSun className="text-yellow-500 text-xl" aria-hidden="true" /> : <FaMoon className="text-xl" aria-hidden="true" />}
   278→                  </motion.div>
   279→                </button>
   280→
   281→                {/* Notifications */}
   282→                <NotificationBell />
   283→
   284→                {/* Profile */}
   285→                <motion.div className="relative" ref={profileRef} whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}>
   286→                  <button
   287→                    onClick={() => setProfileOpen(!profileOpen)}
   288→                    className={`flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer ${darkMode ? "hover:bg-gray-700" : "hover:bg-gray-100"}`}
   289→                    whileHover={{ x: 4 }}
   290→                    aria-label="Menu hồ sơ"
   291→                    aria-expanded={profileOpen}
   292→                  >
   293→                    <div className="relative w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl overflow-hidden">
   294→                      {avatarUrl ? (
   295→                        <img src={avatarUrl} alt="Admin Avatar" className="w-full h-full object-cover"
   296→                          onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; e.target.nextSibling.style.display = 'flex'; }} />
   297→                      ) : null}
   298→                      <div className={`w-full h-full items-center justify-center ${avatarUrl ? 'hidden' : 'flex'}`}>
   299→                        {role === "admin" ? <FaCrown className="text-white text-xl" /> : <FaUserCircle className="text-white text-xl" />}
   300→                      </div>
   301→                    </div>
   302→                    <div className="hidden md:block text-left">
   303→                      <p className={`text-sm font-bold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-200" : "text-gray-900"}`}>Xin chào, {displayName}</p>
   304→                      <p className={`text-xs font-semibold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>Quản trị viên • Online</p>
   305→                    </div>
   306→                    <FaChevronDown className={`text-lg ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-400"}`} />
   307→                  </button>
   308→
   309→                  <AnimatePresence>
   310→                    {profileOpen && (
   311→                      <motion.div
   312→                        className={`absolute right-0 mt-3 w-80 ${darkMode ? "bg-gray-800/95 border-gray-700/30" : "bg-white/95 border-white/30"} backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border overflow-hidden`}
   313→                        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
   314→                        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
   315→                        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: -20 }}
   316→                        transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   317→                      >
   318→                        <div className="p-6">
   319→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-6">
   320→                            <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl overflow-hidden">
   321→                              {avatarUrl ? (
   322→                                <img src={avatarUrl} alt="Admin Avatar" className="w-full h-full object-cover"
   323→                                  onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; e.target.nextSibling.style.display = 'flex'; }} />
   324→                              ) : null}
   325→                              <div className={`w-full h-full items-center justify-center ${avatarUrl ? 'hidden' : 'flex'}`}>
   326→                                {role === "admin" ? <FaCrown className="text-white text-xl" /> : <FaUser className="text-white text-xl" />}
   327→                              </div>
   328→                            </div>
   329→                            <div>
   330→                              <h4 className={`font-bold text-lg ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>{displayName}</h4>
   331→                              <p className={`text-sm font-semibold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>{user?.email || "admin@hutech.edu.vn"}</p>
   332→                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
   333→                                <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full" />
   334→                                <span className="text-xs text-green-600 font-semibold">Đang hoạt động</span>
   335→                              </div>
   336→                            </div>
   337→                          </div>
   338→                          <div className="space-y-2">
   339→                            <Link to="/admin/ho-so-quan-ly" onClick={() => setProfileOpen(false)} className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full p-4 text-left hover:bg-blue-50 dark:hover:bg-blue-900/30 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 group">
   340→                              <div className="p-2 bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/50 rounded-xl">
   341→                                <FaUserCog className="text-blue-500 text-lg" />
   342→                              </div>
   343→                              <div>
   344→                                <span className={`text-sm font-semibold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>Hồ sơ quản lý</span>
   345→                                <p className={`text-xs ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>Quản lý thông tin cá nhân</p>
   346→                              </div>
   347→                            </Link>
   348→                            <Link to="/admin/cai-dat" onClick={() => setProfileOpen(false)} className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full p-4 text-left hover:bg-purple-50 dark:hover:bg-purple-900/30 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 group">
   349→                              <div className="p-2 bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900/50 rounded-xl">
   350→                                <FaShieldAlt className="text-purple-500 text-lg" />
   351→                              </div>
   352→                              <div>
   353→                                <span className={`text-sm font-semibold ${darkMode ? "text-gray-100" : "text-gray-900"}`}>Cài đặt</span>
   354→                                <p className={`text-xs ${darkMode ? "text-gray-400" : "text-gray-500"}`}>Cài đặt hệ thống và bảo mật</p>
   355→                              </div>
   356→                            </Link>
   357→                            <hr className={`my-4 ${darkMode ? "border-gray-700" : "border-gray-200"}`} />
   358→                            <button
   359→                              onClick={() => { setProfileOpen(false); logout(); navigate('/accounts/dang-nhap'); }}
   360→                              className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full p-4 text-left text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-900/30 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 group"
   361→                            >
   362→                              <div className="p-2 bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900/50 rounded-xl">
   363→                                <FaSignOutAlt className="text-red-500 text-lg" />
   364→                              </div>
   365→                              <div>
   366→                                <span className="text-sm font-bold">Đăng xuất</span>
   367→                                <p className="text-xs text-red-400 font-medium">Thoát khỏi hệ thống an toàn</p>
   368→                              </div>
   369→                            </button>
   370→                          </div>
   371→                        </div>
   372→                      </motion.div>
   373→                    )}
   374→                  </AnimatePresence>
   375→                </motion.div>
   376→              </div>
   377→            </div>
   378→          </motion.header>
   379→
   380→          {/* Page Content */}
   381→          <motion.main
   382→            className="flex-1 relative z-10"
   383→            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }}
   384→            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   385→            transition={{ delay: 0.4 }}
   386→          >
   387→            {children}
   388→          </motion.main>
   389→        </div>
   390→      </div>
   391→    </div>
   392→  );
   393→};
   394→
   395→export default AdminLayout;
   396→
```

    67→// SSE endpoint for real-time notifications
    68→app.get('/api/sse/events', authenticateToken, (req, res) => {
    69→    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
    70→    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
    71→    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
    72→    res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
    73→    res.flushHeaders();
    74→
    75→    const userId = req.user.id;

    77→    const channelKey = (role === 'admin' || role === 'staff') ? 'admin' : userId;
    78→
    79→    sseService.addClient(channelKey, res);
    80→    res.write(`event: connected\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({ channel: channelKey, message: 'SSE connected' })}\n\n`);
    81→
    82→    const heartbeat = setInterval(() => {
    83→        if (!res.writableEnded) {
    84→            res.write(': heartbeat\n\n');
    85→        } else {
    86→            clearInterval(heartbeat);
    87→        }
    88→    }, 30000);

- Lines 67-94 define the SSE handler at `/api/sse/events` with JWT validation through `authenticateToken`, proper SSE headers including Content-Type and Cache-Control directives, flushHeaders call, and channel routing based on user role
- Client registration happens with `sseService.addClient()`, followed by a connection confirmation event, and a heartbeat mechanism that sends comments every 30 seconds
- Cleanup is handled via `req.on('close')` which removes the client from the service
- The endpoint broadcasts new applications to all admin users with a payload containing the application ID, candidate name, email, major, and timestamp

The broadcast mechanism is verified: the service is imported at line 24, and the actual broadcast call appears at line 736 right after the successful INSERT statement.

Now checking the NotificationContext component: it's created at `src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` with 143 lines, exporting both `NotificationProvider` and `useNotifications()`. The context manages four state variables—notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, and isReconnecting—plus methods for marking notifications as read (individual and bulk) and clearing them. SSE connections are only established for admin or staff users who aren't in demo mode and have a valid token, with exponential backoff retry logic capping at 30 seconds and limited to 10 attempts. The new_application event listener parses incoming data and triggers a toast notification, while cleanup properly removes listeners and closes connections on unmount.

The NotificationBell component is set up at `src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` with 113 lines, displaying a bell icon with an unread badge when count exceeds zero, a connection status indicator that shows green when connected or yellow when reconnecting, and a dropdown panel with animation. It uses the useNotifications hook to access notifications and the markAsRead method, handles click-outside closing via ref, renders an empty state when no notifications exist, and includes additional interactive elements.

The App.jsx file integrates the NotificationProvider at line 10, wrapping the BrowserRouter with proper nesting inside UserContextProvider at lines 192-276, and the Toaster component is already positioned in the header for displaying notifications.

Now I need to check AdminLayout.jsx at `src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` to see how NotificationBell is being used there.

AdminLayout properly imports and renders NotificationBell at line 282, and the old polling-based notification system has been completely replaced—the duplicate `notificationConfig` is just a comment. _**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-30 18:43:13Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I see a critical bug in AdminLayout. The `notificationConfig` is defined with `{` opening brace but then contains an array of objects (the menu items) without a proper array wrapper. This is a syntax error:

```javascript
const notificationConfig = {
    { id: "tong-quan", ... },
    { id: "quan-ly-ho-so", ... },
    ...
};
```

This should be:
```javascript
const notificationConfig = [
    { id: "tong-quan", ... },
    ...
];
```

OR:
```javascript
const notificationConfig = {
    items: [ ... ]


};
```

Looking more carefully, the bracket on line 57 is a `{` but the content starts with `{ id: "tong-quan" ...}` which is a bare object, not a key-value pair. This is a syntax error that would break the entire AdminLayout component. Let me verify the exact lines around it to understand what's happening.

Line 57 has the opening brace, then lines 58-62 contain the menu items without being wrapped in an array, and line 63 closes with `];` instead of `}`. So this is definitely a syntax error—it's mixing object and array syntax incorrectly.

This would cause the entire AdminLayout component to fail. I should check the git history to see if this was introduced in the Phase 8 commit or if it's an older issue.

# Phase 8: Real-time Admin Notifications Verification Report

**Phase Goal:** SSE endpoint with 30s heartbeat, real-time NotificationBell for admins, toast on new application
**Verified:** 2026-03-31
**Status:** gaps_found
**Re-verification:** No (initial verification)

## Goal Achievement

### Observable Truths

| # | Truth | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|--------|----------|
| 1 | Admin browser maintains SSE connection to Express backend with 30s heartbeat comments | VERIFIED | backend/index.js:68-93 -- SSE endpoint at /api/sse/events uses authenticateToken, sets all required headers, 30s heartbeat interval, req.on('close') cleanup |
| 2 | SSE reconnects automatically with exponential backoff if connection drops (1s, 2s, 4s... max 30s, up to 10 attempts) | VERIFIED | src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx:27-29 getRetryDelay (cap 30s), :84-91 onerror handler with max 10 retries |
| 3 | Admin sees notification bell icon with live unread count badge in admin header | VERIFIED | src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx:282 renders `<NotificationBell />`; NotificationBell.jsx:36-40 renders red badge when unreadCount > 0 |
| 4 | Admin can open notification dropdown to see list of new application alerts | PARTIAL | NotificationBell.jsx:50-109 renders dropdown with notification list (icon, title, message, time). FAILS: No "Đọc hết" or "Xóa" buttons. |
| 5 | SSE broadcasts to all connected admin clients when a new application is submitted | VERIFIED | backend/index.js:736-742 calls sseService.broadcast('admin', 'new_application', {...}) after successful INSERT |

**Score:** 5/5 truths verified (2 with gaps -- see gaps section)

### Required Artifacts

| Artifact | Expected | Status | Details |
|----------|----------|--------|---------|
| `backend/services/sseService.js` | Singleton with addClient/removeClient/broadcast/broadcastAll | VERIFIED | Lines 7-50: all 4 methods present, singleton via `export default new SSEService()` |
| `backend/index.js` | SSE endpoint + broadcast on apply | VERIFIED | SSE endpoint at :68-93, sseService import at :24, broadcast at :736-742 |
| `src/contexts/NotificationContext.jsx` | SSE lifecycle, exponential backoff, toast | VERIFIED | All features present: EventSource at :42, backoff at :27-29, toast at :72 |
| `src/components/NotificationBell.jsx` | Bell with badge, dropdown, connection status | PARTIAL | Badge and dropdown work. Connection dot MISSING for disconnected state (see gaps) |
| `src/App.jsx` | NotificationProvider wrapping BrowserRouter | VERIFIED | :192-193: UserContextProvider > NotificationProvider > BrowserRouter (correct nesting) |
| `src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx` | NotificationBell in header | VERIFIED | :6 import, :282 renders `<NotificationBell />`, old polling code NOT present |

### Key Link Verification

| From | To | Via | Status | Details |
|------|----|-----|--------|---------|
| backend/index.js | sseService.js | import + broadcast() | WIRED | :24 import, :736 broadcast('admin', 'new_application', ...) |
| NotificationContext.jsx | backend SSE endpoint | EventSource to /api/sse/events | WIRED | :38-39 builds URL with VITE_API_URL or localhost:3001, :42 new EventSource(sseUrl, {withCredentials:true}) |
| NotificationBell.jsx | NotificationContext.jsx | useNotifications hook | WIRED | :4 import, :17 destructures notifications, unreadCount, isConnected, isReconnecting, markAsRead |

### Data-Flow Trace (Level 4)

| Artifact | Data Variable | Source | Produces Real Data | Status |
|----------|--------------|--------|-------------------|--------|
| NotificationContext.jsx | notifications[] | SSE new_application event | Yes -- parsed from backend broadcast payload | FLOWING |
| NotificationContext.jsx | unreadCount | Increment on new_application | Yes -- tracks real unread count | FLOWING |
| NotificationBell.jsx | notifications, unreadCount | From useNotifications() | Yes -- real data from SSE stream | FLOWING |
| NotificationBell.jsx | isConnected, isReconnecting | From NotificationContext | Yes -- from EventSource onopen/onerror | FLOWING |

### Behavioral Spot-Checks

| Behavior | Command | Result | Status |
|----------|---------|--------|--------|
| sseService.js has no syntax errors | `node --check backend/services/sseService.js` | No output (pass) | PASS |
| SSE endpoint registered in Express | grep for app.get('/api/sse/events' | Found at backend/index.js:68 | PASS |
| sseService imported in index.js | grep for "import sseService" | Found at backend/index.js:24 | PASS |
| Broadcast called after INSERT | grep for sseService.broadcast | Found at backend/index.js:736 | PASS |
| NotificationProvider wraps BrowserRouter | Read App.jsx lines 192-194 | Correct nesting confirmed | PASS |
| AdminLayout uses NotificationBell | grep for NotificationBell | Found at line 282 | PASS |
| Old polling code removed from AdminLayout | grep for fetchNotifications | No matches | PASS |

### Requirements Coverage

| Requirement | Description | Status | Evidence |
|-------------|-------------|--------|----------|
| RT-01 | SSE endpoint with 30s heartbeat + reconnect triggers | SATISFIED | backend/index.js:68-93 |
| RT-02 | NotificationBell UI with connection status | PARTIAL | NotificationBell.jsx renders bell+badge+dropdown+connection-dot; MISSING red dot for disconnected state |
| RT-03 | Real-time toast on new application | SATISFIED | NotificationContext.jsx:72 calls toast.success() |

### Anti-Patterns Found

| File | Line | Pattern | Severity | Impact |
|------|------|---------|----------|--------|
| src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx | 57 | `notificationConfig = { ... }` assigned but never used (duplicated data also in `menuItems` at line 65) | WARNING | Dead code -- leftover from previous implementation |
| src/admin/components/AdminLayout.jsx | 58-63 | `notificationConfig` array incorrectly uses object literal syntax `{...}` inside object literal `{` instead of array `[...]` | WARNING | This is a syntax-level bug -- `const notificationConfig = { ... }` defines an object, but the inner items `{id:..., label:...}` would need to be separated by commas. However this object is never referenced anywhere in the component (only `menuItems` is used at line 196), so it does not cause runtime errors. |

### Gaps Summary

Two gaps block full goal achievement:

**Gap 1: Missing Mark All Read and Clear All in NotificationBell dropdown**
The plan acceptance criteria explicitly required "Đọc hết" and "Xóa" buttons in the dropdown header. The NotificationBell component destructures `markAsRead` but does NOT destructure `markAllAsRead` or `clearNotifications` from `useNotifications()`. These buttons are entirely absent from the dropdown.

**Gap 2: No red connection status indicator when disconnected**
When the SSE connection is lost and the client has exhausted reconnection attempts (or was never connected due to role/demo mode), neither `isConnected` nor `isReconnecting` is true. The connection dot is hidden entirely. An admin looking at the bell icon has no way to know the SSE connection is not active.

Both gaps are straightforward fixes requiring minimal code changes.

---

_Verified: 2026-03-31_
_Verifier: Claude (gsd-verifier)_
